clean_body: | | It's late and I'm going to make this short. The 2022 midterms are a pivotal moment for our democracy. And here in Maryland this Senate seat is being targeted by Mitch McConnell in his drive to become Majority leader again. Mitch is actively recruiting Larry Hogan to run against me — and will pour unlimited outside money into this Senate race to try to get his way. You are the frontline of our defense. If you haven't already, please use this secure link to rush a donation before our midnight end-of-month deadline to help me defend the our Senate Democratic majority and fight back against Mitch and his Republican Super PAC attacks. subject: Tonight's January deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Brown for Governor and Friends of Cynthia
body:
Team,

$5.

It may not sound like a lot, but that’s what we’re asking you to
contribute to Matt and Cynthia’s campaign today. If you’re ready to chip
in to bring a political revolution to Rhode Island, donate using this
secure link:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3493?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220131_PM1_V1_S1&t=1003&akid=461%2E43343%2EbZLkTQ ]secure.actblue.com/donate/mab-em-jan2022

Please give us a moment to explain why this is so
important:

Matt and Cynthia are relentless fighters for everyone. The conservative
establishment has ignored the needs of our communities for far too long.
They’re not going away without a fight, and they’ve got the bank accounts
to prove it.

That’s why this campaign is building a movement of supporters just like
you, so Matt and Cynthia can enact transformational policies that will
tangibly improve the lives of working families in Rhode Island — like a
Green New Deal, criminal justice reform, protecting voting and
reproductive rights, and universal Medicare for all.

But organizing a movement to topple the status quo is never easy. It takes
people power.

It’s also why Matt and Cynthia won’t accept a dime from corporate PACs,
fossil fuel companies, and corporate lobbyists — because they’re running
to fight for you, not the corporate CEOs. That’s why we’re asking:

With hours to go before our January fundraising deadline passes, will you
make a $5 donation to our campaign before midnight tonight? We’re powered
by grassroots donors, and each time someone pitches in — no matter how big
or how small — it can really add up, and we build our movement for a
brighter future.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3437?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220131_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=461%2E43343%2EbZLkTQ ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3438?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220131_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=461%2E43343%2EbZLkTQ ]CHIP IN $27 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3439?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220131_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=461%2E43343%2EbZLkTQ ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3440?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220131_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=461%2E43343%2EbZLkTQ ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3441?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220131_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=461%2E43343%2EbZLkTQ ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/3436?refcode=AU_MAB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220131_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=461%2E43343%2EbZLkTQ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

By the time you’ve read this, someone else has chipped in $5 to get
involved in our campaign. And when we’re powered by the people this way,
it supercharges our ability to reach voters and win.

Thank you for your help. It means the world to
know you have our back.

— Team Matt and Cynthia

PO Box 2574 Providence, RI 02906

[ https://act.mattandcynthiaforri.com/go/445?t=1001&akid=461%2E43343%2EbZLkTQ ]www.mattandcynthiaforri.com | [ mailto:info@mattandcynthiaforri.com ]info@mattandcynthiaforri.com |

Peter,

I have been blessed with many amazing opportunities, but I can say without a doubt that running for the Senate in Georgia is one of the greatest honors of my life.

That's why we're giving this race 110% Every. Single. Day.

Having said that, we're running against the top Senate fundraiser in the country. In the last three months, he raised more than $9.8 million!

Since he began raising money for his re-election campaign last winter, **he's brought in more than $53.5 MILLION.**

While this is a tremendous amount of money, we've never been known to back down from a good challenge.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: really, REALLY big moment for all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I'm teaming up with my good friend, Steve Scalise, for the FIRST TIME this year
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ce0af7ad8e9f45f78bad846eac472696&_e=Eno2RKgcAkC5jcN_unWpjqOWFpG0YREQ27UrQZXyNltI6e6EITeZgeNXgxbmHs4RoMDk9L881DIqWuz1sd9CjshFpOaiNfm37MEcKnZCAFaPKGtsWNzHla6-ztzqzRXIvuG1weR2C_dsAagftazHkJE1VdZUmHNBqU6Tw-R3tBeOnTb7RFQPo6AFZJJSb8ri64sadAYlyJxThMQ4cLnEiIyfu2gd1gYQ-8Ns0_Y6qsCaMlYSNRCvosqTasEBNjJh2t08yOgAPQWWSfuQq7bzCmBYNfDjR1BdR2rPRATXnOzz_t5iZXt3L-q5fbeSWM90VLb44sws06qA505go9Pj4xK2z_Z0Io6dtAgXV_pGPCXrMry_WvtKXQA8hN2CEiZxDtIZ32ag4yigN9amhJj8V3U-YllUijylTzwAEci8Jiw7bkXodimfxF1Oaw2yMSAXifAC07cNLpBO4je3FWJC7-QE4_nETbpmnjREOgK27SbKn0RiX2PEF-o7xoZOoPjg-9ppDs0yQoctIbyP1AMthHlieR4y7PuVvyEmollbCe0%3D)
Peter,
This is Mike Pompeo.
**I 'm teaming up with my good friend, Steve Scalise, for the FIRST TIME this year because this is a really, REALLY big moment for every single one of us.**
Steve just told me donations have plummeted in our battle to win back the House for my former boss, President Donald J. Trump. The two of us are asking you for a small gift of [**just ten dollars**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ce0af7ad8e9f45f78bad846eac472696&_e=Eno2RKgcAkC5jcN_unWpjqOWFpG0YREQ27UrQZXyNltI6e6EITeZgeNXgxbmHs4RoMDk9L881DIqWuz1sd9CjshFpOaiNfm37MEcKnZCAFaPKGtsWNzHla6-ztzqzRXIvuG1weR2C_dsAagftazHkJE1VdZUmHNBqU6Tw-R3tBeOnTb7RFQPo6AFZJJSb8ri64sadAYlyJxThMQ4cLnEiIyfu2gd1gYQ-8Ns0_Y6qsCaMlYSNRCvosqTasEBNjJh2t08yOgAPQWWSfuQq7bzCmBYNfDjR1BdR2rPRATXnOzz_t5iZXt3L-q5fbeSWM90VLb44sws06qA505go9Pj46VS4BFhJDds8DJiOE8tjtADWV0vt3nuLbIdPCsRJJz23c9egYE5eD2mgZvAXN-pPIHvYW0LTy75dseE8PMC1TVaowIlerVEQkSSqLEWPF0xZIAsg61Eb4N4yZaMFRxAeoLEKQZIM5qpuCd0BehQdxAGEHcIWWGG2VTuZteoATc6xS3QgyDypBu9as5Oe7gcqUAGVCH-YDEaNuIBPe48TjM%3D) before the first end-of-month deadline of the election year.
I know what you're thinking:
How can ten dollars make any difference? Well, President Trump's MAGA movement is made up of tens of millions of proud American Patriots. If every single one of them (_yes, that includes you_) chips in just ten dollars right now, it would kick our campaign operations into hyperdrive.
**The socialist mob wouldn 't stand a chance against us.**
But this depends on mobilizing everyone to pull their own weight. If too many American Patriots think they can sit this one out, our path to victory will COMPLETELY VANISH.
[**We need 100% participation. Please don 't be the one who sits this one out.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ce0af7ad8e9f45f78bad846eac472696&_e=Eno2RKgcAkC5jcN_unWpjqOWFpG0YREQ27UrQZXyNltI6e6EITeZgeNXgxbmHs4RoMDk9L881DIqWuz1sd9CjshFpOaiNfm37MEcKnZCAFaPKGtsWNzHla6-ztzqzRXIvuG1weR2C_dsAagftazHkJE1VdZUmHNBqU6Tw-R3tBeOnTb7RFQPo6AFZJJSb8ri64sadAYlyJxThMQ4cLnEiIyfu2gd1gYQ-8Ns0_Y6qsCaMlYSNRCvosqTasEBNjJh2t08yOgAPQWWSfuQq7bzCmBYNfDjR1BdR2rPRATXnOzz_t5iZXt3L-q5fbeSWM90VLb44sws06qA505go9Pj4xsbi5yAlu98AYSfqv31W7_urx6BXQoIUt-WM8kawfnWLkn0q1BjtvDDBquIuu8zq-zvLhCxzDqCgPhFXUlbBdp-dRzWkARZrb9BIeLu-xhxJyyEyXVK86c00DHitXr5krTWYOVcfIbNVzq0Hw0D3BKXxr-Z2Mg_uUDlerKBKV8Xf_LdIFIf9685svEmbt-bPmYlyoW8UWUdTeC0yVewE8U%3D)
I'm really counting on your support and ten dollars.
For America,
Mike Pompeo

clean_body: I'm teaming up with my good friend, Steve Scalise, for the FIRST TIME this year Peter, This is Mike Pompeo. I 'm teaming up with my good friend, Steve Scalise, for the FIRST TIME this year because this is a really, REALLY big moment for every single one of us. Steve just told me donations have plummeted in our battle to win back the House for my former boss, President Donald J. Trump. The two of us are asking you for a small gift of before the first end-of-month deadline of the election year. I know what you're thinking: How can ten dollars make any difference? Well, President Trump's MAGA movement is made up of tens of millions of proud American Patriots. If every single one of them (yes, that includes you) chips in just ten dollars right now, it would kick our campaign operations into hyperdrive. The socialist mob wouldn 't stand a chance against us. But this depends on mobilizing everyone to pull their own weight. If too many American Patriots think they can sit this one out, our path to victory will COMPLETELY VANISH. I'm really counting on your support and ten dollars. The newly uncovered tools are sophisticated hacking devices that can breach cell phones and the USPS’s law enforcement arm, U.S. Postal Inspection Service (USPIS), has utilized them hundreds of times in the last few years, according to a news story that cites USPIS data buried in a lengthy agency report. The questionable surveillance schemes appear to indicate that the government is weaponizing the nation’s postal service to improperly spy on the citizens who fund it. clean_body: Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton made the following statement regarding the new Supreme Court vacancy resulting from Justice Stephen Breyer’s retirement... | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 31, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == Justice Breyer’s surprise retirement seems to have been the result of an unprecedented leftist pressure campaign to force him from the Supreme Court before this year’s election. You can be sure these same radical leftists, who also want to pack the Supreme Court, will require Biden to pick a judicial extremist to replace Justice Breyer. Let me be clear: the Left will use this opportunity to further undermine the integrity of the Supreme Court and the rule of law. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Months after Judicial Watch sued the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) for information about a secret program that tracks and collects Americans’ social media posts, more of the agency’s controversial spy mechanisms are being exposed. The newly uncovered tools are sophisticated hacking devices that can breach cell phones and the USPS’s law enforcement arm, U.S. Postal Inspection Service (USPIS), has utilized them hundreds of times in the last few years, according to a news story that cites USPIS data buried in a lengthy agency report. The questionable surveillance schemes appear to indicate that the government is weaponizing the nation’s postal service to improperly spy on the citizens who fund it. = ---|--- | | | | | “These documents confirm abuse of US diplomatic personnel by the Chinese government,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “The Biden administration doesn’t seem to have done much about this abusive anal swab testing other than pretend it didn’t happen and cover it up.” ---|--- | | | | = | = The Biden administration’s controversial open border policies are slamming the overwhelmed U.S. Immigration Court system, creating the largest backlog of cases in history. A new report issued by Syracuse University’s Transactional Records Access Clearinghouse (TRAC) reveals that the backlog is “growing faster than ever, burying judges in an avalanche of cases.” At the end of December pending cases reached a shocking 1,596,193, according to government figures obtained by TRAC under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA). = ---|--- | | | = Sharyl Attkisson Milley and Haspel reportedly had at least one conversation in which President Trump was attacked as being part of a “coup.” “It ought to be disturbing to all Americans that the head of the CIA and the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs were reportedly conspiring against the President of the United States,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. "Our new lawsuit will hopefully ferret out the truth about any plots to undermine President Trump by the military and CIA.” = = The Daily Wire “NBC News faced backlash over a report that it published this week that sought to paint those who want transparency in what their children are taught as “conservative activists” who pose a threat to free speech. Tom Fitton, Judicial Watch: “Agenda piece by @NBCNews helpfully reminds parents that leftists illegally abusing kids with racist CRT propaganda fear transparency.” ” = CNS News After the conservative group Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit challenging a race-based scholarship program established in the City of Ashville, N.C., the city decided to settle the case by removing the race-restrictive language in the program, and asserting that the scholarship “will give preference to applicants” whose parents have a high school education or less and who represent “first generation” college students. == == = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

name: Team AOC
subject: 3 people from your area
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Grassroots donors put her in Congress, and grassroots donors keep her there.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220131-2760-header&t=1&akid=2760%2E2526796%2EoNapY1)
With just hours before our midnight fundraising deadline, we wanted to share a sneak peek into our ActBlue fundraising:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220131-2?refcode=em20220131-2760-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2760_2526796_oNapY1&akid=2760%2E2526796%2EoNapY1)
**That’s our average contribution during the month of January.** Our grassroots movement is built on thousands of individuals like you pitching in $15.11 or whatever you can afford, whenever you can. And the fact that we’re able to raise as much as we do just one $15.11 donation at a time is a testament to the size and strength of the movement we’ve been building since Alexandria’s election in 2018.
**Grassroots donors put her in Congress, and grassroots donors _keep_ her there.** Your support made it possible for Alexandria to introduce the Green New Deal, fight for funeral assistance that directly supports families during the pandemic, and so much more.
**But our next test is raising $150,000 before the end of the month.** It’s been a slower fundraising pace than we expected in January. But if we can reach this goal, we’ll be in good shape to fund the work we had already planned to support AOC’s re-election and work in Congress.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220131-2?refcode=em20220131-2760-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2760_2526796_oNapY1&akid=2760%2E2526796%2EoNapY1)
We divided up what we need to raise and our typical contribution size. If we can get just three more people from your area to chip in, we’ll hit our goal before midnight. [What do you say? Can you make a $15.11 donation — or whatever you can afford — now to be one of the three supporters from your area?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220131-2?refcode=em20220131-2760-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=4&refcode2=2760_2526796_oNapY1&akid=2760%2E2526796%2EoNapY1)
**[Contribute $15.11](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220131-2?refcode=em20220131-2760-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2760_2526796_oNapY1&akid=2760%2E2526796%2EoNapY1)**
Thank you for everything you do to sustain our movement.
\- Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220131-2?refcode=em20220131-2760-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=24&refcode2=2760_2526796_oNapY1&akid=2760%2E2526796%2EoNapY1)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220131-2760-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=25&akid=2760%2E2526796%2EoNapY1)**

Peter,

Biden and Harris keep using the great state of Georgia as a punching bag to push their radical voting act, even though we prioritized passing our state's Election Integrity Act immediately after the 2020 election. **_ We passed rulings that not even deep blue states like New York and Delaware have. _**

The speech they delivered in Georgia was filled with false statements and inaccurate information. **Proving once and for all that their visit was nothing more than a liberal power-grab attempt.**

We can’t stand for this, Peter - and we can’t let Georgia go blue **AGAIN** this year. Democrats are flat out **LYING** to you, me, and our fellow Americans - **all for their political gain.**

Unfortunately, we are stuck with this disastrous duo until 2024. **But what we can change is how we hold them accountable._And I’m calling for major accountability, Peter._**

Without the House majority and Pelosi protecting the executive branch at all costs - there’s not much we can do. We must take back the House this year to ensure a functional government that better serves YOU!

Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $3 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=18c4250051514f3e9e12221d13f329a5&_e=_646pOQtTxjcBWEl-d7fupnfT8lBEd1SKDub2o2Il8rKA4dhETzNEkGRvTzOxSkeVCVz64cPhEMD8mP1kG183FT50aBDsznG47qRbkRzNBSyypzoAOZrwzA6e938lQSK5XKv5YzFkzQ3z8ngk2yDKeD81hSUWiUc62WtwaSpNlUnizdvaiWT2zyzzMFIC2hEcNw3v9BNMZ8tCHVcDKiBegxp3eygPnSR1NcTZff-ZYuFEr1chSytvn5RsfP_LbOEjvgwp_EfnVUgcpYKGtADnULIhQSisFF9kEsr1qUJJoEu9EpS2yN-uIkdW5bSx0yDF0fqPj68QLiMbsRP5Q2_9i9GDc-LT5N3V_TgYg8QFLtS_dqTQkCWj91oGNAqL1QASP8l7u-a-MaKiQ2YYaD5vPfY8Ra3raxwWdLjiSY78lMKZzLCOKuSA4HyW7efwZIGgrENSLmJBEiMNRhKGppvXg%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $3 TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=18c4250051514f3e9e12221d13f329a5&_e=_646pOQtTxjcBWEl-d7fupnfT8lBEd1SKDub2o2Il8rKA4dhETzNEkGRvTzOxSkeVCVz64cPhEMD8mP1kG183FT50aBDsznG47qRbkRzNBSyypzoAOZrwzA6e938lQSK5XKv5YzFkzQ3z8ngk2yDKeD81hSUWiUc62WtwaSpNlUnizdvaiWT2zyzzMFIC2hEcNw3v9BNMZ8tCHVcDKiBegxp3eygPnSR1NcTZff-ZYuFEr1chSytvn5RsfP_LbOEmmDuX91I_viasiXhIr1Ny4SmoR0EszE43R5ElPlDMrGYfhlku8zJPUo-jLlS1b2m59i9ZioZGLLOSgbzZeDaiDM90p6zM71kVASZqPKn34HyBKJsBT2jpCCZnJzx07KLN908kr8BkuUgO4q3eJKFAIxkAZWHbVKQXnqnF-qBLVBsbMd__3t3b8Tuj6zU3TZTywxa22z7ssAFNKFDDYQvIw%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=18c4250051514f3e9e12221d13f329a5&_e=_646pOQtTxjcBWEl-d7fupnfT8lBEd1SKDub2o2Il8rKA4dhETzNEkGRvTzOxSkeVCVz64cPhEMD8mP1kG183FT50aBDsznG47qRbkRzNBSyypzoAOZrwzA6e938lQSK5XKv5YzFkzQ3z8ngk2yDKeD81hSUWiUc62WtwaSpNlUnizdvaiWT2zyzzMFIC2hEcNw3v9BNMZ8tCHVcDKiBegxp3eygPnSR1NcTZff-ZYuFEr1chSytvn5RsfP_LbOEVpaOpNXl4ZUkIGhVZwuS_2XvBjmnBDenisJ0YxKEVPr-9_T_A2NhD298haR_nxv-EUOUCfPJ60nhZTf0H3HYRNmKavC-bkGlHE9YTg_5ws3BmnG9zAgOhHQg3X8Uj30mQR0pcKfQ1mYohAO1PRdoSQDFNmuSeA-q0HkKRJEwglMgg_D4oZ88iV6JKZ0xPTd8gdSsSh-PiTZY4lrSLj2r3Q%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Alek Skarlatos

clean_body: A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. body:
I have the most conservative record of every candidate running for Governor, let's nominate a principled conservative! | | | |
---
| | |

| Friends,

**Tomorrow is Caucus Night in Minnesota!**

My record speaks for itself, **I have the MOST conservative record of any candidate running for Governor.** When I was first elected, I promised myself to always stick to my principles, and I've done just that.

You can see those scores and commit to caucus by going to [www.michelle4mn.com/caucus](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=d7fd1f140f&e=9d6926af69)

Many in this race have tried to skew the facts fit their narrative, **but I have consistently held the line and advanced our shared conservative values with a proven record.**

So when we go to caucus tomorrow...

Let's nominate a candidate who is **principled, prepared, and electable.**

Let's make Minnesota **safer, better, and stronger.**

**LET'S MAKE TIM WALZ A ONE-TERM GOVERNOR!**

I ask for your support at precinct caucuses tomorrow night at 7:00PM. You can find your local caucus location by visiting [www.michelle4mn.com/caucus](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=3d55ed07d5&e=9d6926af69)

Blessings,

Michelle Benson

name: Mike DeWine
subject: Sorry China, these are American jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DeWine Husted for Ohio
body:
you may have heard last week how Ohio is on the front lines of the U.S.-China tech fight. China is doing everything it can to take over the global market so they can try to outcompete America. This starts with microchips that power everything from phones, to cars, to home appliances, computers and much more.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=1b79224aa6504495a284ed081a59196c&_t=JXBb8Y3Vx4jBSxSeCZUpZf0uuVSQWug9S2Sc9D0cIl54_PjP73PWCW7WDGDxtDf83HPO5msmNL-Y8HuUW21gdCcI-wr06vzikzMzWfhBZ-Dl5tOPoncZbKZkUmDYAaNwACKYlX-1Wm-wnYetX5ZoNTavBlLUhZO2VMRQWPQnZeFr9iMuj74MSe_fSdrvrh6Vp31768yQOaijO4PdZXReiNwyEoU0rfPrqsS8iEqHi-k%3D)
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=1b79224aa6504495a284ed081a59196c&_e=deJ8P276buJug6NBY1Av37OfOQ2c1gZu82EO5sSJmv-Se-8Xt3AQeCM8nMpFl3Wa0r0KaNp9_ufNKrskOHiqObvWcje9Q9Q3wiiuIsMvlR9DOEh8lL5ZC0Q13nG_iCtjs3grpBYXJUqMy4wwF0Ci3dwRs8JXdVArV4paKTq8VDRItKa7_jMpbF3rRZR8uJ5MZZWfXGt3kbudsXUtW1ww85hI_oqO8c_rfd4lqasyyYR63By4ZCgp-vg6X8GPRCVK-c_5pWvVGhNnv6ya5w0NSNOZNsJ7boVeysK2e2QpLL5vBntUGgdfJ8AY4aayy6ZWrcYeFfrZWoLuJA__kxNbxbifX_gYboNK6hu4Y0HvIUUDqBS8kScFu8vt6JS_Obrd) Peter, you may have heard last week how Ohio is on the front lines of the U.S.-China tech fight.
China is doing everything it can to take over the global market so they can try to outcompete America. This starts with microchips that power everything from phones, to cars, to home appliances, computers and much more.
Right now, 75% of chip manufacturing capacity is in Asian countries, including mainland China, leaving U.S. national security and supply chain vulnerable and forcing American workers to take a backseat.
**That is why I am so committed to bringing manufacturing jobs back to America**.
Lt. Governor Husted and I joined the great American company Intel in announcing that it will bring the world’s largest chip manufacturing operation right here to Ohio! **This is a huge win against China as we bring manufacturing jobs back to America**.
This historic $20 billion investment will bring more than 20,000 good-paying jobs to the buckeye state, not to mention the tremendous impact on so many other Ohio companies in the supply chain.
**Our message to China and the rest of the world?** From now on, essential manufactured products will be made in America.
Ohio won this historic project through smart, conservative policies that lower taxes and create a business-friendly environment. These policies keep winning for Ohio workers and business.
Peter, we are working every day to fight for Ohio workers against a cheating Communist China. We’re just getting started. [**Can we count on your help by chipping in to support our campaign today?**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=1b79224aa6504495a284ed081a59196c&_e=deJ8P276buJug6NBY1Av37OfOQ2c1gZu82EO5sSJmv-Se-8Xt3AQeCM8nMpFl3Wa0r0KaNp9_ufNKrskOHiqObvWcje9Q9Q3wiiuIsMvlR9DOEh8lL5ZC0Q13nG_iCtjs3grpBYXJUqMy4wwF0Ci3d753UdIQFfJba1cSYTVRT93a7yWpdxd7Axb7YhfGlsZxd99y9FFH2isSEJcssLtcoHT0AysrCHvegXSRQokcP_h0F1yQCOX99pqkbYlVvYHK1TrzW5ZtzNZyyIMQEJfkvbFhcrc26w6ysg_zi5gAF10pEYI8WEIx2_BUJO-rsOkQ94-F6TrQqkDo9vJvpq1gBfJLwySy9wiw87ktcuYorfl-CAiZyvAbDY4z8MQr2fB) [DONATE NOW](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=1b79224aa6504495a284ed081a59196c&_e=deJ8P276buJug6NBY1Av37OfOQ2c1gZu82EO5sSJmv-Se-8Xt3AQeCM8nMpFl3Wa0r0KaNp9_ufNKrskOHiqObvWcje9Q9Q3wiiuIsMvlR9DOEh8lL5ZC0Q13nG_iCtjs3grpBYXJUqMy4wwF0Ci3S92sLKLtgLlUmOetcopLaYAZ2k80PR0cdy_Z5-2yxse2FNxKK7pufUPvuVdF0woCyaVyupS0I3Hlb89TklSrL2jO7JnqaJpX0J9bd_VKBLPvFyHdh2GqCzTsxU1b_ZCybLRo9_o5WD794uZ_0GwgepM7HpzvDABMoDVcm1W-BEvUzRPvbx_T3BslJmjMPWXSFHVxXKydHFMi2D3eWuGFSMscl-W8iHLa93vjobh0GHt) Thank you for all that you're doing to help. Let's win!
Sincerely,
**Mike DeWine** Governor of Ohio

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: MIDNIGHT: Respectfully asking for $5 before our end-of-month deadline hits
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:

name: Morgan Harper
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Everyone will judge the strength of our campaign based on how much money we raise during the first month of Election Year.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220131-597-footer-ak&t=2&akid=597%2E90090%2Eh9uo6Y)
Hey, it’s Morgan. I’ll keep this quick and to the point.
**There are just around five hours left before the first major fundraising deadline of our campaign, and right now we’re coming up $2,240 short from our fundraising goal.**
Everyone — our opponents, the media, the nay-sayers — will judge the strength of our campaign based on how much money we raise for our first end-of-month goal in 2022. _It’s that simple_.
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24416?t=3&akid=597%2E90090%2Eh9uo6Y)
So please believe me when I say that meeting our $25,000 fundraising goal before midnight is _just that important._
**According to our records, you haven’t made a contribution to our Election Year fundraising push yet.**
[**I’m humbly asking: Can you please rush a donation of $5 right now so we can close our $2,240 fundraising gap before our January fundraising deadline at midnight tonight? Any amount you’re able to give has a direct and immediate impact on our campaign’s success in the months ahead.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24416?t=4&akid=597%2E90090%2Eh9uo6Y)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24422?refcode=em20220131-597&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=597%2E90090%2Eh9uo6Y)**
Thank you so much for your support thus far. I believe in Ohio and our campaign with all my heart, and I hope you believe in me, too.
With gratitude,
Morgan Harper
P.S. The #1 way to support our campaign in the *future* months ahead is by making a recurring donation in the *present* today. [**If you’re in a place to do so, please commit to a recurring contribution of $5 or another amount to our campaign today.**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/24425?t=24&akid=597%2E90090%2Eh9uo6Y)
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220131-597-footer&t=25&refcode2=597_90090_h9uo6Y&akid=597%2E90090%2Eh9uo6Y)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=597%2E90090%2Eh9uo6Y)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

Peter, the American people know the truth.

The far-left policies of the Biden administration have been an absolute disaster and the November election will be a referendum on his failed policies.

I believe the results of our race in Arkansas will send a message to Washington that we’ve had ENOUGH of their big government, anti-freedom policies. We’re ready to make our country great again, and it starts with our states.

_Right now._

**_It’s our FIRST fundraising deadline of the year (January 31 @ 11:59 PM) and we need to prove our strength now. We are only $6,842 short of our goal. Will you step up to help me meet our goal?_**

Peter, I know this race will be hard-fought.

But I’ve been in a lot of battles, and I believe we will win this one _._ Part of the reason I know we will is because of the incredible grassroots support of patriots like YOU helping me stand strong.

**Now, with our first fundraising deadline of the year fast approaching, I need your help again to show them just how strong our campaign really is!**[**CHIP IN NOW >> **](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=c322f30a557f47399d6f840430f947f8&_e=oIm9cy1jLGWCgjAgfKFV_RBIoRkGBFRsQ-G2ffJODjo50ARbBEcfogfdgiQU2T68WZhnoSR07we4H4YxWd1vGTdgi9dJreFGqo5-vSGXyPI0hMJrYuDSPvqnEVoL3gcMUhFlXQ_Zgtp6m7MsYwjtowdDEADZqP9piN2KIA9Gh2h5ULcTGvM-IrwzqFtkmu-FmG90sX50znga_1G0g5hW71rudwWtj-GnrKhJaxVo6pAeuuOhp45bsW03dd8LRIIgrqLlqilmsj25UmPeUb7gA4LpUydTgEUD54Y8HSMlxI9b9ead99meOFG7XAna5ouNgK7tMkcIq92-3Gws37v85A8TP9S3VqN_SMzxitOY3xv15H9Gaia2PYcHhodOH2oZTcoDg_i8mzF84QMvrwVQ38Qg37MgLOK-0rM-im3BgqQ%3D)

As governor, I will defend our freedoms. I will protect free speech, your Second Amendment rights, and your religious liberty.

I will be standing up for you and against the socialism and tyranny of the Radical Left.

**[JOIN SARAH: MAKE AN END OF MONTH DONATION >> ](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=c322f30a557f47399d6f840430f947f8&_e=oIm9cy1jLGWCgjAgfKFV_RBIoRkGBFRsQ-G2ffJODjo50ARbBEcfogfdgiQU2T68WZhnoSR07we4H4YxWd1vGTdgi9dJreFGqo5-vSGXyPI0hMJrYuDSPvqnEVoL3gcMUhFlXQ_Zgtp6m7MsYwjtowdDEADZqP9piN2KIA9Gh2h5ULcTGvM-IrwzqFtkmu-FmG90sX50znga_1G0g5hW71V47x_BX1KWlcXcFgFy8C88YiNhE2EzxJFIYzpyVAxKOOSCGrv73Gr6jTvekvs-iwPRSlUGKtUYbep_V2Dk82_MilRznz6YGVk5ExLGTufCpPq2VafseKznwpe5nUXEgdzUDEVPBrpGxoHpg6PFEeKkezecosrFgvTMPDRa-17ZuvlaVtt2M08yLus5X2OtHOJ1yBMveORp02EgQigmkeo%3D)**

**I hope you'll join me to make this End-of-Month goal a success and show our opponents we're ready for 2022.**

Thank you for your support,

Sarah Huckabee Sanders

Now, with our first fundraising deadline of the year fast approaching, I need your help again to show them just how strong our campaign really is! As governor, I will defend our freedoms. I will protect free speech, your Second Amendment rights, and your religious liberty. I will be standing up for you and against the socialism and tyranny of the Radical Left. I hope you'll join me to make this End-of-Month goal a success and show our opponents we're ready for 2022. Thank you for your support, Sarah Huckabee Sanders | | | | | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: One last ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We're running about 7% short of our $250,000 goal.
#
With just a few hours to go until our big January fundraising deadline tonight at midnight, we're running about 7% short of our $250,000 goal.
Going up against Greg Abbott and his corporate mega-donors is going to require a lot of resources, so we're emailing one last time to ask for your help:
**[Will you donate $3 or more right now to help hit this critical goal by midnight and power Beto's campaign to be the next governor of Texas?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52148?refcode=ema20220131-174149&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=174149%2E444211%2EXXDsQH)**
**FIRST:** We set a goal to raise $250,000 before Donald Trump took the stage in Conroe, Texas on Saturday to rally support behind Greg Abbott — but after falling short, we extended the deadline until midnight tonight.
**THEN:** This morning, Beto announced a 12-day, 2,100 mile statewide drive across Texas to remember what happened during last February's grid collapse and unite around a brighter future where we keep the lights on.
**NOW:** We need your support to fight back against Trump and Abbott's new fundraising and keep Beto on the road meeting as many folks as possible so he can share our vision.
Together, we can ensure that Beto is able to spread the word about Abbott's failed leadership far and wide. But Beto needs _all_ of our support to make it happen. **[With just a few hours to go, will you please chip in $3 or more to help hit our $250,000 goal?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52148?refcode=ema20220131-174149&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=174149%2E444211%2EXXDsQH)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52148?refcode=ema20220131-174149&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=174149%2E444211%2EXXDsQH)**
In solidarity,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220131-174149-footer&t=22&refcode2=174149_444211_XXDsQH&akid=174149%2E444211%2EXXDsQH)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

When I watch donations come in from across our district and the country, they give me so much hope — because together, we're demonstrating our power. **And I can attest that every single dollar counts.** I don’t need corporations or wealthy donors waiting in the wings to bankroll this campaign — because those in office shouldn’t be beholden to the highest bidders. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. clean_body: | | | This is it, folks. With just a few hours to go before midnight, we’re facing our first big deadline of the Election Year — the year we defeat one of the most dangerous, seditionist Republicans and replace him with real leadership that will fight for everyday people. None of that is possible without your help. The majority of our fundraising comes from emails like this one because we count on grassroots contributions from folks like you to power this campaign. Will you make a donation right now and help grow our movement in the crucial months ahead? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. When I watch donations come in from across our district and the country, they give me so much hope — because together, we're demonstrating our power. And I can attest that every single dollar counts. I don’t need corporations or wealthy donors waiting in the wings to bankroll this campaign — because those in office shouldn’t be beholden to the highest bidders. I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. I’m ready to get to Congress and fight for better public education, Medicare For All, real support for our veterans, and good-paying union jobs. But in order to do that, I need you with me. Together, we'll get it done Bruno | | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

I am the best prepared to defeat Tim Walz [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=c2e20be106044ec884d90cb44d253808&_e=C9gN4PTVTTkzO_xsRUAH56hdLDgVHCph2o_EuKHZ5LFD8yrfGyIq9kLmUQgHcmJv1TNxeWhdOF_GExLqmbcUq52XROVDGO49SBOV2T1yxBzV3kFkU5DEKzEzYO9jCnkS9Iynr6yG0VHge8PiZq7a0MQeliIts-DjnOf3HkQVkBSiXoRMxeA8cBQmTDGjsYy6QdbU-UJHgfRhmvw3GIOHo_PbQjxv9YP8M-VfSSf5fzlUmR34ir8jI-o7F9hlMX36NtbOY5rI6xZNYsaol6nJbQ%3D%3D) My friend, When you go to caucus this Tuesday, you will have a lot of Republicans to choose from, so I am reaching out to you to **let you know why I am the best choice to defeat Tim Walz this November. ** I have been a **successful small business owner** my whole life. I know what it's like to balance a checkbook and keep the doors open _even when times get tough. _ While the field is crowded right now, the Republican who beats Walz also has to lead Minnesota Republicans as we work to advance pro-business, pro-law enforcement, anti-tax policies. As the state Senate majority leader, **I have a PROVEN RECORD of leadership** and even **led****Senate**** ****Republicans****in BACK-TO-BACK victories. ** I have the record that proves I mean what I say. **I****ENDED** the Governor's emergency powers.**I BLOCKED** the Governor and the Department of Education from implementing anti-American history standards this year on a statewide level. **I RESISTED** and fought back against the tremendous pressure to have mask and vaccine mandates, which is why the Senate, under my leadership, never had any mandates. ** ** I know you have a lot of body:
We’re having a pretty terrible month fundraising wise, there is no sugarcoating it. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=dd1f3dc3170e4cfe8003a5b3be204b20&_e=h9QdmeIO_cZs1-bIIEh92nNjesN1kXQrE35mFWrcX1N8Nzm_9yJMNmGiGOSonwTYKAIW0gi_BIoHHRHcf1_rFXd04haD09XTL58Ig4tZaLMGHKu7O-Cb5EOPiMixmAEJLPWhDvf11PknyBPbXrLGYCDGGF0oQEQGvOrNZqrMa4KIt7UD4L2ZyrQY7XBz_aGliP257C1O6robX-LKJpEObGfPq9ifNDNu8rXfejKv5ssfXCXK_yPLz7zfV9LVBbB3ljvYFIPD4HbP2Y3WiaOtxKialqx_KLXGGBCVhAE8ANax3YO_szTQn9dPuJbri7xXZT3Vyh8j50DG9GcAAQF-LK3VM2_mkM-rIKNseYiRXM13OOEeFJE2s4-UIjTJPze_52IN6mkOxpuL10Xg5yN98-M7BPvsl7seIYMtPJAXsSuD9X1oBwg3b_5clNoLTcj8)
---

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=dd1f3dc3170e4cfe8003a5b3be204b20&_e=h9QdmeIO_cZs1-bIIEh92nNjesN1kXQrE35mFWrcX1N8Nzm_9yJMNmGiGOSonwTYKAIW0gi_BIoHHRHcf1_rFXd04haD09XTL58Ig4tZaLMGHKu7O-Cb5EOPiMixmAEJLPWhDvf11PknyBPbXrLGYCDGGF0oQEQGvOrNZqrMa4KIt7UD4L2ZyrQY7XBz_aGliP257C1O6robX-LKJpEObItQu9FYQOEGBdRNiqRXP6DRay_7GFFBd2SSIcUCgQahqgGM5agnRR-LOBEmIfBx68jaSjYy9pHT7o5fnZaMu_nERQeS8ULLzPyzNgIANOY6FPRqa_xwKD5KGb6RoLcM-pdIdq6n0aIlQ-t-qI5wgx3L8cj4s07REyPW8HJ2bOZ6xot7kj8fC9Z9X8nuMRFT_T46e3hbrm1o0QlI-0ortckMVkdhJCM_o-ml76dEqvz7)

Peter,

We’re having a pretty terrible month fundraising wise, there is no sugarcoating it. Without stating the obvious, today is the last day of the month. To you, that might now mean much; for our campaign, it means we have a pressing deadline to reach that we’re not going to without an immediate cash infusion.

The graphic above says it all:**we’ve got six Democrats and one independent vying for the chance to run against me in the general election THIS NOVEMBER**. We’re not picky about which Democrat comes out of their primary. The fact is that whoever eventually becomes the Democrat nominee is going to have to answer for what their party has become: **A progressive cesspool**.

**While I don’t know who our opponent is ultimately going to be, our campaign knows that that they will be well financed – you can count on Nancy Pelosi to take care of that**.

Which is why we cannot afford to have months like the one we’re having now. **[If we can raise $5,000 by midnight tonight, we should be in good shape going into February](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=dd1f3dc3170e4cfe8003a5b3be204b20&_e=h9QdmeIO_cZs1-bIIEh92nNjesN1kXQrE35mFWrcX1N8Nzm_9yJMNmGiGOSonwTYKAIW0gi_BIoHHRHcf1_rFXd04haD09XTL58Ig4tZaLMGHKu7O-Cb5EOPiMixmAEJLPWhDvf11PknyBPbXrLGYCDGGF0oQEQGvOrNZqrMa4KIt7UD4L2ZyrQY7XBz_aGliP257C1O6robX-LKJpEObIw0TXPltTokZXYcGPiJ7_hsdnfguo8qXBVfj5_7lFoiNAS6U_IhiBUckFhNk7fCajUCF2VAmH-SnfGihr3LYFNITywIwcXAB2Udzn0SsYR0PiywnrGedbzuQHCR7cL8wyhnA6hkzITqmZNo-aFjay2ArOAqGPPLVWFFNozyoj1LxBghjNcOcwBwoSFf7My5BkvhNKSDYJuTogIfjWWq_OdrWETenkia4f0C56tsv5Jk)** , but even that is going to be a heavy lift today.

**We’re not asking you for much. This email was sent to around 30,000 active readers; if even just 5,000 of you reading this right now were able to chip in $1, we’d be set**.

clean_body: We’re having a pretty terrible month fundraising wise, there is no sugarcoating it. I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, We’re having a pretty terrible month fundraising wise, there is no sugarcoating it. Without stating the obvious, today is the last day of the month. To you, that might now mean much; for our campaign, it means we have a pressing deadline to reach that we’re not going to without an immediate cash infusion. The graphic above says it all:we’ve got six Democrats and one independent vying for the chance to run against me in the general election THIS NOVEMBER. We’re not picky about which Democrat comes out of their primary. The fact is that whoever eventually becomes the Democrat nominee is going to have to answer for what their party has become: A progressive cesspool. While I don’t know who our opponent is ultimately going to be, our campaign knows that that they will be well financed – you can count on Nancy Pelosi to take care of that. Which is why we cannot afford to have months like the one we’re having now. , but even that is going to be a heavy lift today. We’re not asking you for much. This email was sent to around 30,000 active readers; if even just 5,000 of you reading this right now were able to chip in $1, we’d be set. I’ll let you know tomorrow whether we hit our goal tonight or not.If you can’t send any funds today, please keep us in your thoughts. Thank you for your consideration, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Fellow American,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

clean_body: A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st 2021 marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathan=20Magsig?=
subject: It's time for something new
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGSIG FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our campaign for Congress is making a big adjustment... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2918c2ac72b9/help-build-nathans-momentum-15812482?e=392945c7bc)
---
| | [ ](https://magsigforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=81795a47ebc33d5251101afe9&id=b00773adc2&e=392945c7bc)
---
| | Peter, This morning, I’m excited to announce my candidacy for California’s 5th Congressional District.

The seat, which covers much of California Gold Country and key portions of the San Joaquin Valley, draws into portions of my Fresno County Supervisor district near to my heart. Since I was elected to the Fresno County Board of Supervisors in 2016, I have made it my goal to be a strong voice for the residents of the Sierra foothills and communities on the Valley floor. In 2020, that goal became a mission. Wide swaths of Fresno County foothills were turned to ash in the Creek Fire, at the time the worst wildfire in California’s history. While Gov. Gavin Newsom and Kamala Harris staged photo-ops in the rubble, I spent weeks coordinating with Cal Fire and U.S. Forest Service fire crews to relieve the burden of communicating to my neighbors about rescue operations and whether their homes were still standing. Out of the ashes, I’ve fought harder than ever against the legal tricks utilized by well-funded, far-flung environmental groups to turn every available law and regulation into stumbling blocks to responsibly manage our forests and, in turn, making wildfires deadlier. In recent weeks, I’ve heard from too many residents and neighbors calling for someone in Washington that fully embraces the word “Representative” – not just a strong voice, but a leader who listens to the needs of their neighbors. It’s a tall mountain to climb to be that kind of leader. But in the 5th District, we’re not afraid of a little uphill battle.

**This morning, I released a video to explain why I'm making this move. Take a look:**
---
| [ ](https://magsigforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=81795a47ebc33d5251101afe9&id=43101c0bce&e=392945c7bc)
---
| I did not reach today’s decision lightly. More than a month ago, I announced my candidacy to replace an incredible leader, Rep. Devin Nunes. In the ensuing weeks, it has become clear that the pathway for an all-but-certain June special election for the old 22nd Congressional district means that the winner of the race will serve in Congress for no more than 40 working days. After prayerful reflection and consultation with my family and supporters, our region deserves longer term leadership in Congress. That's why I'm stepping away from the 22nd Congressional District special election.

I’m excited to roll up my sleeves, hit the road, and meet with neighbors across the 5th District to share my vision for restoring local control, keeping our communities and forests safe, and delivering water supplies to the Central Valley.

Will you stand with me and help Team Magsig launch in this new district with big momentum?
---
| [» Chip in $50 «](https://magsigforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=81795a47ebc33d5251101afe9&id=49cb39433c&e=392945c7bc "» Chip in $50 «")
---

**– Nathan**

In 2020, that goal became a mission. Wide swaths of Fresno County foothills were turned to ash in the Creek Fire, at the time the worst wildfire in California’s history. While Gov. Gavin Newsom and Kamala Harris staged photo-ops in the rubble, I spent weeks coordinating with Cal Fire and U.S. Forest Service fire crews to relieve the burden of communicating to my neighbors about rescue operations and whether their homes were still standing. Out of the ashes, I’ve fought harder than ever against the legal tricks utilized by well-funded, far-flung environmental groups to turn every available law and regulation into stumbling blocks to responsibly manage our forests and, in turn, making wildfires deadlier. In recent weeks, I’ve heard from too many residents and neighbors calling for someone in Washington that fully embraces the word “Representative” – not just a strong voice, but a leader who listens to the needs of their neighbors. It’s a tall mountain to climb to be that kind of leader. But in the 5th District, we’re not afraid of a little uphill battle. This morning, I released a video to explain why I'm making this move. Take a look: | | I did not reach today’s decision lightly. More than a month ago, I announced my candidacy to replace an incredible leader, Rep. Devin Nunes. In the ensuing weeks, it has become clear that the pathway for an all-but-certain June special election for the old 22nd Congressional district means that the winner of the race will serve in Congress for no more than 40 working days. After prayerful reflection and consultation with my family and supporters, our region deserves longer term leadership in Congress. That's why I'm stepping away from the 22nd Congressional District special election. I’m excited to roll up my sleeves, hit the road, and meet with neighbors across the 5th District to share my vision for restoring local control, keeping our communities and forests safe, and delivering water supplies to the Central Valley. Will you stand with me and help Team Magsig launch in this new district with big momentum? | "» Chip in $50 «" | "» Chip in $100 «" | "» Chip in $250 «" | "» Chip in $500 «" | Thank you for your support! – Nathan | | | PAID FOR BY MAGSIG FOR CONGRESS | Magsig for Congress5132 N Palm Ave # 227Fresno, CA 93704-2236 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

clean_body: Tonight is our campaign’s first fundraising deadline of the year. | = | We’re just one month into 2022 and Republicans are already doing everything they can to get me out of Congress. I announced my re-election campaign mere weeks ago, and I already have two Republican opponents. Tonight is our campaign’s first fundraising deadline of the year. This is our first chance to show my opponents that our campaign has significant grassroots support — and that they should be worried about taking us on. = | = | = I know why Republicans are so eager to get me out of Congress. After all, I reliably support legislation that will help struggling families and workers, like the Build Back Better Act, the expanded and improved Child Tax Credit, and the federal eviction moratorium. They know that with another term in Congress, I’ll continue to advocate for bills that prioritize real people over private profit. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Gratefully, Sara * | | = Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States | | | ---|---|--- = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

body:
We’re just shy of our January fundraising goal with just hours to close the gap. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f619da637a9c/i-am-running-for-congress-8834153?e=356c0699dd)

| | | Hi there,

We’ll keep this email short and simple: We’re only hours from the end of the month and we’re still just shy of our January fundraising goal.

Mike is working hard meeting with residents and community leaders to listen to the real concerns of folks in the 5th District. He’s focused on fighting for all of us and advocating for the needs of everyday Wisconsinites.

**[While Mike is hard at work for all of us, can you help us close the gap on our end of month fundraising goal by making a contribution of $100, $50, or even just $25 today?](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=73999fc3c7&e=356c0699dd)**

| Anything you can donate really makes a difference and will help to ensure we have the resources we need to win this year.

Thank you so much for your support,

Team Mike Van Someren

Friend,

I’ve reached out to you a couple of times, but this will be my last email for the month of January!

I wanted to use this final opportunity to let you know that you have **_three hours left_** to make a contribution before the End of the Month.

**[Any and all support makes a difference. — _Original message_ — Hi Friend,

I’m writing to you today to ask you to join me in supporting my friend Tom Winter in his campaign. But first, I want to take a moment to tell you how I know Tom will be a fierce advocate for Montana in Congress.

Tom and I served in the legislature together. We were seatmates on the floor of the House, so we got to know each other very well. One of the things I appreciate most about Tom is his willingness to listen. Not only does he listen to his constituents and members of our caucus, but he truly wants to listen to folks on the other side of the aisle and try to achieve outcomes not ideology.

**Respecting our neighbors, taking care of our land and our people, and working together as a community — these are the types of Montana values we need to return to, and I know he’ll take that spirit with him to Washington.**

_**[Tom has let me know that his campaign is facing its first fundraising deadline of the election year TONIGHT. I told Tom I would reach out to his top supporters (like you!) and ask them to help close the $1,403 gap to get to that $10,000 goal — can you make a grassroots donation right away?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yTtiGbGjuBaxUEGTPCIZqpnr5saUBUhznlKjrv480ip6-_8Cjg8st8oXufOyk5XnCEbVbSfMYu-XPwOJfJNQgRB8V2yhh2kQVNk0yQDqwmTrKwMWHoIJJ76Pb4re4COJ627gdTCyB3Ob1SVFGKoBPx-sVSadLzV-R_7m5Qd3dG7YyiAWAUzLDO2cPsOOd-sKW6AtTCKOojaNPLr73iaPWeaOxEpAygZwxOUS_A7Q9hvc5KYQlKtCU43-KTK8jddS_MBQJB8t3GVucdVKWMnGGTHToQYbty3cXopqX1QiBlPaOwC_uvTyNeUuQ7uduxWIE/3j7/bHJafbVZSiWsJ5E9UCdizg/h2/ypMrgMLDfxe8NeMWs4K114zUP8F5Y3IpZTrsw2SfBmU)
**_ | [DONATE NOW >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yTtiGbGjuBaxUEGTPCIZqpnr5saUBUhznlKjrv480ip6-_8Cjg8st8oXufOyk5XnCEbVbSfMYu-XPwOJfJNQgRLq_BX1BYtrNyKyIO1isOYyvpRDi_YrDgVjrLnIapTtfT_2_-XwQCJkaTfMfO0IynI-3W7KIBbUCOrW1tm8c8zZ2wEgbBXNWvyto3OFjjZyGLPakyjLWO2OtlOz2IXFv1-ZTc08C6wAUZudB9eO_YT203VbcRtKHtzm7mPEP2scixzofzXX_c3PmQNzpOuPdqpqZc7-gG-VpV2Mv5Fm2iaGjx3TNSHc7UnP-qmR4-AjY/3j7/bHJafbVZSiWsJ5E9UCdizg/h3/0Y-Gw9fG5gBUxerFKMyVe6Pa6dk85owMMfK2fB4jWDg)
---
When Tom and I served in the legislature, Republicans were doing everything they could to stop Governor Bullock’s agenda. (Sound familiar?!)

So not only did we have to focus on pushing back against the worst of these attacks, but we both cared deeply about trying to create some positive change that _everyone_ should agree on, regardless of which side of the aisle we’re on.
I’ll be honest, we didn’t think issues like indigenous peoples’ voting rights, tackling substance abuse, expanding mental health care, increasing access to broadband internet, or making sure we have clean drinking water would be so polarizing.
**
But the mega-rich who have taken over our state have corrupted our politics — to the point that the far-right cares more about staying in power than making the lives of working people any easier.**

**I am so confident that Tom Winter will be able to fight back against those corrupt forces and return dignity to our state again — but we have to rally behind him!**

_**[So please, add a donation of $5 to help reach this important $10,000 January fundraising goal and send an advocate for our shared values in Tom Winter to Congress!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yTtiGbGjuBaxUEGTPCIZqpnr5saUBUhznlKjrv480ip6-_8Cjg8st8oXufOyk5XnCEbVbSfMYu-XPwOJfJNQgR3MIAjc_cUmGfoUhMuC8LUJXl2ycnw-NWLR4hbFoomXrnbB5oAxWn3D5-ahDvhAYIWllbDmFOsS6IrKc6TFcH14JjaaGPEaGewdNUYfGwwBvymHt2M3LS3R7rmLFhz0D9f9umxthWDKMbL06c6VIdfzoqKjJecxrH56hqiO_-SA5KY4BdzH219wjxJb4vGFERmk3N6aQiHkPNeiS47MLTYhnFY5DwhyioG4POcpsp16g/3j7/bHJafbVZSiWsJ5E9UCdizg/h4/TStccc4tiUYTEzbxsL0NpvxnDgYJHaCZth0DjjsChDU)**_

body:

Fellow American,

I know the media has said this, that, and the other about who I am, where I’m from, and what I stand for. But as always, the fake news media only reports what gets them the most views.

**I am a child of immigrant parents, I’m an Army veteran, and I’ve spent my entire life in law enforcement from being a director in the DEA at home and abroad, to being Sheriff of Maricopa County, Arizona.**

When it comes to the safety and security of my fellow Americans, I don’t play games and neither should you. [**That’s why I need your help to guarantee public safety at the local level, are you with me?**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=def30e5eb4be470d87f21e88f190e9d5&_e=bTShWpHxp26kcYhd3z9VVxAixUjX5c39DXxzQOR1PDmLsjOTgQBzXKN0zwtCgeXlC-XO1-nvPYVp4lAaVMunn6m6-R4lDkETTy5X3u87LeVTiZEsf-LqYjjz__tyCGgNRyZGmh_JXfaZEJu0cSx4OIwVEIb9GvDDxFv8egLTyxXXyKe-J0GrIxmsIp1cqLIAHalUdopdvgWggfo3hzVXTMLKTp1E7L8zfjp_euEMVDdXSaenfs_40_JqMyZJjMokjNpzLU6qT39s9X5GRex1Ha9nAUwW7Ew0fx0rdMrkP0fMndcvr1DaUg_50sbqJDFp5e6TqDOnwIvDnv-gnXLVm4jU8iAuJ5HzL6G3hAuHHIFatlNAGrQ7wrYeXAbOBfny6vPMDAUibiBeFnysjeGqqlPEn7SQlQZVBehPQN6AbzQ%3D)

I know you’ve supported me in the past, and [**that's why I’m asking for your support again. Please pitch in today and help me bring better leadership to a community in need.**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=def30e5eb4be470d87f21e88f190e9d5&_e=bTShWpHxp26kcYhd3z9VVxAixUjX5c39DXxzQOR1PDmLsjOTgQBzXKN0zwtCgeXlC-XO1-nvPYVp4lAaVMunn6m6-R4lDkETTy5X3u87LeVTiZEsf-LqYjjz__tyCGgNRyZGmh_JXfaZEJu0cSx4OIwVEIb9GvDDxFv8egLTyxXXyKe-J0GrIxmsIp1cqLIAHalUdopdvgWggfo3hzVXTHYWG-EMjOX0BlbsuzGNG4LTFu89jNEZlRM--WRd2YMdmYRcQDVIIsOvwrXTp7K2M3oSvJBynpgO1JLwuOoIOI6Jma595Kdxif4uDBUfvwStePBx3C1SRs0MHj9OFnYYUfoMsTlB-ix7XGCSEdvSR9Nbw6s_8-SfRIeg7OeySD0oKU8ytCuj1oITV2FLD4OhjgsuGhXL8ZbCxnZm-5rSZzA%3D)

Neither you nor I want San Francisco politics in our communities, [**so stand with me today**](http://links.joearpaioformayor.com/u/click?_t=276ab81dbdad41a49f491c265baacc02&_m=def30e5eb4be470d87f21e88f190e9d5&_e=bTShWpHxp26kcYhd3z9VVxAixUjX5c39DXxzQOR1PDmLsjOTgQBzXKN0zwtCgeXlC-XO1-nvPYVp4lAaVMunn6m6-R4lDkETTy5X3u87LeVTiZEsf-LqYjjz__tyCGgNRyZGmh_JXfaZEJu0cSx4OIwVEIb9GvDDxFv8egLTyxXXyKe-J0GrIxmsIp1cqLIAHalUdopdvgWggfo3hzVXTDDawL3KPffzMeLQbKHMFy4EPeF4pA9kIP2xqM4nNvFkiuwxxhOLeb4BHLP-3TGIFWGQISeNXngAWeV56QTmV3LCJL2SEfGiZUIzG_vtgDyNs5DVNXvaw0UJgs2n_hIKnB0dtgaU0bIHk3uFTfFQiQvuMNmVMohLWbwy-MtF4scMDSYXYFmigsdG_V7ktVZEFHupEbOqGacIONiwAN1sBck%3D) and let’s make sure we keep fighting for the type of community we all deserve.

**Joe Arpaio**

Fellow American, I know the media has said this, that, and the other about who I am, where I’m from, and what I stand for. But as always, the fake news media only reports what gets them the most views. I am a child of immigrant parents, I’m an Army veteran, and I’ve spent my entire life in law enforcement from being a director in the DEA at home and abroad, to being Sheriff of Maricopa County, Arizona. When it comes to the safety and security of my fellow Americans, I don’t play games and neither should you. I know you’ve supported me in the past, and Neither you nor I want San Francisco politics in our communities, and let’s make sure we keep fighting for the type of community we all deserve. body:
| | | It’s Anthony, Melanie D’Arrigo’s campaign manager.
We’re 6 months out from our primary and just a few hundred dollars short of our January fundraising goals. Before I ask you to help hold this MUST-WIN open seat in the House, I wanted to personally report on the incredible month we’ve had.
* We’ve made **thousands of phone calls and knocked thousands of doors**. Our volunteers aren’t afraid of the cold!
* Thanks to strong fundraising, we hired a **Field Director** to manage our growing volunteer team.
* We raised **big grassroots money** , with an average online donation of just $38.
* We **opened our campaign store** – [get a “Medicare for All” or “Elect Better Democrats” shirt here!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTDmEpBHg0ZY1DKrish82uCdaQdqPjP83HgZmsqBofC3Fqji04mFpqiwamWoP_OT3UUgJwqJh7fmuvx-ZSsDQxz3v_XMr3EEqSlsmJX61ys83ZH0-ln6nORc_9ZF2UwZjR5cZMdBSnsgiUpJ2DOZJYoAovsK8ZpfFIo6fQpcvJdrOn7bTxJcL0CQwX2ny4Xm_6vPlaoRDHYVyFT-aKbQ2XPKT9WwqbHljrfaurZG84qj2lisT-vMvXI50S1iEfMmjIA/3j7/NxKK7mdKR4C8DC6n9MQFSw/h0/jxXzkZirBhsu9ki13IJpeqasvKzVG9q6VUosy-xoENU)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. As Nevada’s first Democratic governor in nearly two decades, I can tell you right now that we need to be prepared to protect the progress we’re making from national, right-wing organizations who are only concerned with flipping this state bright red.
**This tough re-election campaign is heating up, and we’re facing a huge hurdle:** I’ve got 9 GOP opponents lined up, each more radical than the last. They’ve already begun their misinformation campaign, spreading divisive rhetoric and spending $2 million in attack ads against me.
Early money is critical to a successful campaign — and hitting this fundraising goal will signal to my Republican opponents that this grassroots coalition is ready to do whatever it takes to protect our progress and keep Nevada blue.
**That’s why I’m asking for your help: We need to raise the remaining $241 for January before the clock strikes midnight tonight.**
**[We’re so close to reaching this goal, and if everyone who reads this email chips in $5 we’ll hit the deadline just in time. clean_body: | | | | | Hi there, My end-of-month fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, and it’s important that I reach out to you in the time we have left. This fundraising deadline is the first of many challenges this campaign is taking on. I want to talk to you about what lies ahead, but first, | | | As Nevada’s first Democratic governor in nearly two decades, I can tell you right now that we need to be prepared to protect the progress we’re making from national, right-wing organizations who are only concerned with flipping this state bright red. This tough re-election campaign is heating up, and we’re facing a huge hurdle: I’ve got 9 GOP opponents lined up, each more radical than the last. They’ve already begun their misinformation campaign, spreading divisive rhetoric and spending $2 million in attack ads against me. Early money is critical to a successful campaign — and hitting this fundraising goal will signal to my Republican opponents that this grassroots coalition is ready to do whatever it takes to protect our progress and keep Nevada blue. That’s why I’m asking for your help: We need to raise the remaining $241 for January before the clock strikes midnight tonight. | | | | | | | | | | | | With your help, we can keep Nevada blue in 2022 and beyond. Thank you for your support, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: The Deadline Ends Tonight!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, the deadline ends tonight at midnight! Are you able to rush a donation and help chip in?
Hi Peter,I need your help. We are close to hitting our goal but we are not quite there yet.****[**If you are able, can you help us hit our goal before midnight tonight?**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijhltt-idtjvlhlh-r/)**We need to win back the House so we can pass legislation that lowers taxes, restores public safety, and reverses Joe Biden's failed policies. We need to fix the damage that the Democrats' one-party rule has done to our country, but we cannot do so without a sizable majority in the House. **[**Help us fight back against the far left by donating before midnight tonight! Our grassroots efforts count on patriots such as yourself to help spread our message.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijhltt-idtjvlhlh-y/) With a little over 9 months until the election, we must be prepared for anything they will throw at us. Thank you,Bryan
**--
Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijhltt-idtjvlhlh-j/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijhltt-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijhltt-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zijhltt-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zijhltt-l-k) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

* * *
**Wausau “Are You Better Off?” Roundtable**
Area community members, including small business owners, parents, and law enforcement officers, joined Congressman Tom Tiffany and WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow for a roundtable highlighting how Joe Biden’s policies have made Wisconsinites worse off over the past year.
**Washington County Pints and Politics**
A packed house heard from candidates running for local office at Washington County Republicans’ Pints and Politics event!
**Marathon County Candidate Meet-and-Greet**
Marathon County Republicans heard from statewide candidates, including Senator Johnson, on their vision for Wisconsin in 2022 and beyond.
**Door County Caucus**
Door County conservatives were joined by Congressman Mike Gallagher, WisGOP Chairman Paul Farrow, Senator Andre Jacque, and Representative Joel Kitchens at their annual County Caucus!
**Tomah Gun Show**
Monroe County Republicans, Third Congressional District Candidate Derrick Van Orden, and area elected officials met with gun enthusiasts, signed up new members, and sold Lincoln Day Dinner tickets at the Tomah Gun Show.
**La Crosse County Caucus**
Third Congressional District Candidate Derrick Van Orden addressed La Crosse County conservatives at their County Caucus.
**Washington County Poll Worker Workshop**
Poll workers are the first line of defense for election integrity! Washington County patriots were trained in the nuts and bolts of serving as a poll worker in their local communities.
**Calumet County Caucus**
Calumet County Republicans held their annual County Caucus and heard from Senator Ron Johnson!
**Rock County Door-Knocking**
Rock County Republicans braved the cold to connect with voters in support of local school board candidates!
**Winnebago County Caucus**
Winnebago County conservatives gathered for their annual County Caucus ahead of the WisGOP State Convention!
* * *
### Don’t miss the next big event in your community! Visit our website [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3W9XFAkFywiSe_gHG6hiCtA&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_1_31_22_v1&n=27) to stay up-to-date on the newest opportunities, or sign up to volunteer [here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=VsLgeNFrtuHusRivV19v3aCXxtdEYxug7BpyM8N6AZw&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_1_31_22_v1&n=28).
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_1_31_22_v1&n=29) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_1_31_22_v1&n=30) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_1_31_22_v1&n=31) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=roundup_1_31_22_v1&n=32)
