name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Impeach Biden NOW!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "Impeach") Peter, Every day that goes by is another day that Joe Biden is taking orders from the Jihad Squad and kowtowing to China. His actions are destroying our nation and pushing us closer and closer to full-tilt socialism. **I wish this was just hyperbole, but it 's our unfortunate reality, and that's why I'm continuing my efforts to impeach Joe Biden this year.** Just look at what he's done to our great nation in the last 12 months:
* Caused everything from gas, food, clothes, and anything else you buy to exponentially increase in price.
* Encouraged a national crime wave
* Pushed for more mandates
* Empowered Dr. Anthony Fauci to continue perpetuating lies and hysteria
* Implemented woke military policies that have servicemembers being taught CRT instead of combat-readiness,
* Botched the Afghan withdrawal
* Allowed our nation's border to be overrun by 2,000,000 illegals and now Homeland Security cannot account for at least 50,000 of them
* Failed to hold China accountable, and
* Now he's pushing us into a war with Russia.

Worst of all, if you question him, he'll call you a **" stupid son of a bitch!"** Does that sound like the man we want in the White House? [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "Biden")**[Fight for AMERICA: Join me and donate $25, $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY? We can't waste a single moment in taking our nation back.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "Fight for AMERICA: Join me and donate $25, $50, $100, or even $1,000
TODAY? We can’t waste a single moment in taking our nation back.")** Everything Biden does is intended to appease the radical left and hide his racist past, so he accuses conservatives of being a "racist" in hopes of bullying us into supporting legislation **As kids often say, "it takes one to know one."** Biden is so deranged that he refuses to demand we use voter ID laws when voting, but he's already questioning the results of the 2022 Election--10 months in advance. **[Will you partner with me and donate $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY? We can't waste a single moment in taking back our nation!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "Will you partner with me and donate $50,
$100, or even $1,000 TODAY? We can’t waste a single moment in taking back our nation!")** If you love this nation as much as I do, then I'm sure I don't have to convince you of the importance of impeaching Joe Biden. Unfortunately, the media is still covering up his mistakes and malfeasance. He's being protected so much by the media that he even gave a speech recently where he touted his "accomplishments" but then blamed Republicans for not allowing him to do more. **On what planet does he think rising crime rates, milk prices, gas prices and failing to stop a border invasion would qualify as accomplishments?** We must impeach and remove Biden now before he does MORE damage to our country with his "accomplishments." **[We must hold Biden accountable for his crimes against our nation and impeach him. If you support my efforts then please help me with your donation of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "We must hold Biden accountable for his crimes
against our nation and impeach him. If you support my efforts then please help me with your donation of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!")** Now that he's got the opportunity to fill a seat on the Supreme Court, he'll only select someone whom AOC and the Jihad Squad endorse based on the color of their skin, not the content of their character. He continues to turn a blind eye when his son Hunter uses the White House to enrich himself from selling artwork--something the Biden White House has flagged as a major method of international money laundering. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "Headline")Joe Biden has made America a more corrupt, more expensive, and dangerous place to live, work and pray. The American people are ready for a change, but corrupt Joe Biden won't go away without putting up one heck of a fight. **_We need to be prepared._** **[Act now before Biden and his criminal family continue to ENRICH themselves while America is destroyed by radical socialist policies and our children's future is sold to the communist Chinese government.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "Act now before Biden and his criminal family continue to ENRICH themselves while America is destroyed by radical socialist policies and our
children’s future is sold to the communist Chinese government.")** Corruption is nothing new to Joe Biden and neither is breaking the rules to get his way. His actions are so dangerous to the future of our great republic that we must remove him before he does any more damage. I am fighting for you in Congress, and I need your help to ensure we can stop the criminal Biden enterprise before it's too late. **[Join me!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "Join me!")** God Bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "Marjorie
Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) | | [IMPEACH BIDEN](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/59411271:6RMJMcEUN:m:1:3103520637:926BC7E3BCDD50BAF81A71081A353950:r "IMPEACH BIDEN")
---

| At midnight tonight, my campaign will reach its End-of-Month fundraising deadline!

I cannot thank you enough for following my campaign this far. Your continued support is what helps our Conservative movement stand strong against the failed leadership of MLG.

Her radical Left policies have only proven to have abandoned our communities here in New Mexico. Our economy, education, and borders all need rescuing!

We are one month closer to the midterm elections, and our Conservative movement is listening to __**you, We The People.**__ Together we will help secure freedom for our children and grandchildren. Your generous donation will make that happen.

**Before midnight tonight** , please [_**make a donation of any amount**_](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=fe0fc3f584&e=102b599530) to my campaign:

name: Bianca for Texas Senate
subject: FireBrand Grassroot Activist Bianca Gracia TX Senate 11 Fights Like a Flynn
body:
Hello, Patriots! We had a successful weekend here in District 11 on my campaign trail with General Michael Flynn and Barefoot Defender, Sutherland Sp
| |

[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=600496.2608.1.d0f6c8c79724089d712e177928bfdd64) |
---
# Hello, Patriots!
---
We had a successful weekend here in District 11 on my campaign trail with General Michael Flynn and Barefoot Defender, Sutherland Springs Hero, Stephen Willeford. First, we had breakfast with law enforcement, The Thin Blue Line L.E.M.C., at Pappa Yolks followed by lunch with veteran's at Andy's BBQ in Pasadena. We ended our evening with an intimate, private fundraiser with small business owners in La Porte, Tx. hosted by Kelly Davis, Owner of Skin Essentials Luxury Med Spa. I was honored by a special appearance from Veterans for America First and the Take America Back Tour Bus. A special thanks to my church, Voice of Healing, and Pastor Michael Petro for coordinating my campaign volunteer team! I also want to thank my family and friends and all who attended in show of support. All day we spent time listening to the concerns of the citizens of our district. The challenges they have had over the last two years and the challenges they are facing today due to the broken policies by spineless politicians that are not fighting for them. I have pledged to defend and protect our law enforcement and veterans. I will always stand with the small business owners of Texas. They are the backbone of America! I vowed to never let the government come after our, Faith, Family, or Freedoms. I will stand for Border Security, Election Integrity, and against Medical Tyranny. Patriots, let me tell you, General Flynn delivered a fiery speech motivating volunteers to activate throughout our district to elect Bianca Gracia and help Save Texas and America!
---
| | [ DONATE NOW TO ELECT BIANCA for TX Senate District 11 ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/223571?id=600496.2609.1.15654dea45a6fc0e71ec2079871ff985)
---
I am asking for your support and donations to help me in my campaign and I want to earn your vote.

name: Fitzgerald Finance Team
subject: Urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Please act before midnight! name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: One Last Push!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement

>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq
# Dear Hoosier,

It's hard to believe we're already through January! With your help, this campaign will be well on its way to the primary challenge and onto an amazing general election. We are looking forward to representing the State of Indiana and all Hoosiers. It's time for a difference and I'm ready to bring it!

**Today's the last day to show your support for this campaign in our goal to make it to the primaries! After touring 71 Indiana counties and hosting 39 free public town halls, we want this movement to continue. After all, Hoosiers deserve to have a real voice in the Senate. **

To that end, visit [haneefahkhaaliq.org](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=de99e6d280&e=a49cb82bb3) right now, print, sign, and collect as many more signatures as you can. Then, visit your county voter registration office by 12:00 p.m. (noon) today and have your own petition certified. There's still time. I believe in you. Just follow the easy-to-read instructions from [my website homepage](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=c88bcdbead&e=a49cb82bb3) and share this email with nine (9) friends who can help.

**Finally,[give just $25 to my campaign](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=3a02734dc3&e=a49cb82bb3) now to show your unwavering support.Together, let's make today one of the greatest days in our campaign's history! **

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
2022
---
|
---
---
| On Sunday, January 30, 2022, I held a meet & greet at the Chicory Cafe in South Bend, IN. No speeches...just good tea, coffee, and conversation. Thanks to all who ventured out in the cold to spend a little time with me and sign my petition. Great times!
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=17b43455cb&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
| Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
---
| [ ](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=7aa57cb7db&e=a49cb82bb3)
---
Haneefah Khaaliq for U.S. Senate - Indiana 2022
|
---
|
---
| Want to volunteer? Sign up [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=4e1007ec44&e=a49cb82bb3)!
Share this newsletter [sign-up form](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=4630c6ad7b&e=a49cb82bb3) with friends!
---
|
---
|
### _What Do I Need Besides Your Donation? _
* Your signature! We're working right now to get as many signatures now through the noon of Tuesday, Feb. 1st. You can help us! If you haven't already done so, check your voter registration by clicking [here](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=053d4294b2&e=a49cb82bb3) now. You must be a registered voter in order for your signature to count on my petition.
* Then visit haneefahkhaaliq.org and from the homepage, [download, print, and sign my petition](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=478ac1037c&e=a49cb82bb3). Get others to sign as safely as possible!
* **Once you have the petition(s) signed and you're done collecting as many signatures as possible, here's what needs to happen next: **
* At this point, you must have your own petition certified by 12:00 p.m. noon today (Tuesday, Feb. 1st) at your county voter registration office.
* Make sure your petition(s) has both front/back, the bottom portion is completely filled out (with petition carrier info), and the name of the county is written in the upper right-hand corner.
* Once your petition(s) has been certified at your county voter registration office, send the petition(s) back to us to be received by Feb. 2nd. Overnight your petition(s) to us so we can receive it in time. Mail to: Hoosiers for Haneefah, P.O. Box 2936, Gary, IN 46403. Save your receipt! Reimbursement is brought to you by Hoosiers for Haneefah.
* Locate your county voter registration or courthouse now and make your plan to have your petition(s) certified by 12 p.m. noon today (Tuesday, Feb.1st) and sent back to us.
* **Have questions? Email hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592 now! **
* Check out my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=33a0dc5e36&e=a49cb82bb3) and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=aabfd09647&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $25 now!

Visit haneefahkhaaliq.org for more information.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: North Carolina is stronger because of the contributions of Black Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
In February, we celebrate Black History Month. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41300809/328219639/823540626?refcode=ea.929b7b09-6383-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ms=ea.929b7b09-6383-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjliN2IwOS02MzgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X6VD67EmKKZjnJQwVg6xG6ZvyvB0OlQ3fci4fSJfPD0=&emci=fd131035-d782-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=929b7b09-6383-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, **62 years ago today, a courageous group of young Black men refused to be treated as less than full and equal citizens of this state.** Four students sat down at a segregated lunch counter at the Woolworth’s in Greensboro, NC and refused to leave when they were denied service. By the end of the week, hundreds more students had joined the sit-in in Greensboro, and sit-ins spread to segregated public accommodations nationwide. **The Greensboro sit-ins and the peaceful protests that followed marked some of the most impactful nonviolent activism of the civil rights movement — and Black people in North Carolina led the way.** February is Black History Month, Peter, and I hope you’ll join me in celebrating the contributions Black North Carolinians have made to our state and our country. We are truly a stronger, more inclusive state because of the diversity of our people. **But we still have much work to do to achieve true equality.** Black people still face disparities in health care access, wealth, housing, job opportunities, and so much more — and racism is deeply ingrained in our educational, legal, and health care systems. And the pandemic has only made things worse. There is much work to be done, and it’s work that I remain committed to. I hope to have your support as we look for real solutions to create a fairer, more equitable North Carolina. clean_body: In February, we celebrate Black History Month. | Hi Peter, 62 years ago today, a courageous group of young Black men refused to be treated as less than full and equal citizens of this state. Four students sat down at a segregated lunch counter at the Woolworth’s in Greensboro, NC and refused to leave when they were denied service. By the end of the week, hundreds more students had joined the sit-in in Greensboro, and sit-ins spread to segregated public accommodations nationwide. The Greensboro sit-ins and the peaceful protests that followed marked some of the most impactful nonviolent activism of the civil rights movement — and Black people in North Carolina led the way. February is Black History Month, Peter, and I hope you’ll join me in celebrating the contributions Black North Carolinians have made to our state and our country. We are truly a stronger, more inclusive state because of the diversity of our people. But we still have much work to do to achieve true equality. Black people still face disparities in health care access, wealth, housing, job opportunities, and so much more — and racism is deeply ingrained in our educational, legal, and health care systems. And the pandemic has only made things worse. There is much work to be done, and it’s work that I remain committed to. I hope to have your support as we look for real solutions to create a fairer, more equitable North Carolina. Regards, Roy Cooper = | = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: NEW AD 👀 Bill Lee, Deceiver in Chief
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Hey Peter,

Last night, we heard more deception from Governor Bill Lee during his State of the State address. His ego got the better of him, and he tried to pass off his efforts as proof that Tennesseans are thriving which couldn't be further from the truth.

What he didn't tell you is that we are #1 in medical bankruptcies. We're #1 in rural hospital closures. Our state is at the bottom in poverty. We consistently receive an "F" in education funding. And devastatingly, we are at the bottom in infant mortality.

These are not signs of a thriving state. Bill Lee's rich friends are doing great, but the rest of us are suffering under his corporate-driven agenda that leaves nothing for working-class Tennesseans.

So we are firing back. We've commissioned our first ad of 2022, calling out his deception and using his own words against him. Check it out 👇

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=txN7RVHlmFE [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=txN7RVHlmFE]
We need to run this ad everywhere we can, including putting it on TV to reach as many Tennesseans as possible. But in order to do this, we need to raise $25,000 to fund an effective TV ad campaign.

Can you chip in to help us raise the $25,000 we need to blast this video to the screens of every Tennessean? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
DONATE OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

We are ramping up our efforts to combat Bill Lee and the Republicans' dangerous narrative, but going up against their media machine is a huge challenge. We've got the talent, we just need the funds to make our vision a reality.

After 2022 we'll have a new Governor, and it will be because Tennesseans will have heard a different narrative than the Republican propaganda they've been fed for decades. Countering Republican disinformation is going to take everything we've got — this ad is just the beginning.

Yours in the fight,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Daniel Cool
subject: Volunteer Opportunity - Dr. Carson and John Gibbs
body:
Hello friends,

If you have not heard yet, Dr. Ben Carson will be in Grand Rapids on Monday February 7, 2022, and we need some volunteer help for the main event at the Delta-Plex. The flyer is attached below. If you are interested and available, please email [Dcool@votejohngibbs.com](mailto:Dcool@votejohngibbs.com) and let me know. I will reply with the details about when and where to show up.

Additionally, I also ask that you share this event flyer with friends, family, or anyone that you think might be interested, We want as many people as possible to be able to hear directly from Dr. Carson why he vigorously supports John Gibbs for Congress.

Dan Cool

body:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41303317/328224071/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzU5YWQzZi02NzgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iN0PB0lyAwC9bKw42rFrINNPz40a3C36SYccHpDUxjo=&emci=208dbe85-1583-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9359ad3f-6783-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Yesterday was our first end-of-month deadline of the year. We needed to raise $250,000 online to stay on plan to defeat Chuck Grassley in November.
**I’m happy to report that with the help of over 10,800 generous donors like you, we didn’t just hit our goal, we crushed it! This is how we are going to turn Iowa blue in ‘22.**
Political pundits agree that this race is one of the most important in the entire country. Why? Two reasons: Sen Grassley has morphed into a backseater for McConnell and a Trump-fringe advocate more concerned with evading justice than legislating. Secondly, winning this seat means that Democrats will maintain control of the Senate.
With our slim 50-50 Democratic majority on the line, we must win this election. I’m putting everything I’ve got into criss-crossing the state, meeting with voters, getting nods of approval, and fundraising to reach every Iowan before this November.
If we are going to combat the climate crisis, take on the NRA, stand up to Big Pharma, and prepare Iowa to be the most education-focused, worker-friendly, and environmentally-attuned state in the Midwest, then we need to expand our Democratic majority.
Thank you for pulling through in January. Onward, and upward.
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Ben Stein’s FREE Guide to SurvivingBiden’s Double-Digit Inflation
body:
It’s bad. Really bad.
_Sponsored message_
URGENT Inflation Alert for Americans Over 60 |
---
| | | **URGENT INFLATION REPORT**
---
| **Americans Over 60 Must Do THIS Now!**
---
| **LOS ANGELES, Calif.** \-- As inflation grips the U.S. many Americans are feeling the pinch.

**Prices of numerous consumer goods have exploded** in just a few weeks. Gasoline is up 56 percent. Beef is up 2.3 percent in just one month. And used car prices are up 30 percent.

**“When serious inflation hits, it hits everyone,”** says Ben Stein.

While you might be able to avoid buying a used car, it’s difficult to avoid buying _gas or electricity_ for your car.

Many Americans are now wondering, _“Just how bad is it?”_

_It’s bad. Really bad._

**Overall inflation is up 5 percent in a year** — the largest increase since 2008 — and the _fastest rate_ of increase since 1982.

If your income hasn’t increased at least 5 percent in the last 12 months, then your money just doesn’t go as far today as it did last year. In other words, **you’re going backwards**. _You’re losing purchasing power._

Wolf Richter (a noted wall street investor) argues that inflation is actually higher than reported. Worse, this lost purchasing power is _**NOT**_ coming back. Richter writes:
---
| “The actual loss of purchasing power of the consumer dollar
is **far worse** than even these very ugly inflation data [...]
And this loss of purchasing power is _permanent_.”
---
| **Unfortunately, inflation will continue for at least the next 2 years unless something unheard of happens.** Biden’s trillions in stimulus money continues to flood the economy, making inflation worse. And the Fed doesn’t plan to raise interest rates until 2023 at the earliest.

**Between now and then, inflation will continue to run HOT** — possibly even _hotter_ than right now. Which means higher prices at the pump, the grocery store, the dealership — anywhere you normally buy goods and services.

**Fortunately, Ben Stein has some suggestions to protect you** from Biden’s runaway inflation. He explains it all in his **NEW report called “Inflation, Debt & Disaster”.**

This report is 100% FREE, and you can [**download it in seconds right here**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zud2p7v9gq6cpu582a5jsehs19hmnpchttkuep9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cth62o36c1h2bs).

**This no-nonsense report to protecting your wealth in retirement** will teach you how to avoid the destructive power of inflation — and possibly even benefit from it.

**Ben Stein knows what he’s talking about.** He’s lived through multiple inflationary periods and wrote extensively about them for the last 45 years. He studied economics at Columbia and Yale, and taught economics at 3 major universities and has written 5 best selling books and hundreds of articles in Barrons, Walls Street Journal, and The American Spectator about inflation.

So don’t wait, **get Ben Stein’s FREE REPORT** to protect your wealth from runaway inflation...
**= > **[**"Inflation, Debt & Disaster?" — Download Ben Stein's Free Report TODAY!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu4c2aqfc34ob2kl9jka1p197h8kdn8iq6v2aqgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cth62o36c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zr04m0v1amufmm7ossb5v4lhssu0q2e33o6kcq78_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cth62o36c1h2bs)
---
| **P.S.** Thanks to Biden, the U.S. is experiencing rapid price increases unlike almost anything in the last 39 years. That’s why it’s so important to **ACT NOW** to preserve your retirement wealth, _especially_ if you’re over 60. Click the link above to get started immediately.
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z13pcom4avs3apq71o19ro4at5m4dak6ogd4o17g_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1cpjm4ob0cpg649fg)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zabkrvap2m0s2uqi8mjacmulcfa4vts10jerrm30_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onjmhr7fclge5ob6cdkmkq6acj7c6on0tb4sdi71o5i65rr6tlj6goebdhjm6qm0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb2mdijfclkcoq65cr4suobapbi46h22sh2s8i66ob6cth62o36cjh2bs)
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbduofijlnsu03mtd3udpt3t6mhsiqtbetno4o78_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cth62o36cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg1kph2b4b6oef070cl28vu1o3t4b5hpjlt3bcg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cth62o36cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsatd3186sec62lkufffqgtmclg49vvfm4lqhh9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cth62o36cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

# **Friend — Today, we’re launching a series of ads highlighting what we know about where Herschel Walker stands on the issues. **

---
Up first, “everything the Democrats want.” In one of Herschel's first interviews as a U.S. Senate candidate, he said **_“everything the Democrats I want, I guarantee it is what I want.”_** [**See for yourself.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/493da99b04244608/70d4bf77904eb173c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

---
Democrats are the regressive party of inflation, open borders, amnesty and pathways to citizenship, and an election takeover. Everything Democrats want is not everything Gary Black wants. It’s not everything Georgia Republicans want. And it’s something America can afford. **On this, and on other issues, the choice between Herschel and Gary Black — a conservative with trusted experience — is clear.[We hope you’ll share this ad far and wide, and pitch in what you can to help us keep it running.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/493da99b04244608/8dca3bc35d0f5d12c3d6b838967d376c/37793) ** More to come in the days ahead. Team Gary

_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
From Harriet Tubman and Frederick Douglass, to Thurgood Marshall and Elijah Cummings, Black Marylanders have played an outsized role in American history. These legendary sons and daughters of Maryland challenged us to make real the promise of American democracy by fighting for the basic rights and liberties denied to African-Americans.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/BlackHistoryMonth_1200x1200.png]This Black History Month, may we honor their enduring legacies by continuing their work. We must dismantle institutional racism and white supremacy in all its forms. We must confront inequities in education, healthcare, and economic opportunity. We must continue to reform our criminal justice system to restore trust between our law enforcement and communities of color. And we must combat voter suppression by protecting and expanding the right to vote.
Our work is nowhere near finished, so let’s celebrate Black History Month not with platitudes, but with specific, actionable pledges. My vision for the state in the years to come is one of transformative progress for Black Marylanders. Together, we’re going to level the playing field, [https://www.franchot.com/levelplayingfield] and make real the promise of American democracy for all our communities.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

name: Citizens for Turner
subject: Mike Turner named TOP Republican on Intel Committee
body:
| | | | | |
---
| | | | Friends, As the newly appointed top Republican on the House Intelligence Committee, the safety and security of the United States is my top priority.
---
| | | | | [I SUPPORT MIKE!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1010888&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2Fsupport-mike-turner&cf=64880&v=a9bc398e9f07d9ae65eac8dfeb29126d428ae43df52345c5c3fbf5aec4fa5284)
---
| | | | However, Joe Biden is jeopardizing America’s national security and I need your help. So far in the Biden presidency:
* Joe Biden abandoned Americans in Afghanistan when he **surrendered to the Taliban**.
* Due to his loss of intelligence sources in Afghanistan, Joe Biden’s “over the horizon” strategy resulted in an errant **drone strike that killed at least 10 innocent civilians**.
* The White House refused to acknowledge the severe danger in **China’s testing of nuclear capable hypersonic missiles**.
* The Biden Administration expressed no concern over **General Milley’s questionable call to Chinese military officials.**

I am committed to keeping our nation, our service men and women, and our families safe through my work on the Armed Services and Intelligence Committees. I will continue to lead the charge against **irresponsible and dangerous cuts to our military, continue to fight for more funding for our troops**.
---
| | | | | [CHIP IN FOR MIKE HERE!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1010888&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2Fsupport-mike-turner&cf=64880&v=a9bc398e9f07d9ae65eac8dfeb29126d428ae43df52345c5c3fbf5aec4fa5284)
---
| | | | I hope I can count on your continued support. Thank you, Congressman Michael R. Turner
---

name: Rebecca E.
subject: Here’s my story about why I’m an organizer.
body:
Pledge to vote today.

| | Hi Friend, **My name is Rebecca and I’m an organizer with NextGen America.** I was born and raised in New Orleans, Louisiana, but have called Texas my second home for years. Right now, I’m working on the ground in Houston, Texas and at Texas Southern University to help build the largest youth voter mobilization campaign in this state’s history. **Growing up, my mom instilled in me the value of civic engagement and never missed an opportunity to take me along to the polls whenever she cast her ballot.** But it was when my family and I experienced climate disaster firsthand that I realized my calling to help build a government that truly reflects and respects us. After Hurricane Katrina, I saw that those in power, those tasked with making critical decisions to get us out of a devastating crisis, did not look like me and did not serve my community. **From that point forward, my path was clear. I wanted to help people and I chose to do so through political organizing.** **I took my drive to leave this country better than we found it and honed my skills as an organizer while I attended Texas Southern University. ** TSU, the first state university in Houston, was actually started thanks to Black organizers before us. In 1946, when Heman Sweatt was denied admission to the University of Texas School of Law on the basis of race, legal advocates and organizers came together to establish the school we now know as TSU. In March of 1960, the first sit-in in Houston was organized by TSU students. **Since then, TSU has had a rich history of empowering a generation of trailblazing Black organizers.** **To be a TSU student is to have organizers’ blood run through you.** That’s why I’ve loved coming back to this university to create a true presence for young voters and determine a new direction not only for Texas but for the entire country. **In my day-to-day, I work with local volunteers, register voters on campus, and mobilize TSU students to help shape the next generation of organizers. Today, I have one ask for you.** [**Will you take two minutes today to pledge to vote in the 2022 midterm elections?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41309503/328247160/931035740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTgxYjRhMC02ZjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6iaRQEKkAQxQp8Ojtui08LwYjXahq9fXWr7vtL_3us=&emci=a99d05b3-f682-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8181b4a0-6f83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6787172) | [Pledge to vote](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41309504/328247166/-635048201?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTgxYjRhMC02ZjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6iaRQEKkAQxQp8Ojtui08LwYjXahq9fXWr7vtL_3us=&emci=a99d05b3-f682-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8181b4a0-6f83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")
---
**I’ve always viewed organizing as an act of love and an act of sacrifice**. It’s the ultimate exercise of listening so that others have the opportunity to be seen and heard.
A pledge to vote tells us that you’re with us as we build a better government. Within this pledge, you’ll also have the opportunity to tell us what issues you care about.
**We want to know why you vote and embolden that reason, so you can find your voice in our democracy.**
Thanks for being with us,
Rebecca E.
Organizer in States - Texas
NextGen America
| **NextGen America**
268 Bush St. #2919
San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/a99d05b3-f682-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/8181b4a0-6f83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTgxYjRhMC02ZjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x6iaRQEKkAQxQp8Ojtui08LwYjXahq9fXWr7vtL_3us=&id=109799863)

| Team: thanks to generous supporters like you, we were able to hit last night’s incredible mid-month goal!

We just wanted to say thank you – and to let you know how we will use this momentum to build a stronger democracy.

DASS is dedicated to protecting voting rights, expanding ballot access to all eligible Americans, and electing Democratic Secretaries of State who will stand up for our most fundamental rights.

**But your input is crucial to informing how to direct these resources, and how we can make the most difference in your communities and nation-wide.**

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsjngp7HlN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osjngp7HlN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

You are
an informed citizen-I believe that wholeheartedly.

You love
this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S.
Constitution says and what it means, and you aren't afraid to
stand up for America's founding and the principles of liberty
that define our nation.

Your
leadership and knowledge are needed today…

Do you
believe the American education system is failing millions of
young Americans?
YES
NO

We need
more citizens like you-informed citizens-because America is at a
turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold
thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the
Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism.

The
country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore
knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We
can't let that happen!

That's
why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of
Hillsdale College and our new, nationwide initiative-the CAMPAIGN
FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

We are
the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and
teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal
of this new campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable
Americans who understand:

WHAT
the Constitution says
HOW
it relates to current issues and events
WHY
the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to
liberty

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people,
that our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" deliberately deceived or who just
haven't learned about a proper understanding of American history
in school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we
must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer
support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student
grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you
who want what's best for the country.

So
please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on
the State of American Education today at the link below. Thank
you for reading my email!

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/

For our
children,

Bill Gray
Class of
2001
Associate
Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41313471/328261026/-345653746?refcode=20220201_BHM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDE1ZWY2MC03NTgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0FhEtUbgHwPW8cp1zm-csmSWBYaH549mIvlDtI3QCw=)
---

Folks,

Today marks the beginning of Black History Month. In Florida, we have much to recognize and celebrate.

This February, we have an opportunity to lift up the many contributions that Black Americans have made to our nation, and our Sunshine State. And, as allies, we rededicate ourselves to the fight for justice and equality year round.

Our campaign plans to spend this month highlighting, remembering and celebrating Black history – so that we both honor the legacy of those that came before us, and do our part to ensure that it is never erased.

Leaders like Harry T. and Harriette Moore, Dr. Mary McCleod Bethune, and A. Philip Randolph were fearless in their fight for freedom. We remember their sacrifices, their obstacles, and their triumphs.

Our campaign to build a Florida that works for all Floridians takes pride in helping in our own small way, to make this month a special one for everyone, especially our Black sisters and brothers.

Thank you,

Charlie Crist

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---
Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg, FL 33731
United States

| Friend,
Tonight, I'll be meeting with the Henry County GOP to continue spreading my message to Georgians that I am THE America First candidate for Congress in GA-10.
If you can make it, stop by 199 Turner Street, McDonough, GA 30253 on February 1 at 7:00pm to hear my message of bringing bold, Republican, America First leadership to Congress. Hope to see you there!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_4e_xXDlfwrGTFALrFBbyNUi4MsT_Hvqu10dT6pGX18pTUJGSZ9BSmqjfx-oDRNq8uHl7ol4LSd5yjT7fglc30NafbiUdfJroyYuCUl0NjVz8_ru0UZlH-xkO7ZDGcik8M8OvyuheAG4NIlovwpqng==&c=qdAYA56KstdOrcOKBxpx82UlZ3nRLycQwK3looXWB66RVcghcnaWvw==&ch=hYWN7fOknZX_jMQl8YN2XrOw3s7E5FL76Gf4rlbOhZDcX8W6OSS18A==)
---
| Momentum is building on the ground to elect a fighter here in GA-10. Continuing to spread our message to folks on the ground is how we're going to win big in 2022 and deliver a victory for Georgians and Americans.
So come by and learn more about our mission!
---
| Thank you, Patrick Witt

By all accounts, someone like me shouldn’t be here. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41314475/328265115/1002998528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYxNWYwMi03ODgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrcKdQhFl75QYNYAZn5uM7TnebrIrZkSbyfmU7BYWxU=&emci=b63a1d21-2583-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fbf15f02-7883-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=12740612) | **Hi, team.** **It’s a very special day: the beginning of Black History Month, 2022. Today, I’m reflecting on what it means to me to run for Governor as a Black man born and raised in Memphis, Tennessee. ** **By all accounts, someone like me shouldn’t be here. Someone whose father grew up poor and became a sharecropper. Someone whose mother grew up in the housing projects of Memphis, Tennessee in the poorest zipcode in the state . Oftentimes, it’s too hard for people like us to overcome the barriers society places in front of us. But I did overcome. How?** **Because m****y parents instilled in me the drive to work hard to help myself and others around me. It’s why I went to law school. It’s why I spent so much time talking to people around the state about developing leaders in our communities. And it’s why I ran for office and won my seat on the Memphis City Council.**
* * *
**[I’m running for Governor of Tennessee because I believe we can do better. It’s time we replaced the failure Bill Lee and elect a Black man who will actually do the work this state needs. Will you support my historic campaign with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41314477/328265117/-1144155565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYxNWYwMi03ODgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrcKdQhFl75QYNYAZn5uM7TnebrIrZkSbyfmU7BYWxU=) ** **I’ve spent my time as a City Councilmember advocating for changes that make society more equitable. I’ve demanded accountability for instances of police brutality. I’ve pushed to make the justice system more just. But the issues we face here in Memphis are happening all over the state, and they’re systemic. They can’t be solved by a piecemeal approach. We need to tackle it all at once. ** **Running for Governor means making a commitment to people all over this state, people who are just like me and my family. It means putting my faith in a better future for Tennessee, where we have an honest, competent, and transparent government. It means believing in a standard of governance higher than the disasters Bill Lee has created since he woke up one day and decided to get into politics with zero experience. ** ****
* * *
**I’ll be honest: we deserve better than what we’re getting from him. Bill Lee has let us down, time after time. But I’m ready to be the change that Tennesseans want and need. I’m ready to see a Blue wave take over the state this November. And I’m ready to make history as the first Black governor of Tennessee. ** [**But I can’t do it alone. I’m counting on supporters like you to help me out by chipping in today. I want to get a head start on my goal of 300 donations this month. Will you be one of those donors and contribute to my campaign? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41314479/328265119/-1144155565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmYxNWYwMi03ODgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrcKdQhFl75QYNYAZn5uM7TnebrIrZkSbyfmU7BYWxU=) **Peace and Blessings,** **JB**

clean_body: By all accounts, someone like me shouldn’t be here. | | Hi, team. It’s a very special day: the beginning of Black History Month, 2022. Today, I’m reflecting on what it means to me to run for Governor as a Black man born and raised in Memphis, Tennessee. By all accounts, someone like me shouldn’t be here. Someone whose father grew up poor and became a sharecropper. Someone whose mother grew up in the housing projects of Memphis, Tennessee in the poorest zipcode in the state . Oftentimes, it’s too hard for people like us to overcome the barriers society places in front of us. But I did overcome. How? Because my parents instilled in me the drive to work hard to help myself and others around me. It’s why I went to law school. It’s why I spent so much time talking to people around the state about developing leaders in our communities. And it’s why I ran for office and won my seat on the Memphis City Council. = I’ve spent my time as a City Councilmember advocating for changes that make society more equitable. I’ve demanded accountability for instances of police brutality. I’ve pushed to make the justice system more just. But the issues we face here in Memphis are happening all over the state, and they’re systemic. They can’t be solved by a piecemeal approach. We need to tackle it all at once. Running for Governor means making a commitment to people all over this state, people who are just like me and my family. It means putting my faith in a better future for Tennessee, where we have an honest, competent, and transparent government. It means believing in a standard of governance higher than the disasters Bill Lee has created since he woke up one day and decided to get into politics with zero experience. I’ll be honest: we deserve better than what we’re getting from him. Bill Lee has let us down, time after time. But I’m ready to be the change that Tennesseans want and need. I’m ready to see a Blue wave take over the state this November. And I’m ready to make history as the first Black governor of Tennessee. = Peace and Blessings, JB Democrat JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. It's going to take all us of working together to defeat Bill Lee and elect JB Smiley. Jr., but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request to get only the most important emails or update your contact information . You can also at any time. = JB believes that when we lock arms, put our differences aside, rally around common beliefs, and carry a unified message to every corridor and community, from the rural roads less traveled to the urban centers, we can build a Tennessee to be proud of, together. = | Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley. Julian Bolton, Treasurer Committee to Elect JB Smiley 901 Mississippi Blvd Memphis, TN 38126 United States **

body:

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41314771/328266372/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2NDNiOThjLTc4ODMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZvvoamicFRF0gwQPxuIkY9JZPQ-hHkFb-Jzpjosv3TY=&emci=2a66178b-7083-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=c643b98c-7883-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=16335001) Team

**We've got good news!**

With your help, we were able to meet our January fundraising deadline, and we are on track to building a strong war chest to unseat the Treason Caucus in November's election.

Never Again PAC was created to protect our democracy from tyranny and injustice by holding the most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable for their role in the insurrection on January 6. Your contribution will be used to aid in our research and voter targeting efforts while also helping us support our grassroots accountability projects.

The midterms are almost here, and though extremist Republicans will be spending millions of dollars of dark money, we know that these elections are winnable.

As we begin Black History Month, let us remember the power of mobilization and that true change can only occur when people band together in brotherhood in the spirit of a common cause.

Thank you for your contributions, thank you for your support, and thank you for being part of our team. We're glad to have you on our side.

**[Now, with only 9 months to go to the November elections, will you chip in $5 or even $10 to our movement to help kickstart our February fundraising?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41314772/328266373/-730306332?refcode=em22_220201_JEOMTY_fnd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220201_JEOMTY_fnd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2NDNiOThjLTc4ODMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZvvoamicFRF0gwQPxuIkY9JZPQ-hHkFb-Jzpjosv3TY=)**

Thank you,

Team Never Again

clean_body: With your help, we were able to meet our January fundraising deadline, and we are on track to building a strong war chest to unseat the Treason Caucus in November's election. Team We've got good news! With your help, we were able to meet our January fundraising deadline, and we are on track to building a strong war chest to unseat the Treason Caucus in November's election. Never Again PAC was created to protect our democracy from tyranny and injustice by holding the most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable for their role in the insurrection on January 6. Your contribution will be used to aid in our research and voter targeting efforts while also helping us support our grassroots accountability projects. The midterms are almost here, and though extremist Republicans will be spending millions of dollars of dark money, we know that these elections are winnable. As we begin Black History Month, let us remember the power of mobilization and that true change can only occur when people band together in brotherhood in the spirit of a common cause. Thank you for your contributions, thank you for your support, and thank you for being part of our team. We're glad to have you on our side. = Thank you, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. | = Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: What I said on MSNBC this morning:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
I made an appearance on MSNBC this morning where I talked about how we'll defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) and flip Iowa blue. This win is so crucial for defending Democratic Senate control – but it's also about standing up for our democracy. You see, Sen. Grassley defended former President Trump's attempts to use his DOJ to overturn the 2020 election results, a move that only emboldens extremists. Trump and his extremist allies are so obsessed with holding onto power that they are willing to disenfranchise voters and destroy our democracy to do it.
Hardworking families deserve a senator who’s going to fight to protect our democracy – not spread baseless conspiracy theories and double down on their defense of Trump, like Sen. Grassley. It's no surprise that _only 27%_ of Iowans want to reelect him for an eighth term in the U.S. Senate.

name: Toby Anderson
subject: We must NEVER take freedom for granted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Toby Anderson for Congress Inc
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5ca70e78c0100c23041ad8cde91a9694/38863/a71fc746cb1c9ad4/556d2c00ebd53c0ec3d6b838967d376c/38863)
---
Peter, Today is National Freedom Day – a special occasion to remember just how BLESSED we are to be Americans! The man behind this holiday is Major Richard Roberts Wright Sr., a former slave who went on to become a successful businessman and community leader in Philadelphia. He wanted to establish a holiday when freedom for all Americans is celebrated. He chose February 1st, the day in 1865 when President Abraham Lincoln signed what would become the 13th Amendment, as the date to observe National Freedom Day. And in 1948, President Harry Truman signed a proclamation making it official. Today, let us celebrate the freedoms we enjoy as Americans. Let us remember and honor all those who’ve fought to defend those freedoms. And as we see many of our freedoms under attack like never before, let us renew our commitment to DEFEND AND PROTECT our great nation’s founding principles. Toby AndersonRepublican Candidate for Congress (NJ-11)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Need you tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
can we rely on your support? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f85b7c0f9fa9/need-you-tonight?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

Tonight is the night! Attend your caucus and ensure that the political power brokers don't pick your candidates for you. [Make sure you know your caucus location](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=9d3bae25bc&e=33b11688c1) and show up at 7 PM! Say "I want to be a delegate" and vote in the Straw Poll!

No matter how many times I’m attacked, my vow to you is to have clear eyes and focus on the real target: Tim Walz and the Democrat machine which has robbed us of our rights, let crime explode, bloated our budget, and caused inflation to soar. If we don't win, our kids and grandkids may not have a state worth inheriting. We are the campaign that has raised the money, travelled all over the state, created a groundswell of support, and led on the [issues](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=5df9148810&e=33b11688c1) which will defeat Tim Walz.

Even last night, we were invigorating new people who want to join our tent with one final rally before caucuses. Check it out:
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=982cafcea7&e=33b11688c1)
---
| Peter, I hope I've earned your support tonight. We have created a movement which will make history in Minnesota and I want you to be part of it. Please show up, stand up, and [become a "Jensen" delegate](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=cdf116bc1e&e=33b11688c1).

Let us together have a positive, future-oriented vision which will change the course of Minnesota! It is the only way to broaden our Republican base and win independent voters in November. The stakes are too high to pick a candidate who can't beat Tim Walz.

Please do not hesitate to reach out with any questions at [**Info@DrScottJensen.com**](mailto:Info@DrScottJensen.com)! Be there at 7 PM tonight! We absolutely need you.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota

subject: Thank you for being a part of history with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Thanks to supporters like you, in the past month alone, we’ve raised over $500k – making January our best fundraising month of all time.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41319512/328283297/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220201-b1_fr_actives-NM_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220201-b1_fr_actives-NM_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220201&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_actives&&&&utm_term=NM_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=bab3d77c-8283-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWIzZDc3Yy04MjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=114b0oFbUuC7wdMmnujZIeHn1YVZZjat4azrrjAQCKs=)
---
| Hi, Peter. Natasha here — John King’s finance director. I wanted to take this moment to thank you all personally for your support. Thanks to supporters like you, in the past month alone, we’ve raised over $500k — making January our best fundraising month of all time. The energy fueling this campaign is truly at an all time high, and I could not be more optimistic about the future of this campaign and all that we will accomplish going forward. As we head into this new month — a month that is particularly meaningful to myself and all of us on Team King — I wanted to take a moment to share a bit about why this race is so personal to me. In this time of deep systemic inequality, now more than ever we need inspiring and hopeful candidates representing us in the governor's mansion. John is a rare candidate who not only understands how critical the need is for diverse leadership at this moment, but he has the lived experiences to transform Maryland into a more equitable state for all of us. In the coming weeks, John, the team and I look forward to sharing more about what this month means to us and the significance it raises as we have the historic opportunity to elect Maryland’s first Black governor. Until then, thank you again for all that you do as a crucial member of this team. Thank you,
Natasha McKenzie
Finance Director - John King for Governor
---

clean_body: Thanks to supporters like you, in the past month alone, we’ve raised over $500k – making January our best fundraising month of all time. | = | Hi, Peter. Natasha here — John King’s finance director. I wanted to take this moment to thank you all personally for your support. Thanks to supporters like you, in the past month alone, we’ve raised over $500k — making January our best fundraising month of all time. The energy fueling this campaign is truly at an all time high, and I could not be more optimistic about the future of this campaign and all that we will accomplish going forward. As we head into this new month — a month that is particularly meaningful to myself and all of us on Team King — I wanted to take a moment to share a bit about why this race is so personal to me. In this time of deep systemic inequality, now more than ever we need inspiring and hopeful candidates representing us in the governor's mansion. John is a rare candidate who not only understands how critical the need is for diverse leadership at this moment, but he has the lived experiences to transform Maryland into a more equitable state for all of us. In the coming weeks, John, the team and I look forward to sharing more about what this month means to us and the significance it raises as we have the historic opportunity to elect Maryland’s first Black governor. Until then, thank you again for all that you do as a crucial member of this team. Thank you, Natasha McKenzie Finance Director - John King for Governor | = * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our _. name: Nan Whaley
subject: We just made Ohio history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
This grassroots team is why I know we can win.

I can’t thank you enough, team. **Yesterday my campaign reported that we raised more than $1.6 million dollars in the latest filing period – _and that’s more than any gubernatorial challenger at this point in the race in the history of the state of Ohio._**
Even more exciting to me: While each of the other candidates in this race has an average donation exceeding $1,000, ours is truly a grassroots movement – and the strength this team demonstrated in this filing period proves that we can win this fight.
Each time we’ve asked this team to step up around a big fundraising goal or deadline, you’ve been right there to help us cross the finish line. Thank you, thank you, thank you.
Not only are we smashing fundraising records, we’ve built out our ticket with the addition of the incredible Cheryl Stephens as my running mate and are hiring new team members across the state. We have a surge of momentum on our side. We need to keep it going from now until Election Day.
I’m grateful for your support. Together, we’re going to win this election, clean up the corruption in Columbus, and carry the voices of Ohioans from all over the state to the governor’s office.
Onward,
Nan

Team,

Great news: Thanks to the contributions from this grassroots team we met our January end-of-month fundraising goal!

Every dollar we raise goes to work right away building the campaign infrastructure we’ll need to win in November. And with Republicans and their dark money backers working overtime to flip this seat from blue to red, the stakes of our race have never been higher.

November may seem far away now, but the journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step, and we know that our incredible team can make this journey together.

Thank you,

Team Tom

**[P.S. If you missed the chance to chip in last month, can you give $2 to the race for AZ-02 today? clean_body: Team, we have some great news. = Team, Great news: Thanks to the contributions from this grassroots team we met our January end-of-month fundraising goal! Every dollar we raise goes to work right away building the campaign infrastructure we’ll need to win in November. And with Republicans and their dark money backers working overtime to flip this seat from blue to red, the stakes of our race have never been higher. November may seem far away now, but the journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step, and we know that our incredible team can make this journey together. Thank you, Team Tom = **Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today. = | ****=****** | To learn more, please visit | Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran PO Box 63992 Phoenix, AZ 85082 United States

name: #teamMia Volunteers
subject: ICYMI! Campaign Relaunch & February Kickoff!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973
body:
Dear Peter,
As we enter February there is much to celebrate and I want to take the time to highlight these events!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/news_bhm.jpg]First off we have Black History Month!
This February we are celebrating the inventors, the actresses, the musicians, the athletes, the scientists, the lawyers, and elected officials, who were often some of the first black people in their positions. This month we are celebrating the culture that has been created from the music to the food. We are taking the time to honor the trailblazers in the black community who’ve paved the way for generations to come as we reflect on the long fight to get to where we are today and the fight that continues.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/lunar%20new%20year.png]Happy Lunar New Year!
We are lucky enough to have such a diverse community with so many cultures here in the East Bay! So let’s celebrate the year of the tiger with the Asian community and usher in a new year full of good energy and unity.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/reelection.jpg]Lastly, I have some exciting campaign updates, in case you missed it, I am running for re-election this year! It’s been only one year and I’m just getting started and I’m ready to put in the work to stay in Sacramento and focus on AD-18’s most pressing matters. The campaign has started off strong with an endorsement from Gov. Newsom and Senator Padilla! It is an honor to be supported by our incredible leaders and I am proud to have their support. As the campaign builds momentum can you take the time today to chip [https://secure.ngpvan.com/z60hl9BMYEaQSE1V-EQ9PA2] in $2, $22, $222, or whatever you can, a little goes a long way and any amount is greatly appreciated. Be on the lookout for campaign updates and be sure to follow my social media to stay connected!
Mia Bonta
#Mia2022 #MiaBontaforAssembly2022 #themovementcontinues

clean_body: Dear Peter, As we enter February there is much to celebrate and I want to take the time to highlight these events! [ off we have Black History Month! This February we are celebrating the inventors, the actresses, the musicians, the athletes, the scientists, the lawyers, and elected officials, who were often some of the first black people in their positions. This month we are celebrating the culture that has been created from the music to the food. We are taking the time to honor the trailblazers in the black community who’ve paved the way for generations to come as we reflect on the long fight to get to where we are today and the fight that continues. [ Lunar New Year! We are lucky enough to have such a diverse community with so many cultures here in the East Bay! So let’s celebrate the year of the tiger with the Asian community and usher in a new year full of good energy and unity. [, I have some exciting campaign updates, in case you missed it, I am running for re-election this year! It’s been only one year and I’m just getting started and I’m ready to put in the work to stay in Sacramento and focus on AD-18’s most pressing matters. The campaign has started off strong with an endorsement from Gov. Newsom and Senator Padilla! It is an honor to be supported by our incredible leaders and I am proud to have their support. As the campaign builds momentum can you take the time today to chip [] in $2, $22, $222, or whatever you can, a little goes a long way and any amount is greatly appreciated. Be on the lookout for campaign updates and be sure to follow my social media to stay connected! Mia Bonta #Mia2022 #MiaBontaforAssembly2022 #themovementcontinues Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2022, FPPC# 1437973 1241 High St, Oakland, CA 94601 | 415-891-9751 | volunteer@miabonta.com [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Before I ran for Congress the first time, Cuellar sided with Donald Trump on nearly 70% of his votes. **His campaign was,_and still is_ , bankrolled by the Koch network, the private prison industry, and big corporate PACs.** And just recently, the FBI raided Henry Cuellar’s mansion and campaign office, even seizing his property, as part of a court-ordered investigation by the federal agency tasked with corruption and bribery cases. Cuellar refuses to say why he is involved and says he’s committed as ever to winning this race. I believe South Texas deserves a transparent representative who is focused on serving the District, not someone under FBI investigation who is more interested in serving corrupt Washington interests. Even though we were heavily outspent in the last election, we lost by only 2,746 votes – just 3% of the vote. Texas’s 28th District is what some people call a “blue seat.” But our representative, Henry Cuellar, hasn’t acted like a Democrat in Congress. clean_body: We need all hands on deck. | | | It’s official: we’re just one month away from the TX-28 Democratic Primary. For those of you who haven’t met me yet, I’m Jessica Cisneros. I’m the proud daughter of Mexican immigrants, a lifelong Texan, and a human rights lawyer running to defeat one of the most right-wing Democrats in Congress, Henry Cuellar. For far too long, Henry Cuellar has put special interests before his own constituents. Before I ran for Congress the first time, Cuellar sided with Donald Trump on nearly 70% of his votes. His campaign was,and still is , bankrolled by the Koch network, the private prison industry, and big corporate PACs. And just recently, the FBI raided Henry Cuellar’s mansion and campaign office, even seizing his property, as part of a court-ordered investigation by the federal agency tasked with corruption and bribery cases. Cuellar refuses to say why he is involved and says he’s committed as ever to winning this race. I believe South Texas deserves a transparent representative who is focused on serving the District, not someone under FBI investigation who is more interested in serving corrupt Washington interests. Even though we were heavily outspent in the last election, we lost by only 2,746 votes – just 3% of the vote. We came so close because we built a big, diverse, inclusive grassroots movement in South Texas. This time, we’re going to win if we can build on that momentum. But I need your help as we get closer to the primary. This campaign is about much more than defeating Cuellar. It’s about sending representation to Congress that will fight tooth and nail for working people, for immigrant communities, for all of my neighbors in South Texas who have been ignored, neglected, and disenfranchised. Texas’s 28th District is what some people call a “blue seat.” But our representative, Henry Cuellar, hasn’t acted like a Democrat in Congress. Instead, he’s catering to his corporate donors, the NRA, Big Oil, private prison companies, and big banks. I’m running because we need a representative who’ll fight for a path to citizenship, Medicare for All, and a Green New Deal that creates good-paying union jobs. I’m running because we need to get big money out of politics and stop letting corporate donors stack the deck in D.C. I’m running because this moment, in the wake of a devastating pandemic, requires Democrats in Congress who will actually get things done, not stand in the way. Despite everything stacked against us, we defied expectations by barely losing our primary in 2020. But it was just the beginning. Together, this time, we are going to prove that a big grassroots movement can take on the machine and win. But, I can’t do it without you, so please help us out in the final stretch. From the bottom of my heart, thank you to everyone who supported us last time, and who is stepping out to support us as we get closer to the primary. In solidarity, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

subject: Postponed Due to Weather
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1bb4119576f3/conforti-for-congress-6738169?e=25f4fa3311)
---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

With the impending snowstorm, we have decided to reschedule our event at Franklins Public House to Wed, Feb 23rd out of an abundance of caution.

Safety first!

Mark your calendar for Wed, Feb 23rd! I'll see you at Franklins Public House to discuss ways we can take our country back!

I look forward to seeing you then!

Stay safe - Stay warm!
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate

name: Casey DeSantis
subject: WOW!
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vqResVS6-FqUEs6P3sjINercIiIktXhDKzigqXDJOoJ-ttEwS-Gsrg72WqOh1IhHnWrXPq38fZlQdOPtaV0kVScBKb3rCU1QL1W0p2mOhsS6xZ5t3r_2NEBcuH_2F5c1qbZep5mS51vpOmQUtdfFWbAmZIIrhYrILvwqDQdVd6yYtKEUNmNAHXkDoewqsQmt&c=gPBSbZmO6M4oIBsKsKRI90tEVx9tkoJjZVfZMQrEmvWYFLn9SnHygg==&ch=I_t0K3deHU3GFER4xlzkVEg4nOtGahVV1puWE-5EN0Ko-UqOT1uGNw==)
---
| Peter,
We did it!
Thanks to YOUR support, we reached our first monthly goal of 2022.
The fight for freedom in Florida is not going to be easy. We all have a pivotal role to play in the battle ahead if we want to secure the future of Florida in November.
With his courageous leadership, I know our great governor has so much more to do for the people of Florida, but to do it, he needs to win this November - and he needs your continued support.
We need to do everything in our power to keep Florida free. With our governor's fighting spirit and your continued support - we're going to do just that!
Democrats, led by billionaire activist George Soros, just dumped more than $125 million into a special PAC aimed at defeating Republicans this November.
Just because freedom is winning with voters doesn't mean the Democrats will stop their unfair attacks on Governor DeSantis.
The Governor fights for Florida EVERY. SINGLE. DAY. Trust me... you ain't seen nothin' yet!
God bless you and God bless the great state of Florida.
Sincerely, Casey DeSantis
---
