name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z10fuem1oqk4r19bhum1ne29lhp32jg5jimumpcg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq6at72mphbedr169rrctj4saq67d5lmdhnddllelq68djksdqr4d3ke5im5d9gsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhb6p9geao6ctb2mdiefc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5j6epj0s5j69oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2oubeaee61si2a67tdi3a5bmttt619t6h9ra7no_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctj61ob6cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zshk4g2668ud46t9dgbq7t61650kcd9euetbc4n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctj61ob6cjh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr4bka4vmir4mlh63c9ns8ihs59h3ekjt64c7o28_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctj61ob6cjh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z20gqlis3vhev0hk9hqfi0q168n82m154jvs3mp8).

subject: Are you ready to fly?

body:
I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot. I swore an oath to support a
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zetgq9gtg12436nvh76m4dhlj4mu0cdt1jcjvnuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctj61ob5cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongmjgn9dtlcipb8otl6hh6bchgs6on6o31ckqbfctjetg64d1ncqr65c32e1p6eduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb2mdij0slgcpqm9ddm6uobapbi4no)
**IT’S OFFICIAL JOHN JAMES IS RUNNING FOR CONGRESS!** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6emrstdh27h43j0mjraq8htd6657sk11noahgqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctj61ob5cph2bs) **[Co-Pilot, GET YOUR ‘LAUNCH DAY DIGITAL DONOR BADGE’ >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbubs1b1lgh5jtb7dgrgi396kspsst8mhvl4ia20_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctj61ob5cph2bs)** | |
---
It’s time to suit up, Co-Pilot.

**I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot.**

I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution, and now we’re facing one of its greatest threats in our lifetime.
_**Faith. Family. Service. The American Dream.**_
These core tenants have always guided the American way of life, **and each one of them is at risk with our current leadership in government:**
❌ The DOJ weaponized against concerned parents for opposing critical race theory.
❌ Washington serving their own interests while abandoning our servicemen and women.
❌ Inflation and out-of-control spending are making the American Dream just that, a distant dream.
**Co-Pilot, I gave this speech at CPAC 2020 about my own family’s journey through the American Dream:**
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvo1stvqukpcm1aca4m02jiutcprrock5p21eoa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctj61ob5cph2bs)
**We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who prosper are wealthy elites._**

We are at what President Reagan called _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.

**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**

**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**
**_
Now, I’m asking you to send me to Congress to do just that by investing a ‘Day 1 Donation’ towards my fight—[are you ready to fly?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztcis0r9smslbe281gu2toh64ohikpinova6s5io_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctj61ob5cph2bs)
_**
[**TIME TO FLY!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z17r4g24guc705ltpkjsfp4ei0jnupnrpepjh078_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctj61ob5cph2bs)
Thank you,
John James

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Silenced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress_**
body:
Peter:

The Silicon Valley Cartel finally pulled the trigger. . .
**Twitter banned my account!**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59578295:sSTqy7HNT:m:1:2365227053:E32971A618D8972126AC52FB8CD30D82:r)
**The next step is Never Trump RINOs Adam Kinzinger and Liz Cheney colluding with communist Democrats like Adam Schiff on the January 6 Witch Hunt committee to throw me in jail.**

The Big Tech censors fear me speaking the truth and silenced me just like they banned President Trump for exposing the D.C. swamp's lies, corruption, and fraud.

Now more than ever, I need your help to fight back.

**[First, I need you to sign your"Stand with MTG" statement of support to show I count on you in the fight against Big Tech censorship](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59578295:sSTqy7HNT:m:1:2365227053:E32971A618D8972126AC52FB8CD30D82:r).**

This is the only way I can guarantee that you'll be able to hear straight from me without being censored.

After you sign your statement of support, please **[rush an emergency contribution of $17.76 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59578296:sSTqy7HNT:m:1:2365227053:E32971A618D8972126AC52FB8CD30D82:r)** so I can keep fighting back against leftwing cancel culture.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59578295:sSTqy7HNT:m:1:2365227053:E32971A618D8972126AC52FB8CD30D82:r)

You see, the social media oligarchs really aren't scheming to muzzle my voice.

Big Tech wants to shut you up and shut down anyone that stands up to the regime's socialist takeover of America.

**The double standard would be laughable if it weren't so dangerous.**

When Maxine Waters can take to the streets and threaten violence on Twitter. . .

Fake news CNN spreads lies about Donald Trump colluding with the Russians. . .

Kamala Harris can raise money to bail Black Lives Matter terrorists from jail. . .

**And the Chief Spokesman for the Islamic terrorist Iranian Revolutionary Guard tweets propaganda mourning the death of the murderous Qasem Soleimani.**

But Twitter banned me for posting facts from the CDC-managed VAERS database about the risks of the COVID vaccine. [_**STAND WITH MTG
CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT AWAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59578296:sSTqy7HNT:m:1:2365227053:E32971A618D8972126AC52FB8CD30D82:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59578295:sSTqy7HNT:m:1:2365227053:E32971A618D8972126AC52FB8CD30D82:r)

**Twitter is an enemy of free speech.**

Now I need your help to speak the truth to the American people.

This is the only way I can communicate with you, so please **sign your "Stand with MTG" statement of support.**

After you take action to stand up to Big Tech's cancel culture, please chip in a contribution right away so I can keep taking the fight to the Communist Democrats and the hate-America leftists that run Big Tech.

_Communist Democrats fear you_.

So Big Tech canceled me.

name: Dr. Bob Lorinser
subject: Parents are struggling after the child tax credit payments have ended.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Friends , It was a Conservative's dream in 1997 – Now they call it "socialism"? These false labels are worthless. What was once Republican-led dream legislation in 1997 is now mislabeled socialism. Back then, it was passed with overwhelming bipartisan support. **The Child Tax Credit was a Conservative's dream in the '90s, now it's "socialism"?** **_What was once Republican-led dream legislation in 1997 is now mislabeled socialism. Back then, it was passed with overwhelming bipartisan support._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321981/328293958/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=) **_The Dr. Bob Lorinser for Congress campaign is 100% funded by individual donors. Dr. Bob is up against corporate PACS and dark money. We need you. Can you pitch in and make a contribution today?_** [HELP ME SUPPORT WORKING FAMILIES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321982/328293959/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321983/328293960/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321984/328293961/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=) Good morning, Friends. Parents in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula are struggling after the monthly child tax credit payments have ended. After voting for the Child Tax Credit under the previous administration, my opponent voted against it, allowing it to expire. Recently, we produced a [**piece outlining the debilitating cost of childcare**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321985/328293962/-1672207108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=&emci=393633ba-8a83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f3bb27ad-8b83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) for Northern Michigan, UP families. Our district's average cost of childcare is over $700 per child per month – sometimes costing parents half their monthly salary. Several****[**childcare provisions in the Build Back Better (BBB) Framework**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321986/328293963/396623375?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=&emci=393633ba-8a83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f3bb27ad-8b83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) would reduce this burden on families. Unfortunately, there are many misconceptions about the Child Tax Credit. We hope to replace the current hyperbole and divisive political rhetoric as we briefly review its initial purpose and history. **Purpose of the Child Tax Credit (CTC)** The Child Tax Credit (CTC) is a Federal benefit that reduces income tax liability for Americans with children. It was created in 1997 and has expanded several times. The CTC's purpose is to help working families offset the cost of raising children. The program is intended to help low- to middle-income taxpayers, and it's phased out for high-income families. The credit is meant to support working families and ease the tax burden of overwhelmed parents. For the lowest in income bracket, it's a proven way to keep working families off welfare. **History of the CTC** The CTC was started by Republicans in 1997 and met amendments several times over 20 years by **_both_** parties. **The Child Tax Credit was first created in 1997 under Republican-sponsored legislation. President Clinton (D) signed the Taxpayer Relief Act into law.**
* The CTC was established as a **non-refundable $400** credit for children under age 17
* It passed with overwhelmingly bipartisan support in the House and Senate. Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula’s Congressman, Rep. Bart Stupak, voted Yea, as did **_every_** Michigan House Republican.
* The debate around it hinged on whether or not to offer it only to income-tax payers or to payroll tax-payers as well, the latter referring to the working poor.

**The program was amended in 2001 in the passage of the Economic Growth and Tax Relief Reconciliation Act signed into law by President George W. Bush (R).**
* The credit increased the amount of the credit to **$1,000** per child and made it **partially refundable.**
* **Republicans** passed it with partisan support (House 230-197 & Senate 62-38).

**The CTC was amended in 2012 in the passage of the 2012 American Taxpayer Relief Act signed into law by President Barack Obama (D).**
* The bill made the **$1,000** per child credit **fully refundable.**
* A **Republican-controlled** House (256-171) and Democratic-controlled Senate (89-8) passed the act.

**The credit was amended in 2017 in the passage of the 2017 Tax Cut and Job Act signed into law by President Trump (R).**
* Congress increased the credit to **$2,000** with a refundable limit of $1,400.
* **Republicans** passed the act with support in both the House (227-205) and Senate (52-49).

**The Child Tax Credit was amended in 2021 in the passage of the American Rescue Plan Act signed into law by President Biden (D).**
* It increased from**$2,000 to $3,600** for those under six and $3,000 for those six to age 17. All working families will get the**full credit** if they make up to $150,000 for a couple or $112,500 for a family with a single parent.
* The bill passed with Democrat support in the House (219-212) and Senate (50-49).

**_Non-Refundable:_**_Limited to only taxes owed._ **_Partially Refundable:_**_If the amount exceeds the owed taxes, a_** _“refund”_** _was given for the additional amount._ **_Fully Refundable:_**_Recipients are likely to be eligible for a refund on it, which would then offset taxes you would have to pay at the end of the financial year_ The latest changes to the CTC found in the American Rescue Plan are only temporary and expired in January. The** Build Back Better** Framework would extend this benefit one additional year, and I support this provision as written. The Child Tax Credit is a relief for families raising children in the current 21st-century economy. Our government recognizes that those who need relief are everyday American people, the middle class, and below. It is right and just. The Center on Budget and Policy Priorities says [**the benefits**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321987/328293964/-1377341489?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=&emci=393633ba-8a83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f3bb27ad-8b83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15167427) of expanding CTC outweigh minor employment effects, stating more than 99% of low- and moderate-income working adults affected by the proposal would remain employed after it takes effect. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321988/328293965/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=) Legislators need to ask how we support our families after the CTC expires. A debate based on the facts is critical. The credit is a meaningful way to help families, and its principle (tax-cuts) transcends both parties. If this is not the solution, what’s the better plan? Some prominent members of Congress are calling the Child Tax Credit “socialism,” possibly not knowing its history and falling back on taglines. We must debate this issue by avoiding worthless rhetoric and false labels. I am interested in addressing the issue at hand with a strong understanding of all its complexities. Like many Republicans and Democrats before me,**I support the Child Tax Credit** and what it has done for America and our families. I’m always interested in improvements and new solutions, so when a new plan is worth considering, and when I’m so honored to serve as Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula’s next Congressman, I will be at the negotiation table. I will advocate on your behalf and ensure relief continues to support hard-working American families. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321989/328293966/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=) _**The Dr. Bob Lorinser for Congress campaign is 100% funded by individual donors. Dr. Bob is up against corporate PACS and dark money. We need you. Can you pitch in and make a contribution today?**_ [HELP ME SUPPORT WORKING FAMILIES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321990/328293967/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321991/328293968/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321992/328293969/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=) You may [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/393633ba-8a83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110/f3bb27ad-8b83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2JiMjdhZC04YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQByOMpS2uoXMQoc_w6HReZsCkG3GkKqBgibdTycwYs=&id=116937387). clean_body: Please let us know where to send it. | Hey, Peter -- It’s Chairman Michael Whatley. Based our Official Records here at Republican HQ, you are one of the TOP REPUBLICANS in Englewood, FL. Congratulations! That’s an amazing feat! In recognition of your continued loyalty to our America First cause, I want to send you a thank you gift. But I have a problem... I don’t know where to send it! In order to receive your gift, I need to hear from you right away! | | | | | | Peter, I really appreciate everything you’re doing to help stop the socialist left and save America. That’s why I want to say “thank you” by sending you a free gift! You deserve it! | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Team New Deal, I'll try not to get too sappy here, but I can't thank you enough.

**The first month of the 2022 midterm election year has ended, and now, this is our final month before the primary on March 1.** Early voting starts in two weeks. And I’m so incredibly humbled and proud of everything that we’ve accomplished together.

Our team is out there in our neighborhoods, engaging with voters and putting the groundwork in. _**We knocked over 500 doors this past weekend alone! 👏👏👏👏**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41322498/328296287/-1288899752?refcode=220201_CLTVFR_eomthx-nondnrs_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjlmNWNhNC04ZTgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CodLwMSXDOM6KlrG8SvLOiWGxSXaecUsoF9iOjJy2sg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41322499/328296288/-1288899752?refcode=220201_CLTVFR_eomthx-nondnrs_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjlmNWNhNC04ZTgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CodLwMSXDOM6KlrG8SvLOiWGxSXaecUsoF9iOjJy2sg=) **_None of this would be possible without you, our grassroots coalition._** I don’t care how “safe blue” this seat is considered. It’s not an excuse to become lazy — because we can’t afford to be passive in our communities or leave any voice behind.

**Everything we have worked for comes down to this final stretch as we sprint to the finish line and push to energize enough voters to take this thing home.** **[So if you haven’t had the chance to pitch in yet, I’m hoping you’ll consider making your first contribution right away to show that you’re with us in these pivotal weeks leading up to the primary election. clean_body: Look how far we’ve come, Team New Deal. | | | = Team New Deal, I'll try not to get too sappy here, but I can't thank you enough. The first month of the 2022 midterm election year has ended, and now, this is our final month before the primary on March 1. Early voting starts in two weeks. And I’m so incredibly humbled and proud of everything that we’ve accomplished together. Our team is out there in our neighborhoods, engaging with voters and putting the groundwork in. We knocked over 500 doors this past weekend alone! 👏👏👏👏 = = None of this would be possible without you, our grassroots coalition. I don’t care how “safe blue” this seat is considered. It’s not an excuse to become lazy — because we can’t afford to be passive in our communities or leave any voice behind. Everything we have worked for comes down to this final stretch as we sprint to the finish line and push to energize enough voters to take this thing home. =********** ******** This is make-or-break time, and I can’t finish this race without you. Jessica = **********************EXPRESS DONATE to Jessica Mason for Congress******************** ********************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** | ********************= "="******************** ---|---|---|--- Jessica Mason was born and raised in Dallas and has experienced firsthand the socioeconomic barriers and systemic inequities that impede the success of Texas working families. As a former Navy medic, Jessica received her Master's Degree in Public Administration so that she could pursue her passion for public service. She's running for Congress to represent Texas' 30th District because she's tired of seeing everyday people left behind. TX-30 deserves policies that are designed for the success of the people who live here. That starts with new leadership that sees our humanness and understands our struggles. And that starts right here, with Jessica Mason. = __= | || || ** Jessica Mason for Congress PO Box 271183 Dallas, TX 75227 United States | |

body:
This grassroots team is why I know we can win.

Oops! We were so excited to share the news with you all that we had a typo in our last email: we raised **$1.26 million** this filing -- BUT with your help we will be at $1.6 million in no time. **[Will you make a $5 contribution right now to help us get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41322614/328296792/-191698732?refcode=nw_em_220201_2_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjRjYTY0Mi04ZjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jfe2KPNAGvJKyRz-LczZwU-nGpu1K6WI1XdwRL0Vtxo=)**
–– Updated Message from Nan Whaley ––
I can’t thank you enough, team. **Yesterday my campaign reported that we raised more than $1.26 million dollars in the latest filing period – _and that’s more than any gubernatorial challenger at this point in the race in the history of the state of Ohio._**
Even more exciting to me: While each of the other candidates in this race has an average donation exceeding $1,000, ours is truly a grassroots movement – and the strength this team demonstrated in this filing period proves that we can win this fight.
Each time we’ve asked this team to step up around a big fundraising goal or deadline, you’ve been right there to help us cross the finish line. Thank you, thank you, thank you.
Not only are we smashing fundraising records, we’ve built out our ticket with the addition of the incredible Cheryl Stephens as my running mate and are hiring new team members across the state. We have a surge of momentum on our side. We need to keep it going from now until Election Day.
I’m grateful for your support. Together, we’re going to win this election, clean up the corruption in Columbus, and carry the voices of Ohioans from all over the state to the governor’s office.
Onward,
Nan

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Starting the year off strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
First, I want to thank you for supporting me on this journey to replace Republican Jay Obernolte as the next Member of Congress for California’s 23rd district. Thanks to supporters like you, we had a strong start to the year and surpassed our fundraising numbers from December. **With an average contribution of $66 in our last week, we were driven by lots of donations from our grassroots base.** This campaign runs thanks to people all over California and the country chipping in what they can, when they can.
I care deeply about the work that we are already doing on this campaign by putting forth bold, creative solutions that will really help folks in California’s 23rd district. For communities in the High Desert all the way down the hill to L.A., change can’t come fast enough.
**My opponent Jay Obernolte is an out-of-touch millionaire who votes “no” on everything** from voting rights to clean water to equality for women and LGBTQ+ people. The people of this district deserve so much better than that. **So-called representatives like Obernolte treat politics like a game they can play with people’s lives.** He accepts contributions from corporations and is more loyal to an authoritarian like Trump than the average person in his district. **That’s why when I win this race, I promise to be a new kind of leader. **
California is a Democratic stronghold. The 23rd district is one of the last Republican districts in the state, but it doesn’t have to stay that way. The Republicans have done a good job of convincing constituents that they deserve votes without actually delivering. **What we need in this district is the confidence that things can change, and that the change starts with us**. That’s why my field and communications programs are going to be focused on reaching disaffected voters, both Democrats and Republicans.
To change everything, we need everyone. **We can only build this future together.** Onwards and upwards!

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

## JOIN REPUBLICAN LEADER KEVIN MCCARTHY AND SUPPORT SEN. JEN KIGGANS
I wanted to be sure you heard the big news first...! I am honored to receive the endorsement of U.S. House Republican Minority Leader, Congressman Kevin McCarthy! He is a leader in my fight, and I am humbled to have his support. Leader McCarthy’s endorsement of my campaign shows that I am the best candidate to defeat Nancy Pelosi and Elaine Luria this November! The path to a Republican Majority comes through Virginia’s 2nd District and I would be honored for you to join my team by chipping in [$10, $50, or $100 to our campaign!](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VWxdcQ48qvgzW4ZQRPW2WhtHLW5NMkyh4F0TFNN7Mjfyc3q90pV1-WJV7CgDd0W5Jp5k87Y-gy8W3DQ1Rc3s2V86W39S15V8_5cpRW2z8tW51bG59FN3WvgK2smg_BW8SBN8D7RV3VJW67XH2T76w9FbW15X-TJ3hRzf2W52DRTw7yrp4YW5dbJJp5w0p8_W5V5YVr3BLv6fW3_0Tyv6vlRDQW6wRD8y4j2nxZW7btTV86D7Sf6VfTXkw746-KRW7g576c2--qDzW8wZC1z8pnNmHV4bZ0H6jjY6MN1PcMtP5r5TsW1pXF1B5tL8g1N4P9sY8-1DJWW4KXLmn2Kn76JW8X2Rkz6nPDJxW90zGJ44r4Nq1W3G3zXk1nm1k8W4wlYM186PHqk3bXB1)

Hello,
Donald Trump is now openly admitting that he wanted Mike Pence to “overturn” the 2020 election.
He said this week he will pardon the January 6th insurrectionists if he wins again in 2024.
He is even calling for strong-armed protests in the streets if civil or criminal investigations proceed against him.
**Trump actually thinks that he is above the law.**
The Big Lie isn’t just a concept. It’s the most dangerous thing our democracy has faced since Abraham Lincoln and the Civil War.
You’d think Republicans like my opponent Chuck Grassley would have the spine to stand up to this brazenly authoritarian rhetoric. But apparently not.
**At a town hall this past week, Chuck Grassley was caught on camera endorsing the wacky conspiracy that “the FBI and the Capitol Police were complicit” in the January 6th insurrection... and that those arrested are “political prisoners being held in gulag conditions.”**
Any elected leader in America supporting Donald Trump today is aiding and abetting an autocrat in-waiting. But with your help, I will aid and abet the retirement of Charles Grassley. That’s why I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley here in Iowa.
The polls show this is going to be a close race, but with Senate control on the line, Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs have already raised millions to spend attacking me. **We need to raise another $10,000 before midnight tonight to fight back, and I am counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue:**

---
| Peter,
We did it!
Thanks to YOUR support, we reached our first monthly goal of 2022.
The fight for freedom in Florida is not going to be easy. We all have a pivotal role to play in the battle ahead if we want to secure the future of Florida in November.
With his courageous leadership, I know our great governor has so much more to do for the people of Florida, but to do it, he needs to win this November - and he needs your continued support.
We need to do everything in our power to keep Florida free. With our governor's fighting spirit and your continued support - we're going to do just that!
Democrats, led by billionaire activist George Soros, just dumped more than $125 million into a special PAC aimed at defeating Republicans this November.
Just because freedom is winning with voters doesn't mean the Democrats will stop their unfair attacks on Governor DeSantis.
The Governor fights for Florida EVERY. SINGLE. DAY. Trust me... you ain't seen nothin' yet!
God bless you and God bless the great state of Florida.
Sincerely, Casey DeSantis
---

name: Val Demings
subject: I can't fall behind, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
| |
---
I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. Every dollar will help this people-powered team defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41323998/328303429/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2343-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmM4ZjkzZC05MzgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eU4whICO0sjOYHbhGL0MVjoAxCLGKqIMTMlfbgs1zfI=)

The timing – and the sheer consequences _–_ of falling short right now couldn't be more serious. I don't say that lightly. Polling has me down _ 2 points _behind Marco Rubio, just as he and the GOP hauled in $32 million to dismantle our Senate majority.

**If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell.**
With a grassroots team this strong, I know that if we dig deep, we _will_ flip Florida blue. Point-blank, friend: That means hitting my fundraising goal. **It's truly the only path we have to fighting back against GOP megadonors.**

name: Alex Lasry
subject: Black History Month

body:
This Black History Month, let us remember those in the past who have fought so hard for justice and keep up the fight for future generations. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41324110/328303959/-1436015341?refcode=EM_FR_220201BHM_N_AL_90DA_6_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDgxNGQzOS05NDgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yN7IiYxKHLPmtJBoUjpThPvNN6YGQ6MRhGmjHT3n_vM=)
---
Peter,

February is Black History Month.

These past few years further emphasized the scale of injustice across the United States – whether it was violence against Black Americans, attacks on voting rights, or disparities that were underscored by the COVID-19 pandemic.

Black Americans are disproportionately marginalized by the systemic racism ingrained in our society. Systemic racism can be seen everywhere, from policing practices to environmental impacts on communities of color to housing and employment discrimination.

As the next Senator from Wisconsin, I will prioritize racial and social justice, and ensure that we are creating opportunities for everyone, regardless of where they live or what they look like. I am committed to passing legislation that furthers racial justice, equity, and harassment-free places not only in Wisconsin but across the United States.

This Black History Month, let us remember those in the past who have fought so hard for justice and keep up the fight for future generations. While we have a long way to go, we’re making progress every day in ensuring equity and justice for all.

Thank you,

Alex Lasry
---

subject: This district isn’t a "battle space"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41305509/328232916/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjkyZGY2YS02YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=InjBB77dTDS56AKv04fYXjhYTN49XWRgXaab1H0GmHQ=&emci=35eee20e-f36f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=bb92df6a-6b83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Over the coming weeks, you'll probably hear a lot of talk about NJ-03 as a "Frontline District." Look, I understand what they're driving at: I'm one of just seven Democrats elected in 2020 in a district that Donald Trump won. We're looking at a very competitive race, and **we're going to have to put together the biggest, most well-organized grassroots movement in New Jersey history if we want to keep this seat.** **[build the movement](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41305510/328232917/-821065315?refcode=2022-kim-welcome-4&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bb92df6a-6b83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjkyZGY2YS02YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=InjBB77dTDS56AKv04fYXjhYTN49XWRgXaab1H0GmHQ=)** But let's also be clear that this district isn't a battle space, elections aren't warfare, and our goal isn't to crush an enemy. This district is my home. The election is our chance to further the dialogue with folks in our district. And our goal is to make sure that New Jersey's Third District has a Representative who will always put working families first. It's going to take a lot of work, and dishonest corporate PACs or other special interests will work really hard to muddy the waters and hide the facts. We'll push back as hard as we need to in order to get the truth out. **But fundamentally, our campaign is about**** _building_****: our families, our communities, and our country.** That's why we've rejected the language of hate and the politics of anger. It's why we focus on talking with people instead of shouting at them. It's why we focus on values like service, civility, and respect. We're focused on making an impact, not just making a point. And it's why our movement keeps growing. [**Please chip in $3 before our upcoming fundraising deadline; your contribution will make sure we have the resources to counter disinformation and to get our message out.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41305511/328232918/-821065315?refcode=2022-kim-welcome-4&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=bb92df6a-6b83-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjkyZGY2YS02YjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=InjBB77dTDS56AKv04fYXjhYTN49XWRgXaab1H0GmHQ=) At a time when so many people are tired of the hostility of politics, we've succeeded by bringing people together. I'm proud to be part of this team with you, and I'm looking forward to taking the next steps together. _Andy_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We sent a number of fundraising emails leading up to yesterday’s deadline, so I thought it important to also take a moment to send to say thank you.
#

Friends —
We sent a number of fundraising emails leading up to yesterday’s deadline, so I thought it important to also take a moment to send one to say thank you.
Something we say a lot is that these goals are not arbitrary — that’s because it’s true. They are the numbers we need to reach every month if we are going to win this race.
It’s no secret this is going to be a long and expensive campaign, and my decision to not accept corporate PAC money makes fundraising a little more difficult for me.
But it was the right decision.
Instead, our support comes from a humbling number of individual donors. I’m very proud of the way we fund this campaign. You should be too.
So again, thank you. Your support means a lot.
Mark Kelly
**Every month we aim to get a number of people signing up to say they endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign. This month, our goal is 25,000 people. Will you add your name to say you endorse Mark today?**
[**Endorse Mark Kelly for Senate**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-feb?source=em220201-1-7&t=1&akid=2051%2E6688874%2EHiNLoB)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-feb?source=em220201-1-7&t=2&akid=2051%2E6688874%2EHiNLoB)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2051%2E6688874%2EHiNLoB).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Rep. Griffin Endorses Michael Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I'm honored to receive the endorsement of State Representative Beth Griffin. | | | |
---
| | |
### State Representative Beth Griffin
Endorses Michael Brown for Governor
---
|
---
| Adding her voice to his growing list of supporters, State Representative Beth Griffin today endorsed Michael Brown for Governor. “Michael Brown is the leader Michigan needs to turn our economy around and address serious issues in our schools,” Griffin said. “He is a seasoned community leader, and his passion to humbly serve is a fresh breath of air for the hardworking families of this state.” Griffin, a former teacher who represents Michigan’s 66th District, praised Michael Brown’s commitment to helping students succeed.
---
|
---
| “I know he will work tirelessly to ensure that all Michigan families have opportunities for their children to learn and succeed — whether in a public school, home school, or whatever is best for each child. Join me in wholeheartedly supporting Michael Brown for Governor.” “Representative Griffin has an illustrious career as a teacher, county commissioner and state representative,” Michael Brown commented. “I’m honored to have her support,” A lifelong Michigan resident, Michael Brown has pledged a top-to-bottom audit of the state’s education system to expose wasteful spending. “We must ensure that our tax dollars reach the classroom, and that school resources are used to educate students to succeed, not indoctrinate them with divisive concepts like critical race theory,” he stated. Brown recently participated in School Choice Week last week pledging to also “fight to give parents more choice in their children’s education.” Michael Brown has also been endorsed by St. Joseph County Sheriff Mark Lillywhite, Berrien County Prosecutor Steve Pierangeli, and rocker Ted Nugent, among others.
---
|
---

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: Marine Colonel Tom Duhs endorses Erik Aadland for Congress
body:
"...he has my highest endorsement for this office."
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001db6XQpPklEYM5rb2k8kxMdl3jkuHpONNQYp87uaI4gVxVjFZ9bAaFEwuiPWNsKDF-NsBaPZc6-T3zFensWH1omIoE2ni8pg4oz5zoLDKDde7S5rio87eUvYjzHb7Hjvg4tNprwMCqMja-wlBjqhvHvl3oRWVY2d-&c=8PplzsRKWdIAyLYOCE3I1N0aYBcFNKu4mwpzouQ4S8QIcnPaxuo3uw==&ch=Gh_lS0do6PpiLAG-MwvqGqd2lv2JKyY-ZI0e2H8wsL_46Kf0ohcNvw==)
---
|
---
| Marine Colonel Tom Duhs endorses Erik for Congress
---
| |
---|---
|
U.S. Marine Colonel Tom Duhs has a long history in training our nations warriors in specialized warfare. He served at the Mountain Warfare Training Center in California--the Marine Corps version of Camp Hale, in Colorado. He also trained Marines in cold weather operations in Alaska. During his 30 year career he participated in five winter deployments to Norway on NATO exercises.

Duhs is the co-author of two books, "Sempre Avanti--Always forward," and "Ice and Granite--Snow Soldiers of Riva Ridge".

He regularly makes presentations on the 10th Mountain Division, a specially trained light infantry unit of the U.S. Army that has recently served in Iraq and Syria.
| |
---
| Col. Duhs offers his endorsement of U.S. Congressional candidate Erik Aadland:
---
"As a Marine Corps Colonel with thirty years' experience, I have had the opportunity to evaluate, assess and write efficiency reports on hundreds of Marines from the rank of Sergeant to Lieutenant Colonel. This experience assures me that I am capable and skilled at discerning the qualities of men and women.
After meeting and listening to Erik Aadland, I was able to appraise his character, demeanor, and deportment as a man, and possible Congressman to the US House of Representatives. What I can attest to is that Erik Aadland has consistent, reliable, balanced, integrity and is a man of honor. This assessment is based on my observations of him in the public forum and listening to him on radio talk show broadcasts. My personal relationship with him is warm, friendly and professional. I think of him as a protege who has the courage to embark on a path of continued service to our country in politics.
As a graduate of West Point, it is obvious that he has the mental capacity, the endurance, and stamina to take on the job of a congressman. As a combat commander in Iraq and Afghanistan his proven record as a junior officer leading soldiers under the extremely difficult and dangerous conditions of war provides more than enough reason to put our trust in him as the congressman to represent the people of Colorado District 7.
The soldiers under his command trusted Erik with their lives, and he brought them home in one piece. Erik listened to the concerns of his soldiers while still executing the assigned tasks of those commanders under whom he served and always accomplished the mission. Listening is an important trait for an officer to possess. My experience with Erik is that he does listen to those subordinate to him as well as to those senior to him. This trait convinces me that he will listen and pay heed to the desires and concerns of the constituents of District 7.
Additionally, I should say that loyalty is a two-way street, and the troops can immediately discern all the significant attributes of an officer. The troops don't care about how much you know, but they know how much you care. Loyalty is one of the most important traits an officer must possess, not only to his command but also to his soldiers. The citizens of District 7 can rest assured that Erik Aadland will be a loyal, competent, trustworthy, stalwart representative of the people. He exemplifies all the highest virtues expected of a military officer, and a congressman in the US House of Representatives.
As a son of an Army General Officer, a husband and father, and as a friend, Erik Aadland espouses and demonstrates all the qualities of a person we all hope to associate with. Therefore, I highly recommend Erik be elected to serve District 7 as its representative to Congress as he has my highest endorsement for this office."
-Colonel Tom Duhs

During his 30 year career he participated in five winter deployments to Norway on NATO exercises. Duhs is the co-author of two books, "Sempre Avanti--Always forward," and "Ice and Granite--Snow Soldiers of Riva Ridge". He regularly makes presentations on the 10th Mountain Division, a specially trained light infantry unit of the U.S. Army that has recently served in Iraq and Syria. | | | Col. Duhs offers his endorsement of U.S. Congressional candidate Erik Aadland: "As a Marine Corps Colonel with thirty years' experience, I have had the opportunity to evaluate, assess and write efficiency reports on hundreds of Marines from the rank of Sergeant to Lieutenant Colonel. This experience assures me that I am capable and skilled at discerning the qualities of men and women. After meeting and listening to Erik Aadland, I was able to appraise his character, demeanor, and deportment as a man, and possible Congressman to the US House of Representatives. What I can attest to is that Erik Aadland has consistent, reliable, balanced, integrity and is a man of honor. This assessment is based on my observations of him in the public forum and listening to him on radio talk show broadcasts. My personal relationship with him is warm, friendly and professional. I think of him as a protege who has the courage to embark on a path of continued service to our country in politics. As a graduate of West Point, it is obvious that he has the mental capacity, the endurance, and stamina to take on the job of a congressman. As a combat commander in Iraq and Afghanistan his proven record as a junior officer leading soldiers under the extremely difficult and dangerous conditions of war provides more than enough reason to put our trust in him as the congressman to represent the people of Colorado District 7. The soldiers under his command trusted Erik with their lives, and he brought them home in one piece. Erik listened to the concerns of his soldiers while still executing the assigned tasks of those commanders under whom he served and always accomplished the mission. Listening is an important trait for an officer to possess. My experience with Erik is that he does listen to those subordinate to him as well as to those senior to him. This trait convinces me that he will listen and pay heed to the desires and concerns of the constituents of District 7. Additionally, I should say that loyalty is a two-way street, and the troops can immediately discern all the significant attributes of an officer. The troops don't care about how much you know, but they know how much you care. Loyalty is one of the most important traits an officer must possess, not only to his command but also to his soldiers. The citizens of District 7 can rest assured that Erik Aadland will be a loyal, competent, trustworthy, stalwart representative of the people. He exemplifies all the highest virtues expected of a military officer, and a congressman in the US House of Representatives. As a son of an Army General Officer, a husband and father, and as a friend, Erik Aadland espouses and demonstrates all the qualities of a person we all hope to associate with. Therefore, I highly recommend Erik be elected to serve District 7 as its representative to Congress as he has my highest endorsement for this office." -Colonel Tom Duhs | | | | == | | | Stand with Erik Today | Stand with me today by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. Donate today | == You can help in two ways: First, write your current lawmaker about your concerns with government. Second, help me go to Washington to fight for you, your children and the future of our country. | == | Together we can stand against bad policy and for our future. | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 (303) 903 1985 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

| | Dear Patriot:

Here in Arkansas, we support our Second Amendment.

The Regime doesn't give us our freedoms.

_God does._

But our God-given right to Self-Defense is under attack like never before from the Left.

**They want to take our guns. They say it every day.

_RINOs like my opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, are helping them do it by supporting Red Flag gun confiscation._**

They're defunding the police.

They're letting drug dealers, rapists, and murderers go free. George Soros-funded District Attorneys across our country are refusing to enforce the law.

Crime is out of control, and murders are skyrocketing.

**Meanwhile, they want to make sure that normal, decent, patriotic citizens like you and I can't defend ourselves.**

They want to make sure that all we have is a criminal underclass and a totalitarian overclass.

_There has never been more reason to own a gun. You owe it to yourself and, more importantly, to your family._

Be ready to defend them against the predators that the Left is unleashing against all of us.

**I'm giving away a Radical Firearms 16" SOCOM 5.56 AR-15 Rifle.**

[](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=e75775b927&e=eda539b26b)

Initially, this was a Christmas giveaway. But, after the Republican National Committee banned me from WinRed, I decided to extend it for Valentine's Day--_because there is no better expression of love than to be ready to defend your loved ones._

[_**Enter today for your chance to win!**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=b5601ff22f&e=eda539b26b)

We'll be choosing the winner at random just before Valentine's Day, and you could end up with a brand new AR-15 at your door.

[_**Though contributing is not required in order to win, I'm hoping you'll also chip into my America First campaign**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=68dadf85fd&e=eda539b26b)[.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=cfa009cddb&e=eda539b26b)

[_**I need your help to defeat a weak RINO and protect our God-given rights in Washington, so enter my gun giveaway today, and please contribute what you can**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=bff32cc17b&e=eda539b26b)[. ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=d25eefa8c3&e=eda539b26b)

For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. I'm giving away an AR-15 for Valentine's Day!** [_**Enter for your chance to win, and while you're at it, chip in to support my America First congressional campaign**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=bbd6ad01c7&e=eda539b26b)[** _._**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=3d8a1b6a35&e=eda539b26b)

body:

If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](%7b%7bunsubscribeUrl%7d%7d) **IT’S OFFICIAL JOHN JAMES IS RUNNING FOR CONGRESS!** [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3344c51f94534eaab40d779e0eabe680&_e=RHTtJdVlqfVut05uj2bSmwMp0Ue1nT2stIL8zI-Hx0HmwwRvkY3RcO9qVzSgi3JC2eHDUcF1dpA3PixVkmwNNQOGB1tVz0610bkvyGnePqsoj0SviGGrMGYsav7aW-iW481lsveAb0b4iz5eEg0LVFX79QYfVmD8DHCr1zUq-AU5GDK9x4kOi7W6_1H6oqXQZnifGR_uPoSSCQDAHasfmH1Ae1mukYHv65Cz_Xz_C8dl0_B32dkrgRHJl3S2q8dlwWNi1oGK5qE52QnorQDgob4bvTG85TZciiIE5mpsIvQKtD2tMfOEcVxP5ci0Xek40iVvLahB0BAlSSeAfSyERcQmz1fUu9RMVoiULlDMmUq267bXWlD7ZtvOH2JCCjy6U9KnSVH95Fnulsd8vo2dHoRlvi_F5flSw8xkyez1raQ%3D) **[Peter, GET YOUR ‘LAUNCH DAY DIGITAL DONOR BADGE’ >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3344c51f94534eaab40d779e0eabe680&_e=RHTtJdVlqfVut05uj2bSmwMp0Ue1nT2stIL8zI-Hx0HmwwRvkY3RcO9qVzSgi3JC2eHDUcF1dpA3PixVkmwNNQOGB1tVz0610bkvyGnePqsoj0SviGGrMGYsav7aW-iW481lsveAb0b4iz5eEg0LVFX79QYfVmD8DHCr1zUq-AU5GDK9x4kOi7W6_1H6oqXQZnifGR_uPoSSCQDAHasfmA3u9ZN3hliiDQ8y19lFRqUilSDxbth68EluI6AbDzMWqezKRCQj2_Y3JvLxrRda1wbI7IRoSn7wfSQCrrm_DbeDHJ5RYdfZuKBCVtBMlnvlijAMYlPs2Ge87IoVjgkWUq9JkcWVf-1q989qvdVSNthQZ0u_9zeYNXGQ9n9FcSSK8bILA8Pr0YdVoA2gfLOi5S8A0uZm6wz2OIZy4fAxUfo%3D)** | |
---
It’s time to suit up, Peter.

**I'm John James, and I’m running for Congress here in Michigan, and I need you as my Co-Pilot.**

I swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution, and now we’re facing one of its greatest threats in our lifetime.
_**Faith. Family. Service. The American Dream.**_
These core tenants have always guided the American way of life, **and each one of them is at risk with our current leadership in government:**
❌ The DOJ weaponized against concerned parents for opposing critical race theory.
❌ Washington serving their own interests while abandoning our servicemen and women.
❌ Inflation and out-of-control spending are making the American Dream just that, a distant dream.
**Peter, I gave this speech at CPAC 2020 about my own family’s journey through the American Dream:**
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3344c51f94534eaab40d779e0eabe680&_e=RHTtJdVlqfVut05uj2bSmwMp0Ue1nT2stIL8zI-Hx0HmwwRvkY3RcO9qVzSgi3JC2eHDUcF1dpA3PixVkmwNNQOGB1tVz0610bkvyGnePqsoj0SviGGrMGYsav7aW-iW481lsveAb0b4iz5eEg0LVFX79QYfVmD8DHCr1zUq-AU5GDK9x4kOi7W6_1H6oqXQZnifGR_uPoSSCQDAHasfmB7tWykTNhpnzsNOrNfV6AI9fgVdHBSJjM0ECsKzX_o4xQ99Yu-4CyW4uqPn0xZ6BjpHoX5l_Xx-n6Fq1dns3lhml5sW-zmsWqIdT314Z1zksdKhg37DKectEHcg-5xp0_9-91CNlbuG8lDzvTWoVQaw1LJS0H4WnNRm-B6oDsbGt3hANs4H021tO75Z1-_zKklzrjPsINyJp3Bp84RBwlo%3D)
**We’re rapidly approaching an America where this won’t be true anymore, where the American Dream will be nothing more than a myth, and _where the only people who prosper are wealthy elites._**

We are at what President Reagan called _‘A Time for Choosing,’_ and we as a nation must choose which path we wish to follow.

**_I choose exceptionalism over entitlement... _**

**_I choose achievement over apathy..._**

**_I choose freedom over socialism..._**

**I refuse to let the American Dream die with our generationーI know the stakes are high, but I put my oath to protect our Republic above all else.**
**_
Now, I’m asking you to send me to Congress to do just that by investing a ‘Day 1 Donation’ towards my fight—[are you ready to fly?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3344c51f94534eaab40d779e0eabe680&_e=RHTtJdVlqfVut05uj2bSmwMp0Ue1nT2stIL8zI-Hx0HmwwRvkY3RcO9qVzSgi3JC2eHDUcF1dpA3PixVkmwNNQOGB1tVz0610bkvyGnePqsoj0SviGGrMGYsav7aW-iW481lsveAb0b4iz5eEg0LVFX79QYfVmD8DHCr1zUq-AU5GDK9x4kOi7W6_1H6oqXQZnifGR_uPoSSCQDAHasfmDS07TcIaOR2K6O-lGkVOYsXLikxGwZAlNQZEGMwgo8IBRSvIz6Dch-nP7Cl6NnYxUtWT22LZCEMlAjiLt_ffr1J018SW2H6613Qxx92SckYofmWH54EustUVLxQanmZ274AZAbt3KDuj-bT3zS1swE5vfX0QAl3pFRl7s5yFRzCeoL0jBem3ExEZdVQWf8aeFdc4p4XCW_wqKegC2RPsDE%3D)
_**
[**TIME TO FLY!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=3344c51f94534eaab40d779e0eabe680&_e=RHTtJdVlqfVut05uj2bSmwMp0Ue1nT2stIL8zI-Hx0HmwwRvkY3RcO9qVzSgi3JC2eHDUcF1dpA3PixVkmwNNQOGB1tVz0610bkvyGnePqsoj0SviGGrMGYsav7aW-iW481lsveAb0b4iz5eEg0LVFX79QYfVmD8DHCr1zUq-AU5GDK9x4kOi7W6_1H6oqXQZnifGR_uPoSSCQDAHasfmA-GWId2kv4JJIK8-N4jlrv1xRT9gQXjVAS7QrlkxZMScTUlFT6ct-INLfe83Tbgp3XvYW6miXGWmS2A_LA5E7dXNr57MFbq20GjFB7OHsN2ztMefDxvUIW5tYgnorBdNHp4DDhnP5ZmQTSK5zVDdy7wVLEGIbcCvweK5XLKK8JVGxs9DP_2eNO_UZfkFHSP4JKMh9giGnn9_E2UCvnj0mY%3D)
Thank you,
John James

name: Brian Burley
subject: Porter is the Next Pelosi. Help Me Stop Her!
body:
My name is Brian Burley, and I am the America-First candidate running to defend a conservative California seat currently being v
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zedjo828mtugj88k29gvkjmb8gsq7sb097n25jp0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2pbk61j74thm6hpbdclk65jj6djh6pgjat356uq65cdkedon4tjm6dgn8c76c3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm5cr56up3aphh6ipm6ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgmcpr1clhm8or24no)
| | | |

---
---

Friends,
**My name is Brian Burley, and I am the America-First candidate running to defend a conservative California seat currently being vacated by an outgoing Republican. I need YOUR help to keep it from the clutches of the radical Left!**
This district is red-leaning and this district even voted to recall tyrannical Governor Newsom.
A Republican held this seat in 2020 and it’s currently open—** _which means the Marxist left is throwing everything they have to steal this seat from us!_**
I am the Pro-Trump, Constitutional Conservative that will defend this seat. I am also running to be our Youngest America-First Congressman as well as our first Filipino Republican Representative.
**_My opponent is Socialist Katie Porter and she is the second coming of Nancy Pelosi_**. Porter is a far-left extremist and the top Progressive leader in Washington DC. Even AOC answers to radical Democrat Katie Porter.
I’m leading the grassroots-fueled campaign to keep this seat in Republican hands—**and I** **need your help to fund it.**
[**This district is a must-win to regain control of the House. Will you help me fight back by donating $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdtqifntpgj4li92qmplgpdfla4m9g23aq49238o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgmaor4cdh2bs)

---
| [< < <DONATE NOW! > > >](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z75d3e4ljmfkmo00avpqc77qebnems6ti59h41ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgmaor4cdh2bs)
---
2022 is going to be a great year for Conservatives and I know voters in my district are happy to chant _‘Let’s Go Brian’_ Burley!
_The way Biden and his gang of crazy Socialists is going, even Dems will soon be begging for Trump’s return!_
According to recent polls, 1 in 5 Biden voters regrets their decision.
Biden’s approval ratings are circling the drain. And is it any wonder?
Look at what he’s done to this country.
He began his fraudulent term with 19 executive orders on the first day- something he himself said during the campaign is the “sign of a dictator”.
It just gets worse and worse from there...
We’ve lost control of our border as millions of criminal illegal aliens invade our country.
We’ve lost millions of jobs as our economy crumbles.
Inflation is out of control.
Americans are suffering as Biden has completely shattered our nation at every single turn.
If we do not elect Congressional Leaders that can put a check and balance on Biden, we are truly sunk.
---
| [< < < CONTRIBUTE HERE! > > >](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ima1g2k5fm4soa53jefq37ju4qni6daiit4fv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgmaor4cdh2bs)
---
_Porter is far to the left of this Reagan Republican District!_ _Porter moved into this seat after redistricting as the radical left wants her to spread their radical agenda to conservative cities like my home of Huntington Beach._
I don’t say this lightly - Katie Porter is the most dangerous and extreme member of Congress. Porter’s best friends in Congress are Pelosi, AOC and Maxime Waters and her voting record shows it.
Porter voted twice to impeach the President, voted for Pelosi for Speaker at every opportunity, she has voted to expand ballot harvesting and other voter fraud methods, she has voted to raise taxes, and she has voted to take away our gun rights.
_Worst of all -__ she has done nothing during her time in Congress besides divide our country during a pandemic._
_I will bring us together_. I will stop Porter from squatting in this solidly conservative seat. We will win this seat and once I am in Congress, I will defend President Trump’s America First Vision!

_We do not need another McCarthy-backscratcher in Congress!_ We need someone to take down the establishment, not side with them.
I am currently the youngest Republican elected official in California as I serve on the Orange County Central Committee. In this position, I have taken on the Swampy establishment as I have fought tirelessly to rebuild the Orange County Republican Party into a group that fights like President Trump does.
I’m also a successful small business owner that knows how hard it is to run a business of any size in this economy—especially in a blue state like California.
_I am reaching out to loyal conservatives nationwide as we need all hands-on deck to win this seat and take back the house._ _I urgently need your help to take away Pelosi’s gavel for good, and Make Orange County Great Again!_
Beating Katie Porter won’t be easy, but I’m no stranger to winning tough fights.

My passion for public service came from the loss of my mother to cancer just ten years ago. Through that experience, I pulled myself out from underneath the poverty line to now owning an information technology and social media marketing business.

I believe in the American Dream of hard work and opportunity- because I’ve seen it.

_I can testify to the greatness of our country, because I’ve felt it!_
Pelosi and Porter’s days in Congress are numbered. Can you imagine a world where Pelosi is no longer Speaker?

I can - with your help!
This race is a must-win seat in order to regain control of the House and to stop the spread of Socialism! _That’s why I need your help so urgently!_
Stand with Trump, Elect Burley to Congress. Let’s Defend the America First Legacy
---
| [DONATE $5, $10, $25, $50, OR MORE!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zugg7t0s8uebm7kdegn6ncdik4cn7onk0l2mji48_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgmaor4cdh2bs)
---
Thank you and God Bless,
Brian Burley
Republican Candidate, CA-47
Member, Orange County Central Committee
Businessman
America First Patriot

---

clean_body: My name is Brian Burley, and I am the America-First candidate running to defend a conservative California seat currently being v | | | | Friends, My name is Brian Burley, and I am the America-First candidate running to defend a conservative California seat currently being vacated by an outgoing Republican. I need YOUR help to keep it from the clutches of the radical Left! This district is red-leaning and this district even voted to recall tyrannical Governor Newsom. A Republican held this seat in 2020 and it’s currently open— which means the Marxist left is throwing everything they have to steal this seat from us! I am the Pro-Trump, Constitutional Conservative that will defend this seat. I am also running to be our Youngest America-First Congressman as well as our first Filipino Republican Representative. My opponent is Socialist Katie Porter and she is the second coming of Nancy Pelosi. Porter is a far-left extremist and the top Progressive leader in Washington DC. Even AOC answers to radical Democrat Katie Porter. I’m leading the grassroots-fueled campaign to keep this seat in Republican hands—and I need your help to fund it. | 2022 is going to be a great year for Conservatives and I know voters in my district are happy to chant ‘Let’s Go Brian’ Burley! The way Biden and his gang of crazy Socialists is going, even Dems will soon be begging for Trump’s return! According to recent polls, 1 in 5 Biden voters regrets their decision. Biden’s approval ratings are circling the drain. And is it any wonder? Look at what he’s done to this country. He began his fraudulent term with 19 executive orders on the first day- something he himself said during the campaign is the “sign of a dictator”. It just gets worse and worse from there... We’ve lost control of our border as millions of criminal illegal aliens invade our country. We’ve lost millions of jobs as our economy crumbles. Inflation is out of control. Americans are suffering as Biden has completely shattered our nation at every single turn. If we do not elect Congressional Leaders that can put a check and balance on Biden, we are truly sunk. | Porter is far to the left of this Reagan Republican District! Porter moved into this seat after redistricting as the radical left wants her to spread their radical agenda to conservative cities like my home of Huntington Beach. I don’t say this lightly - Katie Porter is the most dangerous and extreme member of Congress. Porter’s best friends in Congress are Pelosi, AOC and Maxime Waters and her voting record shows it. Porter voted twice to impeach the President, voted for Pelosi for Speaker at every opportunity, she has voted to expand ballot harvesting and other voter fraud methods, she has voted to raise taxes, and she has voted to take away our gun rights. Worst of all - she has done nothing during her time in Congress besides divide our country during a pandemic. I will bring us together. I will stop Porter from squatting in this solidly conservative seat. We will win this seat and once I am in Congress, I will defend President Trump’s America First Vision! We do not need another McCarthy-backscratcher in Congress! We need someone to take down the establishment, not side with them. I am currently the youngest Republican elected official in California as I serve on the Orange County Central Committee. In this position, I have taken on the Swampy establishment as I have fought tirelessly to rebuild the Orange County Republican Party into a group that fights like President Trump does. I’m also a successful small business owner that knows how hard it is to run a business of any size in this economy—especially in a blue state like California. I am reaching out to loyal conservatives nationwide as we need all hands-on deck to win this seat and take back the house. I urgently need your help to take away Pelosi’s gavel for good, and Make Orange County Great Again! Beating Katie Porter won’t be easy, but I’m no stranger to winning tough fights. My passion for public service came from the loss of my mother to cancer just ten years ago. Through that experience, I pulled myself out from underneath the poverty line to now owning an information technology and social media marketing business. I believe in the American Dream of hard work and opportunity- because I’ve seen it. I can testify to the greatness of our country, because I’ve felt it! Pelosi and Porter’s days in Congress are numbered. Can you imagine a world where Pelosi is no longer Speaker? I can - with your help! This race is a must-win seat in order to regain control of the House and to stop the spread of Socialism! That’s why I need your help so urgently! Stand with Trump, Elect Burley to Congress. Let’s Defend the America First Legacy | Thank you and God Bless, Brian Burley Republican Candidate, CA-47 Member, Orange County Central Committee Businessman America First Patriot | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Dear Friend, Running for governor outside the two-party system isn't the easy choice -- but it's the right choice for Oregon. And I'll always do what's right for Oregon. This campaign is about one thing: a better future for the state we love. You don't have to leave the Republican or Democratic Party to support me -- you only have to want a better Oregon. You and I both know that political parties can't fix our broken politics and broken state government -- only the people of Oregon can. And that's exactly where my loyalty lies -- with you and the people of Oregon. If you'll join me today, we'll get this state back on track. We'll build a powerful, populist grassroots movement and focus on our future. And I need your help to do just that.

[**Will you be one of the first members of the movement and join me with $5, $20, $25 or whatever you can give to help us make the change?**](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=a4f78150a9&e=b87254c2cd) **[Donate Today](https://runbetsyrun.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcd3d92efb9a6c50ae14637c1&id=4fe4635f82&e=b87254c2cd)** I value solutions to our problems over partisan bickering and over who gets credit. I believe in honest straight talk -- and I don't engage in BS. But that's exactly what we need if we're going to fix what's wrong with our state. Oregonians are ready for no-nonsense leadership that goes beyond party -- and you can count on me to be your governor -- a governor for all Oregonians. Real change starts right now -- with you. Will you join me ? Sincerely,
Betsy

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden Busted Bussing in Illegals!
disclaimer_text: PAID for by YOU and other taxpayers!
body:
A few days ago, I received a tip of a massive bussing operation of illegal aliens into Florida.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/35CfjJZJgBHhiKMFgBY0BQ/imejSqDHSMWofb763ELy2CYg)
Patriot,

A few days ago, I received a tip regarding a massive bussing operation of illegal aliens into Florida.

So, over the weekend, I camped out in a vehicle outside of the Extended Stay in Maitland, Florida, and sure enough, busloads of Mexican migrant men were unloaded and checked into the hotel!

After speaking to workers outside of the hotel who have been witnesses to this bussing operation for the last few months, they told me that hundreds of these hispanic migrant men have been bussed in to that very hotel for months, and that they’ve seen about 400 bussed into the hotel within the last four days alone!

[**Watch the video I filmed here:**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/35CfjJZJgBHhiKMFgBY0BQ/imejSqDHSMWofb763ELy2CYg)

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/35CfjJZJgBHhiKMFgBY0BQ/imejSqDHSMWofb763ELy2CYg)
**And this is happening all across America, backed and funded by the Biden Administration!**

These interstate migrant bussing operations are nothing more than taxpayer-funded human trafficking designed to bypass our hardworking (and frustrated) Border Patrol agents!

[**Help me keep exposing the Biden administration by backing my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/35CfjJZJgBHhiKMFgBY0BQ/imejSqDHSMWofb763ELy2CYg)

Back in November, Governor DeSantis put the Biden Administration on notice for flying in illegals in the dead of night to Jacksonville, Florida, to have them scattered around the state with no oversight – and no way to ever get them back out of our country.

Biden is excusing this human trafficking as legal, visa-stamped immigration, however, visa overstays have exceeded illegal border crossings for EIGHT years in the United States!

The influx of illegal aliens into our country is being PAID for by YOU and other taxpayers!

That’s why we need an IMMEDIATE immigration moratorium and mass deportations to stop this invasion, especially when it’s the U.S. government paying for it!

I’ll keep working on exposing the illegal alien invasion in our country, and fighting to get to Congress to put an end to this insanity, but I’ll need your help to do so. [**Help fund my campaign by pitching in whatever amount you can today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/35CfjJZJgBHhiKMFgBY0BQ/imejSqDHSMWofb763ELy2CYg)

Thanks so much for all that you do, and stay tuned!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/imejSqDHSMWofb763ELy2CYg)

body:

You have the opportunity right now to support the NHGOP so we can [**FIRE HASSAN**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefeat-hassan/2/0100017eb5d952d9-365cc4c5-4ec5-4aa2-837c-18df0f781364-000000/1y0fke9WBh5G0l0cvP8Ji07G4p0=256) in November!
