subject: Quitters 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
It’s not often that reading the news makes you smile, but I’ll admit that this put a grin on my face:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3er7u--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3er7u-1w1lr-4qqlpo2/)
---

It’s not often that reading the news makes you smile, but I’ll admit that this put a grin on my face:

---

**House Dems Beg Members Not To Quit In The Face of Fierce GOP Midterm Challenge**
Washington Times, 1/25/22

---

It looks like we’re making an impact! The Democrats know that we’re starting a Red Wave of historic proportions, and while many of the Democrats have already tossed in the towel, not all of them have gotten the message.

**It’s clear that Americans are fed up with the radical, broken leadership offered by the Democrats.** Our victories in November in Virginia and other states should have been the wake-up call to get their heads out of the sand, but Joe Biden and his Democrat allies in Congress have just stuck their heads in deeper.

It’s obvious now that they aren’t listening to Americans.

**[But, we can make them listen by delivering HUGE wins in the upcoming elections. To do that, I need you to make a quick donation to help us push our America First candidates to victory all across the country.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3er7u-1w1ls-4qqlpo3/ "But, we can make them listen by delivering HUGE wins in the upcoming elections. To do that, I need you to make a quick donation to help us push our America First candidates to victory all across the country.")**

The 2022 midterm elections will be here before we know it, and it is more important than ever that we outraise the radical Democrats. That’s why getting your contribution in as soon as possible is so important.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3er7u-1w1lt-4qqlpo4/)
---
| | [CHIP IN TO GROW THE RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3er7u-1w1lu-4qqlpo5/)
---

When we say that we’re tired of empty grocery shelves and high gas prices, we’re told that those aren’t real problems or that the way to solve them is to hand Democrats even more power.

When we say that we want fair and secure elections with policies like Voter ID, we’re shouted down as racists, despite the fact that Americans across the board support Voter ID.

When we say that we’re DONE with closures, shut-downs and mandates, we’re told that we aren’t compassionate enough and that breaking the economy and violating people’s freedoms is necessary for public health.

---
| | [CHIP IN TO GROW THE RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3er7u-1w1lv-4qqlpo6/)
---

**With a track record like this, it’s no wonder that Americans are turning their backs on the Democrats in droves and supporting GOP candidates who offer a better vision for America. **

Some Democrats are now waking up to the fact that they’ve earned the ire of the American people, but instead of shifting course and listening to them, they’re opting to call it quits and retire.

I’m committed to rolling with this Red Wave all the way to November, where I know we can deliver a historic victory for the American people. But our movement relies on people like you to keep us going.

**[I’m asking personally for you to chip in to help us turn the tide for America and deliver this Red Wave.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3er7u-1w1lw-4qqlpo7/ "I’m asking personally for you to chip in to help us turn the tide for America and deliver this Red Wave.")**

Let’s kick the Democrats out of power and take our country back.

Never Give An Inch,

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3er7u-1w1lx-4qqlpo8/)
---
Mike Pompeo
---
| |
Help Champion American Values: Text **CHAMPION** to **29910**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3er7u-1w1ly-4qqlpo9/ "PompeoEmailFooter")
---

**A Personal Note from Mike Pompeo**

With the Freedom Fund, I am supporting candidates across America who will defend the freedoms and values that make America great. From Iowa to Texas to California, I’m supporting principled conservatives who we can count on to keep their promises and deliver results. But our efforts will only be successful if we have the financial resources necessary to counter the big bucks flowing into the Democrat campaigns.

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3er7u-1w1lz-4qqlpo0/ "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.")**

Hi team -- I want you to know that I reviewed this community's past survey responses and was extremely impressed.

**That's why, after careful consideration and multiple conversations with our Senior Leadership Team, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Majority Strategy Group.**

The handful of folks in this group provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and are helping us finalize the Democratic Party's official strategy to defend and expand our Senate majority.

We were _only_ able to flip the Senate because of the strategic decisions you helped us make leading up to the 2020 elections. And I'm 100% confident your input will help us win again.

**[So please, click this link to accept my personal invitation right away.](https://go.dscc.org/go/5995?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220201-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220201-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=2802%2E9716520%2EMuglEj)**

_*To maintain the integrity of our data, we ask that you please do not share your link with non-members._

I'm excited to have you on the team!

Christie
DSCC Executive Director

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Biden Busted Bussing in Illegals!
disclaimer_text: PAID for by YOU and other taxpayers!
body:
A few days ago, I received a tip regarding a massive bussing operation of illegal aliens into Florida.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4VZb892olKnpSI3ejh3e0VgQ/GTWCwCS6f73PYWq8ZyFyeg) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4VZb892olKnpSI3ejh3e0VgQ/GTWCwCS6f73PYWq8ZyFyeg)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4VZb892olKnpSI3ejh3e0VgQ/GTWCwCS6f73PYWq8ZyFyeg)
Patriot,

A few days ago, I received a tip regarding a massive bussing operation of illegal aliens into Florida.

So, over the weekend, I camped out in a vehicle outside of the Extended Stay in Maitland, Florida, and sure enough, busloads of Mexican migrant men were unloaded and checked into the hotel!

After speaking to workers outside of the hotel who have been witnesses to this bussing operation for the last few months, they told me that hundreds of these hispanic migrant men have been bussed in to that very hotel for months, and that they’ve seen about 400 bussed into the hotel within the last four days alone!

[**Watch the video I filmed here:**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4VZb892olKnpSI3ejh3e0VgQ/GTWCwCS6f73PYWq8ZyFyeg)

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4VZb892olKnpSI3ejh3e0VgQ/GTWCwCS6f73PYWq8ZyFyeg)
**And this is happening all across America, backed and funded by the Biden Administration!**

These interstate migrant bussing operations are nothing more than taxpayer-funded human trafficking designed to bypass our hardworking (and frustrated) Border Patrol agents!

[**Help me keep exposing the Biden administration by backing my campaign today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/4VZb892olKnpSI3ejh3e0VgQ/GTWCwCS6f73PYWq8ZyFyeg)

Back in November, Governor DeSantis put the Biden Administration on notice for flying in illegals in the dead of night to Jacksonville, Florida, to have them scattered around the state with no oversight – and no way to ever get them back out of our country.

Biden is excusing this human trafficking as legal, visa-stamped immigration, however, visa overstays have exceeded illegal border crossings for EIGHT years in the United States!

The influx of illegal aliens into our country is being PAID for by YOU and other taxpayers!

body:
This is what we’re up against, friend. A GOP candidate for the state legislature is openly calling for people to “show up armed” to monitor our elections.

Jocelyn responded this morning and when asked directly, she labeled the type of behavior he is suggesting a “crime.”
Watch it here>> https://twitter.com/brikeilarcnn/status/1488507398709035014

Statements like these underscore the extent to which conspiracies and violence are now plaguing our elections. Before 2020, this type of behavior existed on the fringes of our politics. Now, candidates are using violent rhetoric to energize their supporters and push their extremist views into the mainstream .

Jocelyn is calling them out and fighting to put a stop to it. Let’s show her we have her back.

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

What can we say to get you to make your
very first donation to
Justice Democrats?

What if we told you that everything is stacked against us? The Democratic
establishment, Wall Street, GOP extremists, Big Oil... they all want to see
us fail. And they’re willing to spend big to smear us and defeat a
working-class progressive agenda. So much big corporate PAC money goes
towards trying to stop us from electing progressives like Jessica
Cisneros, Cori Bush, and Ilhan Omar.

What if we said our average donation this year is just $17.67? We rely on
small-dollar grassroots contributions from folks like you, whether it’s
$3, $10, $27, or more, this support is the only thing that can keep us
building, organizing, and winning progressive primaries.

And what if we told you our very first 2022 primaries start voting in less
than 2 weeks? Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros is facing an
anti-abortion, corporate-backed Democrat that has millions of campaign
cash from Big Pharma, fossil fuel executives, and private prisons. Your
help right now can help us win this race.

Peter? Can you step up at this
critical time and make your very
first contribution to Justice Democrats? $3
or anything at all can help us defeat the Democratic establishment and
make 2022 a big year for our slate of candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91525?refcode=em20220201-21760&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21760%2E1203867%2ETuF1Vy ]Contribute $3

Justice Democrats

name: Nate Sandvig
subject: PRESS RELEASE: NATE SANDVIG OUTRAISES ENTIRE FIELD IN OREGON’S 6TH CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sandvig for Congress
body:
| | |
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****FEBRUARY 1, 2022****CONTACT: press@sandvigforcongress.com** **NATE SANDVIG OUTRAISES ENTIRE FIELD ****IN OREGON’S 6TH CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT** Sandvig Outraised All Democrat and Republican Challengers - Has Triple Cash on Hand of Next Closest GOP Rival **Oregon’s 6th Congressional District** \- Nate Sandvig, West Point graduate, Iraq veteran, and energy executive, commented today on the now public fundraising numbers for all candidates in Oregon’s 6th Congressional District ending 2021. By the numbers, Sandvig has outraised every Democrat and every Republican in the field. At $186,000 total, Sandvig outraised Democrat Loretta Smith by over $10,000. In addition, Sandvig has over triple the Cash on Hand of his next closest challenger, Ron Noble, who has $31,000 in the bank. **_"This is a wide open race. It's anyone's game and this district is by no means a shoe-in for Democrats," Sandvig said. "My current attitude is to put in the hard work, raising the resources and organizing the ground game that will talk directly to voters about the issues that matter to them -- getting back to normal, education, crime and cost of living. All of these issues Republicans win on. Of course I'm thrilled to have outraised everyone in the field, but that doesn't mean anything unless we win"_** **_###_**
---
**About Nate Sandvig** As a father of four, a West Point graduate, and an energy executive, Nate Sandvig lives every day to embody his belief in service and duty over self. He’s running for Congress to serve his country as he has before in the U.S. Army. As an Iraq veteran, Nate knows what it means to protect our freedoms, and he’ll bring his drive, relentless determination, and plain old common-sense to Washington. Nate’s record of service makes him the right man for this mission of returning sanity to Congress. Nate will serve as a voice for the quiet majority in Oregon’s 6th Congressional District that wants a check and balance against the overreaches of current one-party rule in Oregon and Washington D.C. Nate believes that common sense must be restored over an insane political regime that has led us down a path of nonsensical and unscientific COVID restrictions targeting our liberty, punishing our small businesses, and preventing our children from getting an education and growing up the right way. Nate believes it’s time we stop living in fear, and that we must confront Cancel Culture, the Outrage-Industrial-Complex, and the soaring violence, vandalism, and preventable urban decay on display in a once great city of Portland. Nate has served and protected this country before overseas, and is now focused on the internal threats challenging our nation’s foundations. **About Oregon’s new 6th Congressional District** **A prime pickup opportunity for Republicans in 2022:**
* Encompasses parts of: Clackamas, Marion, Polk, and Washington counties, and the entirety of Yamhill County.
* In 2018 in OR-06, Republican gubernatorial nominee Knute Buehler came within 3/10’s of 1% point to defeating incumbent Governor Kate Brown in a Democratic wave year.
* In previous election cycles, Republicans have carried the entirety of this district by a comfortable margin.
* According to The Oregonian/OregonLive’s analysis, OR-06 “[leans only slightly blue](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/3ef8b7a47c2bd526/0a708a58e89be6e5c3d6b838967d376c/37283)” and “[is competitive](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/3ef8b7a47c2bd526/7bad218607705c45c3d6b838967d376c/37283).”

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Will you help us in making new history?
body:
Change has never been made alone. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,
Today marks the beginning of two very important celebrations.

First, I would like to wish you all a very happy Lunar New Year! I hope that the Year of the Tiger will usher in a year of prosperity, good health, and abundance. The Tiger has always been a symbol of strength, bravery, and courage.

Second, I want to honor the giants whose shoulders I stand on—black leaders who have paved the way. Particularly the matriarchs of my family, growing up in Louisiana, my grandmother started working on a plantation at five years old, and her persistence in civic engagement and the fight for liberation is why I’m in this work. Please join me in celebrating this rich history during Black History Month and all year. Without their contributions and sacrifices, we would not be the nation we are today. It is also essential to carry on the legacy left for us and continue pushing for a more just society for all.

One thing can be sure as we celebrate the past and look toward the future. Change has never been made alone. In this newsletter, there are straightforward ways for you to join us in our fight for a better nation, one that has a place for all of us.

Thank you so much for your support, and I look forward to fighting by your side.
Best,
Brencia Berry
Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
|
---
| **Join & Share the Campaign Readiness Project** It is essential we train people on building diverse and culturally competent coalitions on the ground! **Can you think of 5 people that value community engagement in marginalized communities?** Please share this opportunity with them!

The Campaign Readiness Project is a train-to-hire bootcamp at the DNC with the goal of supporting states in their recruitment, training, and hiring of diverse, talented, and local staff for specific roles and skill sets on Coordinated Campaigns. Participation in these bootcamps will expand opportunities for consideration for campaign roles in targeted states with the aim of helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot. The Coalitions Bootcamp will be held virtually on **Saturday, February 26.** **Apply for the Campaign Readiness Project Coalitions Bootcamp today!** Applications close February 11.
---
| [Apply Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=eed2827625&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Apply Here")

|

|
---
---

**Michigan:**
**[Black Outreach Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=21b2843191&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[Arab American Outreach Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=c9a2f8e7de&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[Latinx Outreach Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d28bfd56fc&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[Labor Outreach Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=0238f8b4a8&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**

**Nevada:**
**[Coalitions Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=908b481476&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**

**Ohio:**
**[Latino Outreach Director ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9aec72fc00&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[African American Outreach Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7b2fd8f166&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**

**Pennsylvania:**
**[Coalitions Program Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=5179296c33&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[Black Coalitions Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=63083d7dca&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[Latino Coalitions Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=cef4110e17&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
**[Youth Coalitions Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1e3c165a91&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
[AAPI Coalitions Director](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7a56df3007&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**
---
|
---
|
---
| **Happy Lunar New Year!** Best wishes to all those celebrating the Year of the Tiger. The DNC hopes that this new year brings about a new beginning and ushers in an era of hope, growth, and progress. We want to celebrate the diverse and rich cultures that span our nation and that are a vital part to our country’s identity. Diversity is a strength of our party, and it is important that we continue to advance our values of inclusion. The future of our nation will affect all who reside in it, and even those abroad, not just the select few.
---
|
---
|
---
| **Celebrating Black History Month** In the month of February, the DNC celebrates the irreplaceable contributions of Black Americans to our nation. The achievements of historical giants such as Marsha P. Johnson, Fannie Lou Hamer, and C.T. Vivian, among many others, have done so much to not only enrich our country, but the world at large. Along with this celebration, it is just as vital to recognize the barriers put ahead of them solely because of the color of their skin. Many of these same barriers still remain today, and the Democratic Party is fully committed to the continued fight for justice.
---
|
---

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: CAUCUS TONIGHT!!!
body:
| Peter -- Tonight is the night Minnesotans begin to choose our next governor. Will it be another failed career politician? Or will it be an authentic, constitutional conservative who is ready to take on the Radical left...and WIN! **You get to choose tonight. And I hope you choose Dr. Neil Shah!** Senators Jensen, Benson, and Gazelka gave YOUR tax dollars to Planned Parenthood. They voted to bail out Obamacare with your tax money. They refused to give back budget surpluses, voted to take on more debt, raised your taxes, and grew government by billions of dollars. Minnesota cannot survive another four years of career politicians serving their own interests at your expense. **As your next governor I will...**
* **Stop all mandates and vaccine passports on day one**

* **Implement school choice**

* **Pass the Never Again Bill**

* **Defend unborn lives**

* **Ban Critical Race Theory**

* **Resecure our streets**

* **Eliminate the income tax**

* **Cut government spending**

* **And immediately give the budget surplus back to you!**

The career politicians have had their chance. The time has long passed for conservative citizen leadership to rise up and take back control of our state and our country. This is what the founders of our country intended. If you’ve had enough like I have, attend your local precinct caucus, sign up to be a delegate, and vote for me, Dr. Neil Shah, in the straw poll. If you stay home, the career politicians will win again. It’s up to you to take your state back. **Visit**[**caucusfinder.com**](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=_d5-EuBDQXAfzYGyHxaYyZmGYuAqQstW_FdN4Nk6O6JeDSPxRW1aMjAVOKYoUNsn&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=caucus_day&n=1)**to find your local precinct caucus, and reply to this email if you have any questions.** I hope to see you there! Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor electneil.com [](http://electneil.nationbuilder.com/?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=caucus_day&n=2)
---

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: I wanted to share my gratitude
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Yesterday, we closed the books on the first month of the election year! My team and I set an ambitious online end-of-month fundraising goal to help us start the year strong and ensure we have the resources to protect my seat and the Democratic House majority. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41325907/328315862/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDljYWRlNS1hMTgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TFdxzAIkj3Y2lEhOrSR49uYXLNy3vHafM4HJck3wvSk=&emci=b5aebf28-8483-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=b09cade5-a183-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Yesterday, we closed the books on the first month of the election year! My team and I set an ambitious online end-of-month fundraising goal to help us start the year strong and ensure we have the resources to protect my seat and the Democratic House majority.

**Thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal!**

I'm so grateful for each of you, Peter. We're facing our toughest race yet this year and your support in reaching our goal puts us in a better position to take on my opponents and national Republicans.

We still have many challenges ahead of us, but I know that if we continue to work together, we can defend my seat and the Democratic House majority this November.

Thank you,

Kim

clean_body: Yesterday, we closed the books on the first month of the election year! My team and I set an ambitious online end-of-month fundraising goal to help us start the year strong and ensure we have the resources to protect my seat and the Democratic House majority. Peter, Yesterday, we closed the books on the first month of the election year! My team and I set an ambitious online end-of-month fundraising goal to help us start the year strong and ensure we have the resources to protect my seat and the Democratic House majority. Thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal! I'm so grateful for each of you, Peter. We're facing our toughest race yet this year and your support in reaching our goal puts us in a better position to take on my opponents and national Republicans. We still have many challenges ahead of us, but I know that if we continue to work together, we can defend my seat and the Democratic House majority this November. Thank you, Kim To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

My school district successfully remained open during the 2020/2021 school year without a single case of COVID being traced to the classroom. When I showed Oregon that schools could be safely open amidst COVID, the current authoritarian government came down hard. The pushback from the radical left does not deter me, rather makes me more resolute to protect individual freedom.
Throughout my career, I have put the needs of people before political games to focus on making real, meaningful progress for families across our state. **As Oregon Governor, I will continue to serve the people- not the system.
**
**To achieve this goal, I need your help!
**
To be eligible for the **televised Republican Gubernatorial debate** , the Oregon Republican Party requires **1,000 donors by March 1st****.** **We still need several hundred donors!
**

clean_body: | | | | Hi Friend, Last Friday, I was on telling my story of fighting for our children and the well-being of all Oregonians. My school district successfully remained open during the 2020/2021 school year without a single case of COVID being traced to the classroom. When I showed Oregon that schools could be safely open amidst COVID, the current authoritarian government came down hard. The pushback from the radical left does not deter me, rather makes me more resolute to protect individual freedom. Throughout my career, I have put the needs of people before political games to focus on making real, meaningful progress for families across our state. As Oregon Governor, I will continue to serve the people- not the system. To achieve this goal, I need your help! To be eligible for the televised Republican Gubernatorial debate , the Oregon Republican Party requires 1,000 donors by March 1st. We still need several hundred donors! Double your impact by enlisting friends and family to make an immediate contribution to help us ACHIEVE OUR GOAL OF 1,000 DONORS! Chip in ANY AMOUNT on the link below! Our campaign volunteers are working hard to achieve this goal, but time is running out and we need your help! If you value individual freedom, help us achieve our goal by taking 3 quick actions: 1. Share on social media 2. Forward this email to a relative, friend, or colleague asking them to support the 3. Make your best donation and recruit friends and family TODAY to make an immediate gift to achieve our 1000 donation threshold to qualify for THE BIG EVENT! Time is running out! | | | | | Friend, can I count on your continuous support to strengthen our fight to restore freedom and dignity for all people of Oregon? Let’s do this—together we are stronger! Best wishes, Marc Thielman | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM_ PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

name: Doug Gansler
subject: Honoring Black history in Maryland
body:
In celebrating Black history this month and beyond, we must take action to ensure everyone is included in Maryland's sunlight of opportunity. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7VR8DS_OkCFqKJAu_9sMqlKHriJ_B_L8O88_5K-i6_srDXVl2qAEn5ykKW6QRd0pBMrzrg1K2eLbWL0qcWRRZC1M2eUinFJ3sXoXxk_dPhQqdYMTPtCV7jjL99D3ihcNTiFdSPycxMczv5oxE1CSdVF3fsgxzRH0mtgSL6clj6RPAz6AnQatWq7RoeiopAFyuQMNyHu_pLGohae6u6plQSqksCoGOABfWZ2qKQ2pWOYCA/3j7/j9hn-rDESpi0hxkKjVxH_g/h0/tNN7xKYFt2pVoaDQ5zJf5JTc933V_5Q1At0-5I6Sysk)
---
Hi friends, **February is Black History Month, a time to honor the amazing Black Marylanders****who have shined a light on our state.** We celebrate Maryland heroes like Juanita Jackson Mitchell, Harriet Tubman, Frederick Douglass, and Thurgood Marshall, whose legacies changed the course of history. We also honor the entire community of Black Marylanders who have shaped our state's heritage and culture for generations. In reflecting on these invaluable contributions, however,**it is clear our state has yet to acknowledge and repair centuries of oppression and discrimination.** **[My racial justice plan](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7VR8DS_OkCFqKJAu_9sMqlKHriJ_B_L8O88_5K-i6_srDXVl2qAEn5ykKW6QRd0pBNWnCANQk4XcTRKAj05T57Z5od3Aktn6_5NQ8iUdBS8l39h3f8uvXHUc65Dtz4wvQd4405VgEn0P48u0hutJfEiT_6Z9Cdrpo3lgew_xO-W6noKWX1vpi6NvXGrAnHi2EUPhGq1CaisciAWmKqx0_z6NXlTerNrSQwJd82_HRwJ2w/3j7/j9hn-rDESpi0hxkKjVxH_g/h1/kbWqUAJgSKu24lIYQkTjm6AanZgNhNfbPjJYtynqYu8) **is named and designed for those who have been left out of what Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. described as the, "sunlight of opportunity," with five key areas:
---
1. [Criminal justice reform and public safety](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7VR8DS_OkCFqKJAu_9sMqlKHriJ_B_L8O88_5K-i6_srDXVl2qAEn5ykKW6QRd0pBNj1DyooPd4BDv0cWuRi-DxTKEbdKd3vMeX9dqY6P7wtvO9x4YzubP7NUZiXui1qj0YWSuu0VSgDwwbv-UdII2drTuGuYgjDUVsG_cjCLboZmmtdB_Wm8xMHOZuaY_qEew3uru7oCrRDRoDb5faLlIJLUBFhT6oMfCWHP5h0HFNIw/3j7/j9hn-rDESpi0hxkKjVxH_g/h2/7SLAGwkncDxRNloSaDJ78kJMDpFrDcWUH-DKWXO6ttk)
2. [Education, pre-K, and universal childcare](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7VR8DS_OkCFqKJAu_9sMqlKHriJ_B_L8O88_5K-i6_srDXVl2qAEn5ykKW6QRd0pBNnF-OUzbx_YoyvPQ59aun6MhNz5uGh1oCYepxPj0GyeCHRNguqZQkKbklt2m-_AAJGGs6oNk1EMNKa3FYY6jKaYFnMAvVcTgzyYJF-FfaiJbPZAYF2QZyI29a9lCzIW_tpA4tj5VxM08KB9NOYTGmcXobUm_IOTxRKLlOlwY3OHg/3j7/j9hn-rDESpi0hxkKjVxH_g/h3/EftAJmaL6n-8n6PA5VSplySfmNUCsn0eV5O9hiOMWwE)
3. [Employment and the economy](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7VR8DS_OkCFqKJAu_9sMqlKHriJ_B_L8O88_5K-i6_srDXVl2qAEn5ykKW6QRd0pBMnM9_2llnMaw_718F1lHEjg8GHqIT7Gg4BJHqhYO_dkAcR_22OAFIvRhl6Ylo3XVfKBqsWEV8RC5fjITFau8EuF7nzXngQsxzbKQ3gsdhPZs2O4PnszNS1yyXEkA1Ok2mx8KWrdm9UmxJUpVQsWsv3N-CT773ZPDo9b5o9_1Jqcg/3j7/j9hn-rDESpi0hxkKjVxH_g/h4/yQG2qPzS_Hg-LOEdtoXUlOvbMDQSYTMyB4KOtzgqhqI)
4. [Affordable housing and transit](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7VR8DS_OkCFqKJAu_9sMqlKHriJ_B_L8O88_5K-i6_srDXVl2qAEn5ykKW6QRd0pBMJv8ou-Z15BBHYgJ0bGKBdv2eTXFxtMeIkI1ekRBUcP2kp31tQGI0nfe4wV_pPDwTGvoGwKhICZeMOSO0UNOeh1sn-8hQtcEQFlHMbduabX24th53Ys32EjaCGwzAypNNc1EoeiHTm9bR6Au2ome9pgPQbQ-IUSE9agn6kj9QKBQ/3j7/j9hn-rDESpi0hxkKjVxH_g/h5/jaJAu1KnsdT9lO8FW-BwEiijtksmhId5nTb4JdlvrUA)
5. [Environmental justice](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0jlFmy0tHsxupmAVrXqus7VR8DS_OkCFqKJAu_9sMqlKHriJ_B_L8O88_5K-i6_srDXVl2qAEn5ykKW6QRd0pBPqbJaf27F65qPnciiQDY90PmbwbWX2ng8JJeO_UlGvh41R9FmmATPI0VanWsS2HhUDjg03d49rchJCaezmYQsL5bU2-ROMxe77e8raZ_nfZEyIJUyDaf13v-it7Ai573YqZCZ9wd1OuQHhX8gQ8m-IJoH-kUcER2_GHKaTPjzGrQ/3j7/j9hn-rDESpi0hxkKjVxH_g/h6/1OUD48NX1FFY4sTGA0rFXSoAukiMA6qyJSHxhDSOIlY)

clean_body: In celebrating Black history this month and beyond, we must take action to ensure everyone is included in Maryland's sunlight of opportunity. | | Hi friends, February is Black History Month, a time to honor the amazing Black Marylanderswho have shined a light on our state. We celebrate Maryland heroes like Juanita Jackson Mitchell, Harriet Tubman, Frederick Douglass, and Thurgood Marshall, whose legacies changed the course of history. We also honor the entire community of Black Marylanders who have shaped our state's heritage and culture for generations. In reflecting on these invaluable contributions, however,it is clear our state has yet to acknowledge and repair centuries of oppression and discrimination. is named and designed for those who have been left out of what Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. described as the, "sunlight of opportunity," with five key areas: 1. 2. 3. 4. 5. As we celebrate Black history this month and beyond, we must also take action to ensure everyone is included in Maryland's sunlight of opportunity. Together, we will create a brighter future for all Marylanders. Doug By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

| | | Friend, Thank you to everyone who came out to Freshwater Farms to support the launch of my campaign for United States Senate! **We’re going to get leadership that works for the 603 - not D.C. - and bring the same success that we have shown in the Granite State straight to our nation’s capital.**

---
| |
---
| | [HELP MAKE THIS CAMPAIGN A SUCCESS!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc2MTc1Mjk3MjAwNTI4Mjk2JmM9ZThvNiZlPTAmYj04OTA4MzY1NDQmZD1oNHI0ajJs.7XkSuj0NxhaQAMUKF5IBhpbF5sBYMwpJsnM3LEeEHCc)

---
---
| | | **When the stakes are this high - and Washington is this out of control - it takes strong, proven leadership to protect our New Hampshire way of life from the priorities of liberals in D.C.** Democracy, free markets, and the very foundation of our way of life is being attacked every day... and unless we get representation that works for _US_ \- not for the political elite in our nation’s capital - this is only going to get worse. But I’m confident that we can restore leadership that preserves the America we know. The same dream that propelled me from working at Dairy Queen, to opening my own successful small business, and to eventually work for you in the State Senate. And once we move on from the days of Maggie Hassan greenlighting every item in Chuck Schumer’s radical agenda, we can finally make sure New Hampshire is represented in Washington, D.C. - **_not the other way around!_**

---
| |
---
| | [SUPPORT THE CAMPAIGN!](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODc2MTc1Mjk3MjAwNTI4Mjk2JmM9ZThvNiZlPTAmYj04OTA4MzY2NDYmZD16OXY1bDB0.SRS_Gp9y59SGOzUJp6E79h_sQxaGUXEjpDcAA7Jt9CQ)

body:
Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election.
Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. |
---
_**$9.8 million is an incredible sum of money to raise in three short months. If we're going to pull off a win in November, we MUST close the gap financially.**_

[](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkMtuwjAQRb_G7IwSJ05gkQUlQUDpC1qkriLHHhIj20GOQ0u_vg6iLCqNRvK5njsPkZE4jSMYyYwExEcQhkmQxPFYhAdBaVVREJMpJBGKA81qxriTrWEKrBvzVo-aLOEhSwmtAjoJplEQTicUWEpDEnuLSlQjlTXOnToUzRBZ-OiA9xbGX9JYEIOJZw6Yxg3YjjegsDTcsyMzuO2dZbIDgYU7YouiRe902bW95YCi3MIZkWRAnOkTk7Xx8F5zkzQI2WsvgGZSedhx_7iuG5K0XBbb3XxZbMqiKPP3dbmePeOXj_ftbLUr8nJb7Af616U1Dozz5YYr_Pj2Sj_z7zfnvFwaJYUX_sFGim5ozTarvaknI5uJ05dUSnZJ6k9aDyNdD-nnV_JwyVD6gAi5lhFyvRmp9-djvyU_Tw6fDcXFUW-CQSRzn93lBPefN5PxbVOC0vwX25mX7Q)

Friend,

Our opponent just announced his 4th quarter fundraising report, and it was significantly more than what we raised.

**In fact, it was the most raised by any senate candidate in the whole country!**

While there was little doubt that national Democrats and special interests would pour money into our opponent's bank account last quarter, it was an eye-popping amount. _**Over 90% of the money came from outside Georgia!**_

We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap.

**[Friend, we urgently need your help TODAY.](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkMtuwjAQRb_G7BwlzgsWWVAIAkSpSinqLnLsSWJkO6njgOjX10GURaXRSD7Xd148I1EahTARGfGJCz8IEj-JIo8HFY_jsoyBT2eQhCjyFa0pZVa0mkow1mOtmjRZ6POqdJa4CjgFUsZV7FfAIQ2TOPDLdCKzxtquR-EckZWLHthgwLsKbYCPRRyzQBVuwPSsAYmFZo6dqcbtYA0VPXDM7RkbFK4Gq4q-HQwDFC4NXBBJRsSo6qiotYNPz0NSwMWgnACKCulgz9zjvm5A0mKdHz4W63xX5HmxPG6L7XyP3z6Ph_nmI18Wh_w00r8urbagrbNrJvH7Yj_Mvm5V9O3kQkvBnfAPNoL3Y2u625x0PZ2YjHdXIaXok9SdtB5Huh_SzS9FdctQ-oIIudsIud-M1KfLeTiQn1eLLzrG-Vnt_FEkC5ftrYPnz0cR77EpQenyFw2-mKY)** Our opponent is the top fundraiser in the entire U.S. Senate, so any gift you make will help us chip away at his financial advantage and grow our media fund.

[**HELP TEAM HERSCHEL CLOSE THE GAP
CHIP IN $5 →**](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkMuOwiAUhp8Gd5gWetFFF15q1DgziTrdNgjHFgPUANU4Tz_UOC4mOYHw_fznJgqS5AmFkSxIREJEcZxFWZKMRXwWaXo6pSAmU8goSiLNGsa4l51hCqwf806P2gImMaN0mkLOTlnMBQ03E1kO54jH5ExHqmi9vzpEZ4isQjjgvYXxXRoLYkgSmAemcQvW8RYUloYHdmEGd723TDoQWPgLtoiueq9r1_WWA6JLCzdEsgFxpq9MNibAt-claRCy10EAzaQK0PHweI4bk7xel_vDYl3u6rKsl8dtvZ194q_v4362OZTLel9WA_2r0hkPxge74Qqnk-16eq_cfBrk2igpgvAPtlK4oTTbbSrTTEa2ENe7VEq6LA8rbYaWnosM_St5fhQonyNCnjZCnjsjTXW79Hvy8-HxzaS4vOhdNIhkEU7_uML75yvJ-DUpQfnyF8rGl-c)
**Control of the Senate majority will _likely_ hinge on our Georgia race, which is a dead heat according to recent polling.**

I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. While I know money certainly isn't everything in campaigns, it's still important for candidates who are running in statewide races like we are.

[**HELP TEAM HERSCHEL CATCH UP
CHIP IN $5 →**](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJxdkMtuwjAQRb_G7BwFJyRhkQWPUEC0lYAidRUZe5IY2Q61HRB8fR1EWVQajeRzPa_LcxKncQQDkZOQ-AiHwyRM4jjgw4qPRsfjCHg2hiRCcahoTSlzotVUgnEBa9WgybOM0SgZV-MMSJXSMA4TFo1pRuKqoiHQgcwb584WRRNEFj4ssM5AcBXaAO-beOaAKtyAsawBiYVmnp2oxm3nDBUWOObuhA2KFp1TpW07wwBFcwMXRJIeMarOVNTaw1fNU1LARae8AIoK6aFl_vE4d0jScllsd7NlsSmLopzv1-V68oE_v_bbyWpXzMttcejp35RWO9DOl2smcWy_zZub3n9qL5daCu6Ff7AR3Paj6WZ10HU2MDk_X4WUwiapt7TuV3oY6feXorrlKJ0iQh5lhDw8I_Xhcuq25P7u8EWPcHFSm7AXycxndzvD6-ezSfC8lKB0_gtCy5k3)
**This race is a TOSS-UP.**

Because of the cash advantage our opponent holds over us, he will be able to start reaching out to voters sooner than we can via TV ads, radio ads, social media ads, direct mail and billboards.

We can't let our opponent get too much of a head start in advertising, so we've got to close the fundraising gap.

_**[Will you do us a personal favor and donate a few bucks before midnight for our media fund? clean_body: Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia election. | $9.8 million is an incredible sum of money to raise in three short months. If we're going to pull off a win in November, we MUST close the gap financially. Friend, Our opponent just announced his 4th quarter fundraising report, and it was significantly more than what we raised. In fact, it was the most raised by any senate candidate in the whole country! While there was little doubt that national Democrats and special interests would pour money into our opponent's bank account last quarter, it was an eye-popping amount. Over 90% of the money came from outside Georgia! We were outraised the last two quarters, but we still have time to close the fundraising gap. Our opponent is the top fundraiser in the entire U.S. Senate, so any gift you make will help us chip away at his financial advantage and grow our media fund. Control of the Senate majority will likely hinge on our Georgia race, which is a dead heat according to recent polling. I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before. While I know money certainly isn't everything in campaigns, it's still important for candidates who are running in statewide races like we are. This race is a TOSS-UP. Because of the cash advantage our opponent holds over us, he will be able to start reaching out to voters sooner than we can via TV ads, radio ads, social media ads, direct mail and billboards. We can't let our opponent get too much of a head start in advertising, so we've got to close the fundraising gap. - Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr08rrfs2ode226av0qhuk42g2ifu8cc9677gmbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgm9oj4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttkmdq3fc9le1jmecj6c4o68t70ceqrdc34slpb2t73cpqe6sb2m2r64c9hedgefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aoljckrr4cb6ejib6oj7m2qmash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoqbfkgveiq0h9b6i396b8e5956u65p3qv6mop2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgm9oj4c5h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0ou1a4ud7nms1ajmlcldb50ntptsraq7u0322p8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgm9oj4c5h2bs)[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu5g51rji0koq6p3aetto2nv7f2ak9fu2sa0p048_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgm9oj4c5h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhikmu3hkfvqajk3t0lm2ph0e1b7ho4ji4vg9eh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgm9oj4c5h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg2938socglfdje5976g629nsbdi878l1dqrtejg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6ctgm9oj4c5h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

| For years we've had politicians go to Washington and become part of the Swamp, instead of going there the fight it. But Kathy Barnette has made it clear that she is ready for this fight.
From cross-crossing the commonwealth at about 1,000 miles per week, to reaching minority communities and bringing in new faces to the Republican Party, it's CLEAR that we need Kathy in D.C. fighting for us.
If you're on board, we need to ensure Kathy has the resources to compete with the out-of-state carpetbaggers in this race. * Illegals are POURING across our border and the current Governor is complicit in allowing this invasion
* Vaccines are being mandated or Texans will lose their jobs
* Candidates for Governor are calling for the confiscation of our guns

We are ahead in the polls and we must keep our momentum strong. subject: BREAKING NEWS: Gibbons Takes Lead in U.S. Senate Primary
body:
Latest Poll Results
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r37Oo0s1t6gCDaDvh6fzsP2kbdqelRpXTKsXdlDbqm8hMx4Vz7lwgYpIv2LyNDjuQ0QsvfvccQMSvhL8KqSPL6HL5hUVLyMnt2CGg4ijUHJUer5CETBc_bMYyiFZknCCDysosNLubJ47GEiSjvoc3qEzp-KbZovyyzk47CyerGyE_nLl2X3Juw==&c=kLRrr_eMU4m8ZfifJiR1mxlrFZHmGhr6SrOE8ka7dvR9Tc5qBCVsag==&ch=ZCHWm3TorUmWQqA58CaQIKFiSHKpXT0SvPeD4Hh2pkQkwdIoLvpUhA==)
---
|
BREAKING NEWS:
Gibbons Surges To The Top Of The Field

Mike Gibbons has taken the lead in the Ohio Senate Republican primary field! The poll was conducted between January 28-30, 2022 by Cygnal, a top rated national GOP polling firm.
---
|
---
| | |
---
|
"I am incredibly excited that our message of preserving the American dream is resonating with Ohio voters. As I travel the state, I am hearing from hardworking Ohioans that they want a true America First conservative to represent them in Washington. I am humbled that a growing number of Ohioans are putting their faith in me to be their next U.S. Senator," Gibbons stated.
Key findings of the poll:
* Gibbons holds a 3% lead over Mandel while the other candidates are in single digits.
* Gibbons' strongest support comes from voters 55 years of age or older and self-identified Trump Republicans.
* Gibbons leads by 9% among self-identified Very Conservative voters
* Gibbons leads among Evangelical Protestants, Mainline Protestants and Catholic voters.

See the full polling memo below:
---
|
---
| This exciting news comes on the heels of a poll showing that Mike is leading every other candidate in head-to-head contests.
---
|
---
| As you can see, Mike has become the frontrunner of the race and the momentum of our campaign continues to grow.
As you know, Mike is determined to win and will continue spreading his America First message across Ohio
I hope you'll join us in the fight for continued freedom in America. Email us at [info@gibbonsforohio.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r37Oo0s1t6gCDaDvh6fzsP2kbdqelRpXTKsXdlDbqm8hMx4Vz7lwgS2y-5Aw9a7CTk4xiOL4h7mUb5lLDIrjLM9liBcYjcnRvtSxJHP7d0Lqe2zdGmHQTNSF_AqbldFOjHGAkDgzBy3uaI5FYN1rYb3NDDUwJuioctJAh8LEPMj9SRMtQBiSb6dRKQ0DucAkoLDxuRCD3yM=&c=kLRrr_eMU4m8ZfifJiR1mxlrFZHmGhr6SrOE8ka7dvR9Tc5qBCVsag==&ch=ZCHWm3TorUmWQqA58CaQIKFiSHKpXT0SvPeD4Hh2pkQkwdIoLvpUhA==) with any questions.

Sincerely, Wes Farno Campaign Manager

See the full polling memo below: | | This exciting news comes on the heels of a poll showing that Mike is leading every other candidate in head-to-head contests. | | As you can see, Mike has become the frontrunner of the race and the momentum of our campaign continues to grow. As you know, Mike is determined to win and will continue spreading his America First message across Ohio I hope you'll join us in the fight for continued freedom in America. Email us at == with any questions. Sincerely, Wes Farno Campaign Manager | | | | == == == | == | www.GibbonsforOhio.com | | Gibbons for Ohio | 14500 Lorain Ave #110644, Cleveland, OH 44111 | | Sent by mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com powered by

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: ALERT: Must Attend Caucus Tonight
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **This is really important!** If you want to pass the Never Again Bill and Stop Vaccine Mandates, you MUST attend your precinct caucus tonight. This is our best chance to show the Political Class we are fed up with the mandates! Have you been watching the truckers in Canada? What a powerful movement, but it pales in comparison to what you have the power to do tonight. We can have our own version of this if we show up to caucus tonight and **BECOME A DELEGATE!** Caucus starts at 7pm at your precinct location ([**FIND IT HERE**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=_d5-EuBDQXAfzYGyHxaYyZmGYuAqQstW_FdN4Nk6O6JeDSPxRW1aMjAVOKYoUNsn&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=2)). Show up early, if you can. If we all show up, then politicians will be forced to come our way. In fact, it's already working. Just yesterday Senator Eric Pratt (R-55) [signed on to the Never Again Bill](https://www.action4liberty.com/another_senator_signs_onto_the_never_again_bill?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=3). Looks like all our work in his district made it clear that he better get on board. We have momentum, but MUST continue to show up.
## Are you ready to take back our government?!
Let me be brief. Watch this video and visit our [**Caucus Info Page**](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=4) to learn everything you need to learn about tonight. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=5) The biggest thing to take away from the video is to **BECOME A DELEGATE **at caucus tonight! Just sign your name on the signup form, and you'll likely be in! Make sure to print out the Never Again Resolution and Stop Vaccine Mandates Resolution to take with you. Your caucus convener will ask who wants to submit a resolution to the Party Platform. That's when you hand it to them. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/resolutions?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=6 "Print the Resolutions") [Print the Resolutions](https://www.action4liberty.com/resolutions?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=6)
---
Then show up by 7 pm tonight (try to be early) at your [caucus location](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=_d5-EuBDQXAfzYGyHxaYyZmGYuAqQstW_FdN4Nk6O6JeDSPxRW1aMjAVOKYoUNsn&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=7). When they pass around the delegate sign up sheet, make sure to put down your name so your voice is amplified!
## **It's really that simple!**
Trust me, the Political Class wants you to stay at home and not get involved. But they are shaking in their boots right now knowing that you and thousands upon thousands of Action 4 Liberty people are showing up all across the state tonight.
There is POWER in numbers. It's time we TAKE BACK our government.
**Please:**
1. **Watch the video to learn about the caucus tonight**
2. **Print the Never Again and Stop Vaccine Mandates Resolutions**
3. **Show up no later than 7 pm to your[precinct caucus location](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=_d5-EuBDQXAfzYGyHxaYyZmGYuAqQstW_FdN4Nk6O6JeDSPxRW1aMjAVOKYoUNsn&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=8)**
4. **Sign up to BECOME A DELEGATE and submit the Resolutions**

Want to help Stop Vaccine Mandates and pass the Never Again Bill even more? We need your help to spread the message to hundreds of thousands of voters in Minnesota. This is a critically important election year.
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 TODAY. We need your help!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=9)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=10).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=11).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=alert_must_attend_tonight&n=12), software for leaders.

name: SCOTUS POLLING (VPP)
subject: poll closing in [60 MINUTES] ⏰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Thanks to Trump’s far-right Supreme Court Justices (like Brett Kavanaugh), public opinion of the Supreme Court is PLUMMETING. | **_As a trusted Democrat in your city, we need to know what YOU think:_** [DO YOU APPROVE OF THE SUPREME COURT?](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=1205%2E878179%2ESMvOD6) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1205%2E878179%2ESMvOD6) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1205%2E878179%2ESMvOD6) | [NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1205%2E878179%2ESMvOD6)
---|---
THIS POLL WILL CLOSE IN ONE HOUR — YOUR RESPONSE IS DUE IMMEDIATELY UPON OPENING THIS EMAIL.
Look, thanks to the work of decades of Republican meddling, the Supreme Court is out of control! The far-right court is:

❌ GUTTING the Voting Rights Act
❌ FAILING to protect workers
❌ And now, they’re aiming to undermine _Roe v. Wade!_

We get sick to our stomachs thinking about justices like Brett Kavanaugh and Amy Coney Barrett — _but we need to hear from our TOP supporters now!_
[DO YOU APPROVE OF THE SUPREME COURT?](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=1205%2E878179%2ESMvOD6) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=1205%2E878179%2ESMvOD6) | [NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/SCOTUS/?source=VPP_20220201_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=1205%2E878179%2ESMvOD6)
---|---
Thank you,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1205%2E878179%2ESMvOD6). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1205%2E878179%2ESMvOD6).**

| | Team, Thank you. Because of this growing grassroots movement and the people like you who power it, our campaign just had its best ever fundraising month. This is the second month in a row we’ve broken our fundraising record – and it’s all thanks to the power of this team. Between our grassroots coalition, the key endorsements we’ve earned from elected leaders across the Commonwealth, and these fundraising figures from January alone, the numbers don’t lie: We’re in this race for the long haul, and we’re in it to win it. There’s still a ways to go, but there’s no doubt that we’re heading in the right direction. Months like January are major for our momentum, and I have faith that we’re building the foundation of something historic. I’m humbled by your support, and I don't take it for granted. Thank you again for helping us move one step closer to our goal of building a Massachusetts that delivers for working families. I’m excited to continue growing this grassroots movement with you on our side. Saludos, Sonia P.S. With the party caucuses rapidly approaching, we’re hard at work ensuring the momentum we’re building translates, and your donations play a vital role in how many Commonwealth voters we are able to reach before their caucus date. name: Nick4WA Campaign Team
subject: Our mission is you
body:
Take a look at our goals this month and how you can help us reach them.

| [ ](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_goal&n=1)
---
Hello Peter, Let us first start with a reminder that Feb 8th is a special election here in Washington. Use your voice and VOTE! This month is a big month for us as we ramp up and get moving on the campaign. There are many ways you can help us. **Be a Recruiter:
**
We are trying to reach 10,000 more people like you. Please help us do that by sharing this email with 10 more people or copying and pasting this link on social media _https://www.nick4wa.com/?recruiter_id=2995_. Ask them to sign up and take a stand against corporate and establishment politics. Every person that follows the link below earns you points to campaign gear! If someone shared this email with you and you are ready to Be The Change, follow this link: https://www.nick4wa.com/?recruiter_id=2995 **Volunteer:** We need 100 more volunteers to help us phone bank, canvass, and share social media content. You can sign up to volunteer right here: [Volunteering](https://www.nick4wa.com/volunteer?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_goal&n=2) **Host Events:** You can host an event and invite your friends, families, and neighbors to a virtual event with Nicolaus. To host an event with Nicolaus, email us at events@nick4wa.com **Attend an event:** Do you want to speak with Nicolaus? Please attend one of our town halls and talk directly with Nicolaus. It is an open forum and is available for anyone who wants to attend. RSVP to attend by clicking here: [Events](https://www.nick4wa.com/events?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_goal&n=3) **Donate:** We have a goal of $10,000 this month, and we need your help to reach it. You can[ click here](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzvMikPHGRM1k9gje1quRnih-g6m8qzEBVDb2Pg0lJn3wg&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=feb_goal&n=4) or the goal tracker to donate or make an express donation below. clean_body: Take a look at our goals this month and how you can help us reach them. | Hello Peter, Let us first start with a reminder that Feb 8th is a special election here in Washington. Use your voice and VOTE! This month is a big month for us as we ramp up and get moving on the campaign. There are many ways you can help us. Be a Recruiter: We are trying to reach 10,000 more people like you. Please help us do that by sharing this email with 10 more people or copying and pasting this link on social media . Ask them to sign up and take a stand against corporate and establishment politics. Every person that follows the link below earns you points to campaign gear! If someone shared this email with you and you are ready to Be The Change, follow this link: Volunteer: We need 100 more volunteers to help us phone bank, canvass, and share social media content. You can sign up to volunteer right here: Host Events: You can host an event and invite your friends, families, and neighbors to a virtual event with Nicolaus. To host an event with Nicolaus, email us at events@nick4wa.com Attend an event: Do you want to speak with Nicolaus? Please attend one of our town halls and talk directly with Nicolaus. It is an open forum and is available for anyone who wants to attend. RSVP to attend by clicking here: Donate: We have a goal of $10,000 this month, and we need your help to reach it. You can or the goal tracker to donate or make an express donation below. If you donate more than or set up a recurring donation of $5 or more by or the sticker below, we will send you an exclusive grassroots donor sticker. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for being so helpful, Nick4WA HQ Team Candidate for the U.S. Senate Washington Join us on Social Media! Tag us with #Nick4WA Our mailing address is: CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 Copyright © 2022 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved. Gov. DeSantis has failed Florida in every possible way. He’s:
* Signed a sweeping voter suppression bill into law.
* Opened pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in rich Florida neighborhoods full of his political donors.
* Let nearly a million COVID-19 tests expire.
* Appointed a quack as Florida’s Surgeon General.
* Jet-setted across America on a fundraising tour while the Delta variant sickened and killed Floridians.
* Proposed setting up his own private police force.
* Urged the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade.
* Signed laws restricting abortion access.
* Said he might support an abortion ban like the one in Texas.
* Refused to accept that climate change is an existential threat to our state.
* Failed to prepare Florida’s coastal communities for rising sea levels and stronger hurricanes.
* Ignored the “red tide” algae bloom that’s scaring off tourists.

... and this isn’t even a comprehensive list of his failures!

**One thing is clear: Gov. DeSantis doesn’t care about Floridians. He only cares about his presidential ambitions and satisfying his wealthy donors.

**[We _don’t_ support Gov. DeSantis, and we know you don’t either. If you can, please contribute today to Charlie Crist’s campaign for governor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41327520/328323623/770279105?refcode=20220201_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzYxMmNiMi1hYjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cw5L2qEbxNifUk6qUDnHyAvUxWsCoQF7cJLujBbmPT8=)****

| Friends,

I was proud to be in Prince William County this past Thursday fighting for the rural crescent & protecting the Manassas National Battlefield Park.

I will always stand up for our history, and won’t back down on preserving our historic sites.

I am proud of my proven conservative record of opposing higher taxes, standing up for our values, and opposing the destruction of our history.

Watch my video below to learn more:

| Join my team, a conservative fighter with a voting record to prove it, I’ll always stand up for what’s right — from protecting our history, to fighting wokeism, lowering our taxes, and supporting our men & women in uniform.

Best,
****

Jeanine Lawson

Thank you, Peter!

Your grassroots support is the reason we are able to make an impact in this race to unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene. It's amazing to see enthusiasm from folks all across the United States who believe in our message. Which is, standing up for our rural and left behind communities and uplifting a candidate that will focus on the issues facing our community, not one focused on divisiveness and lies.
This heat map is so meaningful to everyone here at Team Holly. We now have a daily reminder that our message, our policy, and our hard-work are being supported from **coast to coast**. Especially right here in Northwest Georgia.

Our goal in showing you this heat map is to empower grassroots donors and show y’all that no matter how high or low the donation, **it makes a difference**.

The national attention we have gotten allows us to focus on what really matters: Northwest Georgians. _Without this support, we wouldn’t have the resources to mobilize GA-14, to register voters, to give back to our communities that have been forgotten for decades_.

This map proves to us that we will unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene and we hope it brings comfort and confidence to all those worried about November’s election. We can make a difference, and **[with your support](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41327696/328324385/-804235033?refcode=em0201&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTI1M2MxNy1hZDgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q6sHoDgROgMX0FcbiB7BKv05AgWYbUhAGp04M7XNnX8=)** we can show how important our rural communities are.

Let's Mobilize,
Team Holly.

Friend,

I have something important to tell you but you CANNOT share this with anyone.

I'm hosting a very important lunch in MAR-A-LAGO soon, and I've requested that YOU be my special guest.

My team just told me you haven't entered yet. I'll admit that I was disappointed to hear that, but, you're one of my BEST supporters, Friend, so I've decided to do something I RARELY DO in the hope that you'll join me for lunch.

I've unlocked an exclusive **DOUBLE-ENTRY** for YOU and YOU ONLY!

body:
Thanks to you, our campaign SMASHED our goal last month, and we are still on track to defeat Ann Wagner this fall. Our campaign is dedicated to representing the people of St. Louis. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41327746/328324685/-633014677?refcode=220201-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDYyNTJlYy1hZDgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wgo9nkAi0wIRane1_aDoeYeHnBhcipO_6XTvHSW-kXE=) Friend, Thanks to you, our campaign SMASHED our goal last month, and we are still on track to defeat Ann Wagner this fall. Our campaign is dedicated to representing the people of St. Louis. That is why these deadlines are so important. If we want to use grassroots energy to overpower the dark money-funded Wagner, we will have to work together. name: Great America Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6774%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8NFknC%2b%2b7b2AC4f7jEeA9A&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69877%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CWsppTLouSKa7bKZce%2bNfg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69878%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Ai4ZyAUwqR%2bz30buovOLA&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69878%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Ai4ZyAUwqR%2bz30buovOLA&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6774%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8NFknC%2b%2b7b2AC4f7jEeA9A&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6774%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8NFknC%2b%2b7b2AC4f7jEeA9A&sysid=1)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: mom and dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – I grew up in Sherrill, a small rural town in Dubuque County, Iowa. When I say "small", I really mean it – today there are less than 200 people living there. That's where my parents taught me the power of hard work and the importance of public service.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41327980/328325809/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk640-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE5MWJkZS1hZjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LUURD7oComsxG0lYWCZmxe1A7r1Ntjb4uP4L513gx4Y=)
My mom worked in public schools, and my dad was a union pipefitter-welder who worked tirelessly. Public service is a value I grew up with – and it's why I'll never stop fighting for Iowa's working families.
I'm running to defeat Sen. Grassley because working families like the one that I come from need a real fighter in Washington. I promise you that I will fight every single day to bring back good-paying jobs, to protect our unions and to give working family kids the bright future and good life they deserve.
**But this is a truly grassroots campaign, and I can't defeat Sen. Grassley without your help.[That's why I've got to ask: Please, will you make a $5 donation right now to defeat Sen. Grassley, fight for working families and protect our Senate majority? Every dollar gets us one step closer to flipping this state blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41327981/328325810/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk640-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzE5MWJkZS1hZjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LUURD7oComsxG0lYWCZmxe1A7r1Ntjb4uP4L513gx4Y=)**

– Abby

name: Susie Lee
subject: Standing together during Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41328340/328327794/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWFkZjRhYS1iMjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y2umCYDxTT2JuqPzq8fA4idOugUcUYmr3-YcFm144go=)

| | Folks — Black History Month gives us time to reflect on the countless contributions that Black leaders across the country have provided to move us towards a more equitable society. This month, I’m remembering the contributions of so many Black leaders who pushed the needle further in the fight for equal rights. Trailblazers like Shirley Chisholm and Barack Obama, literary icons like Toni Morrison and the recently passed bell hooks, and groundbreaking creatives like Sidney Poitier have all played a unique role in the fight for equal rights. But, let’s be clear: to acknowledge Black History Month also means acknowledging that the fight for equality is not yet over. We’re continuing to see instances where equal justice falls short, equal access to voting is further stripped away, and the promise of an equal education isn’t fulfilled. It’s on all of us to ensure that we’re not only fighting for an end to these shortcomings but that we’re also uplifting Black voices in the process. Let’s use this month to acknowledge and celebrate the achievements of the African American community while also committing to improve equal rights in our society wherever and whenever we can. In solidarity, Susie Lee
---
