clean_body: | = | | Folks — Black History Month gives us time to reflect on the countless contributions that Black leaders across the country have provided to move us towards a more equitable society. This month, I’m remembering the contributions of so many Black leaders who pushed the needle further in the fight for equal rights. Trailblazers like Shirley Chisholm and Barack Obama, literary icons like Toni Morrison and the recently passed bell hooks, and groundbreaking creatives like Sidney Poitier have all played a unique role in the fight for equal rights. But, let’s be clear: to acknowledge Black History Month also means acknowledging that the fight for equality is not yet over. We’re continuing to see instances where equal justice falls short, equal access to voting is further stripped away, and the promise of an equal education isn’t fulfilled. It’s on all of us to ensure that we’re not only fighting for an end to these shortcomings but that we’re also uplifting Black voices in the process. Let’s use this month to acknowledge and celebrate the achievements of the African American community while also committing to improve equal rights in our society wherever and whenever we can. In solidarity, Susie Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148 mailto:info@susieleeforcongress.com

name: Charles Booker
subject: Kentucky has never had a Black person elected to federal office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Today is February 1st — the first day of Black History Month — and I
wanted us to take a moment to honor and uplift this important annual
observance.

In every second of every minute, every minute of every hour, every hour of
every day, every day of every week, every week of every month, and every
month of every year. Black history IS American history.

We are the masons that built our nation’s capital. We are the miners that
powered great cities. We are the scientists that took mankind to the moon.
We are the artists that defined America.

There is simply not a moment where Black history isn't prevalent, pivotal,
prominent, and invaluable. It is, simply put, the history of humanity.

We have more of it to make.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16164?refcode=em20220201-1525&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1525%2E346206%2EcTr31v ]Peter,
Kentucky has never had a Black person
elected to federal office. This year, I plan on changing that. If you’re
with me in this fight, can I count on you to chip in $5 or
whatever you can?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16164?refcode=em20220201-1525&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1525%2E346206%2EcTr31v ]Contribute $5 →

This year, all across our country, we have a real chance to write a new
chapter in our history; one that moves us forward in the fight for
economic, racial, and environmental justice.

We have a chance to move our country forward towards a future where we
don’t have to worry about our door’s getting kicked in or our children
facing police violence because of the color of their skin.

We have a chance to send a young Black man from the hood and descendant of
enslaved Kentuckians to the United States Senate, replace Rand Paul, and
bring forth a new chapter of equitable, strong leadership to our
Commonwealth.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16164?refcode=em20220201-1525&t=1022&akid=1525%2E346206%2EcTr31v ]I know we can do this,
Peter. I know that, together,
we can create the future we want — for ourselves, for our loved ones, and
for our communities. So I have to ask one more time: will you please chip
in $5 to our campaign?

I’m not running to make history. I’m running to transform our future.

Take this stand with me.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220201-1525-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1525_346206_cTr31v&akid=1525%2E346206%2EcTr31v

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1525%2E346206%2EcTr31v

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: IT'S CAUCUS NIGHT! 🗳️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
I have the most conservative record of every candidate running for Governor, let's nominate a principled conservative! | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

**IT IS CAUCUS NIGHT!**

The time has finally come, my team has been working hard to get us to this moment, and now it's **YOUR TURN!**

I encourage you to watch my caucus day video, and download my letter to read at your local caucus tonight. These can be found at the end of this email.

But I want to leave you with a message first...

**I trust the caucus, and I trust the delegates** to make the best decision to nominate a principled, prepared, and electable candidate to defeat Tim Walz in November.
* I have been a delegate since 2006.
* I ran for the endorsement, won, and was elected to the Senate in 2011.
* I ran as Dave Thompson's running mate in 2014. We stood by the endorsement, and put on Jeff Johnson jerseys after our party endorsed.
* And in 2018 Representative Jim Nash and I chaired the State Convention.

**I have ALWAYS trusted the delegates to make the right decision.**

My record speaks for itself, **I have the MOST conservative record of any candidate running for Governor.** When I was first elected, I promised myself to always stick to my principles, and I've done just that.
* I have the **HIGHEST** score of **ANY** Senator with the American Conservative Union.
* I have the **HIGHEST** score of **ANY** candidate running for Governor with the Taxpayers League of Minnesota.
* I have carried **MORE** pro-life legislation than **ANY** Senator in Minnesota.
* I have **NEVER **needed to to contemplate if Michael Bloomberg has good ideas about gun rights.

Many in this race have tried to skew the facts fit their narrative, **but I have consistently held the line and advanced our shared conservative values with a proven record.**

So when we go to caucus tomorrow...

Let's nominate a candidate who is **principled, prepared, and electable.**

Let's make Minnesota **safer, better, and stronger.**

**LET'S MAKE TIM WALZ A ONE-TERM GOVERNOR!**

I ask for your support at precinct caucuses TONIGHT at 7:00PM. You can find your local caucus location by visiting [www.michelle4mn.com/caucus](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=2138b98cc0&e=9d6926af69)

Blessings,

Michelle Benson
---

body:
Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 1, 2022

|
---
**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 1, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Joe Biden isn't deporting criminals who have committed heinous crimes as part of his radical policies. This is a tremendous betrayal of those families who have suffered as a result of this border crisis. Ken Paxton will never stop fighting Biden's rogue immigration actions.

**Link: **[https://video.foxnews.com/v/6294771622001#sp=show-clips](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=255f289cec89463a8a9965dceb138093&_e=gJeamwwzcDoBhStJAqSATqUZ5faMdzcdhb5TeizEPtYDqWE9f_5HRhXJeKfhLhAE_e-W9sfStP0seiEyDgrYXrgzWXs9H-hVJcPUcnAbwbsZ3l_Dxujq4wXXyQyKViIfz-LkoOrWZuYvvQ8qJB5-gYiIaar17oNgorWf_zmsDRUDDX3kIUZpMtCsHcdQFWZG2WGHz8CX96uvb8wliULg-75oYvKtO4tCrbDYN_W7TERQWmctpDetVzWLihizsPzsqU7WhBh-oCUPKqqklnVN8G1UnPlqyb0yvTQ59HAbicBPIa08OMCCnbKxaEthcAlm)

**Theme of the Day: Biden Has Betrayed Us**

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Our hearts are heavy after learning that the illegal immigrant who killed Adrienne Sophia Exum in a horrific hit-and-run incident, won't be deported under guidance from Joe Biden's administration that prioritizes deportation for those who pose "threats" to public safety. How violent criminals are not a "priority" for deportation defies all logic. This is a betrayal of our country and families that have lost loved ones at the hands of these illegal immigrants and drug cartels. Ken Paxton will continue to stand up against Joe Biden's unlawful and dangerous policies that have destroyed countless lives throughout Texas and across our country.

~ As our trucker friends to the north in the "Freedom Convoy" in Canada continue to fight against vaccine mandates that threaten their livelihoods, Big Tech unsurprisingly tried to silence them. A GoFundMe page supporting the truckers that had raised $10 million was temporarily frozen. Thankfully, the group provided a "detailed plan," and the funds have been released.

~ Ken Paxton's campaign for Attorney General raised an impressive haul during the first 20 days of January, leaving him with more cash on hand than the rest of the field combined. While there is more work to be done before election day, Ken Paxton is the only candidate Texans can trust to continue fighting Joe Biden's radical policies at every turn.

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=255f289cec89463a8a9965dceb138093&_e=gJeamwwzcDoBhStJAqSATjNt4zNEe_NavSOgs0W9Zzxi21PYu3Xb8Zst-ztq4kvByTWu3y6UK_QIzU1fy3fv_rf-7VYftZ8j00ekXeLEj6ejsiOa95VFDbXn6nEXxZF6CPhce24sm3Sy1gs5P43OHqbSUCVyIUEiGz2Wh_8RTu34viIi-eHzyJi0Ug8LSJXi3yhaRg7m7njZSZoaubM6Pq7EBmZYblY-oevVfdWPcYTEmfhW1QG-w0UPwMkhQE3kIBovsn02vk2kMwhB0KuoOQ%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=255f289cec89463a8a9965dceb138093&_e=gJeamwwzcDoBhStJAqSATjNt4zNEe_NavSOgs0W9Zzxi21PYu3Xb8Zst-ztq4kvBT3mtCnWdpA4BcN4Gb_c81dKUy5uQCSas6JJWLAJviNiCv22UygeLWLyYieadelm61poCK6KdoEBUOoDI6nuB_HnLvH_AAi08Has6gw9Dk4jiRURVGBbCbnxDJkTvIU3qnvXPl6bUn_y-lc838khoY7OckPC2Vh_TpNyVpxGaQriaJ9p96e-4f5cFbTvMtOf3Iv5-1Ym-rqkW2gJitDJdcA%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=255f289cec89463a8a9965dceb138093&_e=gJeamwwzcDoBhStJAqSATjNt4zNEe_NavSOgs0W9Zzxi21PYu3Xb8Zst-ztq4kvBnSMMiEAus6vi5idlnVWdJjzsFMzK8Mp8xCypIJYWuW1CA7_DJUjmEWsiwCosC-i8CnnojjxTkp3y-NuxPDu5n4EKFaGcapdEU0r8bb33jR7_FDKeyvyJn6ml6PnNj_YKemSe4v9AjSpuBUm122JYJxrMnFxujvlOCuPqNRJX2Twl4n-pYcqpqaHurCoQTF9V2NDnayQ6yOsIn2XOakrV6w%3D%3D)

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: Gov. Lee’s disturbing State of the State address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
What I heard last night was deeply disappointing. Instead of talking directly to Tennesseans about what he's done and will do for them, Lee spent his hour-long address pandering to the dark money interest groups that fund his candidacy. | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321791/328293098/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220201sots_DJM_op_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzcxZjBiMS04YTgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDAF2F6P-OcEARobCvojLzrVFD_ToXZqCblHU7Hk_y8=)
---
Peter,
Last night, I attended Governor Bill Lee’s annual “State of the State” address. What I heard was disturbing and deeply disappointing.
Let me start by saying that I was heartbroken, and frankly astonished, that the Governor spoke for an hour and _never even mentioned the 22,000 Tennesseans who have died in the COVID-19 pandemic_. We all want to get life back to normal, but you don't get back to normal by ignoring the problem. Thousands of Tennesseans are grieving the loss of loved ones, and Lee’s lack of acknowledgement is breathtaking in its callousness.
Every year, this address is an opportunity to speak directly to the people of Tennessee and show what, exactly, you are doing for them. Instead, Lee spent his hour-long address pandering to the dark money interest groups that fund his candidacy.
Tennessee deserves a governor who will prioritize the needs of its people instead of the expansion of his friends’ bank accounts. Our state is #1 in rural hospital closures, #1 in COVID death rate, we have five of the 65 deadliest cities in America, and we’re 45th in the country when it comes to funding schools. Even the increase in education funding Gov. Lee announced is a slap in the face to communities and educators who have been pleading with him to provide students and teachers with the resources they desperately need — a bipartisan group said it would take at _minimum_ an additional $2 billion to fully fund our education system.
Let’s talk about freedom, too, since that’s apparently a word Lee loves to use without actually understanding what it means: Freedom means being able to go visit a doctor without going bankrupt. Freedom means being able to access the ballot box. Freedom means children are able to visit their libraries and read what they want without the state censoring books. Freedom means being able to go to work without fear you’ll contract a deadly virus.
I’ve spent the last three months traveling to all 95 counties in Tennessee. **What I heard from Tennesseans was not reflected, at all, in Gov. Lee’s address.**
No matter your zip code, the color of your skin, or how much money you have in the bank, Tennessee should be a home of opportunity — a home with safe communities, where students advance in modern and fully-funded schools, where commerce thrives on advanced infrastructure, with a healthy and well-trained workforce, where a nimble, lean, and efficient government helps its people solve big problems together.
**Governor Bill Lee has failed on all counts in his three years in office**. And last night, he confirmed that he does not plan to change. It’s time to put people over politics, and restore honest leadership to Tennessee.
[_**We’re building a movement by Tennesseans, for Tennesseans — not corporations, special interests, or rich donors. If you can, make a donation today to fuel the next phase of our campaign for the governorship.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321792/328293099/286568823?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220201sots_DJM_op_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzcxZjBiMS04YTgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDAF2F6P-OcEARobCvojLzrVFD_ToXZqCblHU7Hk_y8=)
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41321793/328293100/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220201sots_DJM_op_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzcxZjBiMS04YTgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fDAF2F6P-OcEARobCvojLzrVFD_ToXZqCblHU7Hk_y8=)
---
Together, we will build a Tennessee that works for ALL of us. My resolve has never been firmer, and I’m so grateful to have your support.
Thank you for reading.
Dr. Jason Martin

| Dr. Jason Martin is running for Governor because now more than ever Tennessee needs a leader who will start working to meet **all** of our needs. As an ICU physician, Dr. Martin has seen firsthand the devastating consequences of lies, corruption, and divisiveness in Nashville. Bad news, friend – we missed our end-of-month goal yesterday.
This is bad under normal circumstances, but in a purple state like New Hampshire, this could cost us the election. To ensure that we don't make this mistake again, we're going back and reviewing our numbers to see where we went wrong.
Our records show that we fell short in 03264. If we're going to keep this seat and our Senate blue, it's critical that we have strong grassroots support. Without your help, friend, an extreme anti-choice Republican could flip this seat and give Mitch McConnell the majority back.
[**Right now, we need 89 more donations from 03264**** ****in the next hour to make up for our missed goal. To ensure that we don't make this mistake again, we're going back and reviewing our numbers to see where we went wrong. Our records show that we fell short in 03264. If we're going to keep this seat and our Senate blue, it's critical that we have strong grassroots support. subject: Centurion Communications (Events & Training)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE COMMITTEE TO ELECT INGRID CENTURION
body:
19 Feb Centurion Town Hall on the TAKE BACK AMERICA Series Tour | | | View this email in your browser
---
| | Hi Friends,

Volunteer meeting and Campaign Training was excellent. The team had a chance to collaborate and understand the mission for February because we have alot to schedule and plan. We will start team weekly calls on tasks that need to be accomplished every Tuesday evening at 7PM, we will use free conference call 712-770-4160, PIN 960266. Call in this evening and announce yourself. Let me know if you will be on the calls or if you can't make it due to other commitments. I would like to welcome Walter Noller to the team, he lives in Summerville, retired US Army CSM and will be taking over training for me.

**Next Steps:** Promote the 19 Feb, Event at the VFW Post 3433, Ladson, SC sometimes also called the Summerville VFW. Promote on all your social media platforms. We have also scheduled 17 Feb VFW Post 10256 6PM - 7PM, Moncks Corner Post #10256, 104 Stephanie Dr, Goose Creek, SC 29445. This post is much smaller but they are very excited that I am coming to speak to them. We are going on a TAKE BACK AMERICA series Tour across the District.

**Phone Banking Team:** We need to build and train the phone banking team as soon as possible, if you would like to volunteer today, I need your support in making phone calls.

**Data Entry Team: ** We need to build and train the data entry team as soon as possible, if you would like to volunteer today. We are collecting list from across the district to identify our targets. If you have a good list to share, please send it to the campaign email.

**Monthly Training:** Our next training date will be located at James Island, SC, if you have any recommendations on a site, please share. The Leadership Institute will conduct a Campaign Training School at the American Legion Post in Goose Creek on Saturday, February 5th, 2022 from 2-5 p.m. I highly recommend attending. The Leadership Institute is a non-partisan, non-profit educational organization that trains conservative activists and leaders. Here is the link to register: [https://www.leadershipinstitute.org/training/school.cfm?schoolID=55670](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=035147a89d&e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| | **ACTIONS NEEDED TODAY :
1\. I am officially on GAB, DISCORD and TELEGRAM. Make sure to follow and like and comment on GAB Social Media Platform.
2\. BE A 30 Second Volunteer by Liking, Commenting and Sharing on my [Facebook Page](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=e8b7c7995c&e=bb02dd73bf), [YouTube CHANNEL](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=79c10f388f&e=bb02dd73bf) , [Twitter](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=e17392ced1&e=bb02dd73bf), GETTR @IngridCenturion. DAILY!! DAILY!!**

Thank you all!
Ingrid Centurion
---
| |
---
| Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_P.S. We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign. Please consider making a_[ _donation_](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=20af0a43b3&e=bb02dd73bf) _[today](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=e071db8098&e=bb02dd73bf)_ _._

name: American Update
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8417%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=LAbcnTJO5SR6FgUj1iVyDA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13687%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8zpLIDQa7X93PLZ2%2flIqpA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13688%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1btiBaNDaa7Zq20FmSg9TQ&sysid=1)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13687%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8zpLIDQa7X93PLZ2%2flIqpA&sysid=1) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13689%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZOKx%2bsQpJK2WqMs46UHpGQ&sysid=1)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8417%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=LAbcnTJO5SR6FgUj1iVyDA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8417%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=LAbcnTJO5SR6FgUj1iVyDA&sysid=1)

subject: Here’s how we END Pelosi’s career and FIRE Joe Biden:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Any amount you can spare will have QUADRUPLE the impact. The only catch is you must use it right now. &n; bsp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3esqr--fgxr-4qqlpo3&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

**PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP:
"We are going to start by ENDING Nancy Pelosi's political career once and for all. And then, we're going to kick the Biden crime family out of the White House in 2024!"**
__________________

Kind messages from supporters this month have only inspired me more.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41329300/328331339/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.02.02_b1_thank-you_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.02_b1_thank-you_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFjOTBkYi1iNjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GmyFMDf5t8miBVG6RS8izmayeRYm9O1JqgX7HTHaaIs=)

Friends,

We once again faced a big fundraising challenge, and once again our team stepped up and beat our fundraising goal. I am truly grateful for everyone who has our back during this campaign.

Grassroots donations, conversations with voters, and kind messages on social media this month have only inspired me more as we approach this election.

As long as we keep up this energy, we’ll be able to handle anything our opponent throws our way. Derrick Van Orden doesn’t care about western Wisconsin, and we will make sure every voter knows it.

Look, I’m ready to fight for you, and I want to hear your priorities. **[If you haven’t done so yet, please let me know your priorities for this election by filling out our survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41329301/328331341/2064386342?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.01_b1_thank-you_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.02.02_b1_thank-you_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.02_b1_thank-you_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFjOTBkYi1iNjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GmyFMDf5t8miBVG6RS8izmayeRYm9O1JqgX7HTHaaIs=&emci=28f2c844-a283-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=851c90db-b683-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41329302/328331342/2064386342?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.01_b1_thank-you_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.02.02_b1_thank-you_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.02.02_b1_thank-you_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFjOTBkYi1iNjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GmyFMDf5t8miBVG6RS8izmayeRYm9O1JqgX7HTHaaIs=&emci=28f2c844-a283-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=851c90db-b683-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=3200050)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: One month down, ten to go!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220131&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220131&amount=28]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87595/images/Jan%20Newsletter.png]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220131&amount=28]
Elissa

Team,

As we prepare for the election this fall, we’ve not been wasting any time in Michigan’s newly-formed 7th district. Throughout January, I’ve been on the ground talking with voters, visiting businesses, and familiarizing myself with the new areas of our district.

I was able to get out and visit some Lansing staples and chat with voters across the new district about what they would like to see their Congresswoman prioritize in Washington.

On MLK weekend, I visited Black-owned businesses in the Lansing area to talk about voter registration. Specifically, how these businesses can act as registration hubs for folks in their communities that may not be registered yet. We’ve seen success with this all over the country, and with the amount of young college students in the Lansing area, the more we can do to drive out turnout and ensure people are exercising their most fundamental right, the better.

The next weekend, I was on the ground in Shiawassee county and South Lyon. I grabbed coffee in the morning at Fosters Coffee Company with some amazing volunteers in Shiawassee county. Then, it was on to Wrought Iron Grill in Owosso for lunch. I grabbed some more caffeine at Xpress-O Coffee Co (you can never have too much coffee on the campaign trail). Finally, I stopped by Witch’s Hat Brewing Company in South Lyon to chat with voters and grab a beer from one of MI-07’s many local breweries.

That’s not all I’ve been up to this month, though. Back in DC, I introduced the No Tax Breaks for Drug Ads Act – a bill aimed at closing the loophole that allows taxpayer dollars to subsidize the ads drug companies blanket the airwaves with. Your tax dollars should not be spent on the ads drug companies target you with. That’s just common sense.

Then it was back to Lansing again, where I joined GM and Republican and Democratic lawmakers for a major announcement about a new electric UAW vehicle battery plant coming to Delta Township, and other investments that GM is making across our state. This $7 *billion* investment from GM will bring 4,000 good-paying jobs to Mid-Michigan. I really can’t overstate just how huge this is, and it’s a great example of what we can accomplish when Democrats and Republicans reach across the aisle and work together.

January has been a busy month, and it’s just going to get crazier. THANK YOU for being on this journey with me. November, here we come!

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Contact Elissa
P.O. BOX 244, HOLLY, MI 48442
campaign@elissaforcongress.com [campaign@elissaforcongress.com]
https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkinforcongress [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkinforcongress] https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Holly, MI 48442
United States

name: Barrier To Entry PAC
subject: Young. Black. Progressive.
body:
Today is the first day of Black History month.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41329651/328332383/1300596418?220201_CLTV_BlackHistoryMonth_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4N2ExNzMxLWI5ODMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IYhHjI1n_NB9aU0NanhnCYJxXG3D-hHAV9xBxxJs9JU=)
---
Peter,

Today is the first day of Black History Month. Every February we are reminded to amplify the voices of Black Americans leading the fight for justice.

This year marks the ten year anniversary of of the murder of Trayvon Martin. He would have been twenty-seven years old. His death helped spark a cultural revolution which brought together people all over the world who believe that justice has not yet been served to Black Americans killed at the hands of police officers.

Ten years later, there is still so much work to do.

When we elect and empower Black leaders who are driving the movement, we shift power where it belongs—back to the people—and craft policies that are community-driven.

So this month, we encourage folks to commit to supporting a candidate or organization that lifts up Black leaders. Small dollar, recurring online donations help create sustainable funding streams for campaigns **[In that spirit, we invite you to please make a $5 recurring contribution to support the Ohio Young Black Democrats today](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41329652/328332384/397247049?refcode=220201_CLTV_BlackHistoryMonth_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4N2ExNzMxLWI5ODMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IYhHjI1n_NB9aU0NanhnCYJxXG3D-hHAV9xBxxJs9JU=&emci=bab9506f-7283-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=d87a1731-b983-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&ceid=17300922). ** With gratitude **_Barrier to Entry PAC_**

clean_body: Today is the first day of Black History month. | | | = Peter, Today is the first day of Black History Month. Every February we are reminded to amplify the voices of Black Americans leading the fight for justice. This year marks the ten year anniversary of of the murder of Trayvon Martin. He would have been twenty-seven years old. His death helped spark a cultural revolution which brought together people all over the world who believe that justice has not yet been served to Black Americans killed at the hands of police officers. Ten years later, there is still so much work to do. When we elect and empower Black leaders who are driving the movement, we shift power where it belongs—back to the people—and craft policies that are community-driven. So this month, we encourage folks to commit to supporting a candidate or organization that lifts up Black leaders. Small dollar, recurring online donations help create sustainable funding streams for campaigns . With gratitude Barrier to Entry PAC ******************** ******************** **************************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC************************** **************************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:************************** | **************************= "="************************** | **************************= "="************************** | **************************= "="************************** | **************************= "="************************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. name: Mike Collier
subject: One month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
Folks, thank you.

Because of your generosity and support, we reached our January fundraising goal. More importantly, thanks to y’all, we hit an incredible milestone on our campaign – we’ve now spoken to nearly one million voters online, in their mailboxes, and over the phone. I’m so proud of this team and what we have accomplished together.

January is often considered one of the toughest months for political fundraising, and we just had one of our best yet. As y’all know, I refuse to accept a single penny from corporate PACs, so this success is truly a testament to the grassroots campaign we’re building together here in Texas.

And I’m most proud of the fact that our average online contribution last month was just $35. So many people are stepping up and chipping in what they can to help us flip Texas’ lieutenant governor’s office. I promise it’s making a real difference in this race.

But we can’t let up just yet, and I’ll tell you why:

Today marks exactly one month out from our primary Election Day. What we do — or fail to do — between now and March 1st will determine the outcome of this election and whether we have what it takes to put this seat back in the hands of the people of Texas, not the corporate interests.

I know we’ve got what it takes to fight for our shared values and take back our beloved Texas. And I want to thank you, from the bottom of my heart, for all the support you’ve given me and this team so far to help us do just that.

I’m excited to continue fighting — and winning — with you. Thanks for all you do.

— Mike

DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-em-feb2022]
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States
[https://collierfortexas.com/] |
Paid for by the Collier Committee

However, if you’d still like to receive fewer emails, fill out this form here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2abP63YYcUqXP5eHRkxWIQ2]. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Outraised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
New campaign finance reports just dropped in Texas. Here’s what they show:
#
We just filed our latest mandatory campaign finance report. So did Greg Abbott. Unfortunately, the numbers show that he out-fundraised us.
**Jan. 1-20** | **Raised**
---|---
Beto O'Rourke | $1.3 million
Greg Abbott | $1.4 million
**We can’t afford to be outraised again.** Especially when Abbott now has over $62 million on hand. That’s why we’re asking for your help to pick up our pace so we can close the gap and flip Texas with so much on the line.
**[Will you chip in $3 right now to help us take on Greg Abbott? We have another mandatory deadline coming up on February 19th before our primary, and we need to ensure that we outraise Abbott this time around.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52172?refcode=ema20220201-174265&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=174265%2E444211%2EmjL1N1)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52172?refcode=ema20220201-174265&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=174265%2E444211%2EmjL1N1)**
While we were behind on the total money raised this time around, there was some positive news for us that says a lot about how we’re running this campaign. We had 28,600 contributions during the first 20 days of the new year — outpacing Abbott by more than 9,000 donations. This shows that far more of our support is coming from grassroots donors.
There are more of us than Abbott’s megadonors. **[If you can, please add your first donation to help us close the gap and defeat Abbott.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52172?refcode=ema20220201-174265&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=174265%2E444211%2EmjL1N1)**
Thanks for all you do,
Team Beto

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.
clean_body: New campaign finance reports just dropped in Texas. Here’s what they show: We just filed our latest mandatory campaign finance report. So did Greg Abbott. Unfortunately, the numbers show that he out-fundraised us. Jan. 1-20 | Raised ---|--- Beto O'Rourke | $1.3 million Greg Abbott | $1.4 million We can’t afford to be outraised again. Especially when Abbott now has over $62 million on hand. That’s why we’re asking for your help to pick up our pace so we can close the gap and flip Texas with so much on the line. While we were behind on the total money raised this time around, there was some positive news for us that says a lot about how we’re running this campaign. We had 28,600 contributions during the first 20 days of the new year — outpacing Abbott by more than 9,000 donations. This shows that far more of our support is coming from grassroots donors. There are more of us than Abbott’s megadonors. Thanks for all you do, Team Beto Email us: info@betofortexas.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: ICYMI: Working Hard to Win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
Over the coming months I’ll continue to bring my optimistic message of hope to citizens in every corner of our state. | | | |
---
| | |
### **Relentless Campaigner**
### **Knows all of Michigan**
### **Knows the Issues**
---
|
---
| Peter:

It’s been another great week on the campaign trail.

I attended a wonderful event in Wayne County, the Republican Committee Unity Dinner. Chair Cheryl Costantino and crew did a fantastic job.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| It was a pleasure speaking to the attendees about my background of service to this country — 4 years in the U.S. Marine Corps and 33 years in the Michigan State Police where I continue crime fighting by day. As the only lifelong Republican and twice elected Republican County Commissioner, I am the only candidate who has even successfully run and won as a Republican candidate and have been undefeated. In my daily life as a State Police Captain I manage almost 200 people. Having spent my career building high performing teams I will FIX Michigan for the citizens of this state that have been disrespected by our current Governor.
---
| |
---
Later in the week, I attended the 6th District Republican meeting where I gave an update on my race for Governor and emphasized my belief that we need a candidate who is a lifelong Republican, who has the energy and vitality to campaign relentlessly in all corners of the state, and who has a working knowledge of all of Michigan.
---
| In Grand Rapids I had an awesome outing at the Huntin' Time Expo. As the only candidate who actively enjoys hunting, fishing, camping, and the outdoor lifestyle, I understand the issues facing the sporting industry. I will be a strong advocate for the outdoors and common sense conservation policies in Michigan.
---
|
---
---
| Finally, I was the only candidate for Governor (Republican or Democrat) to be part of School Choice Week with Parent Advocates for Choice in Education and the The Mackinac Center for Public Policy.

Michigan celebrated National School Choice Week 2022 with 772 events this week.
---
|
---
|
---
---
| It is all the more important that parents have options, especially with the radical elements that have been infiltrating our public schools promoting insidious concepts like critical race theory.

We must ensure that all students and parents have every option available because no two students are alike.

I’ll fight to expand opportunities for all parents because each and every child deserves the best education possible.

Over the coming months I’ll continue to bring my optimistic message of hope to citizens in every corner of our state.

See you on the campaign trail.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
|
---

name: Troy Newman, Operation Rescue
subject: Sign the National Petition to Defund Planned Parenthood
body:
Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I help
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbmb3vhtmallubsblleqcervempqg2ms2jmapk7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cthm0o32cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1lc2pn2sb2caored77m6qn4or56kq62db0s3im6pjic8qj6o3ke6orecrl6moefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aoljckrr4s366hgb6or7m2qmash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0svugkdsefllrl4jup24s9krfkch0ghmri6mok0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cthm0o32cdh2bs) Fellow Pro-Life American, Thanks to their allies in Big Tech and the liberal media, Planned Parenthood has managed to slip from the headlines since I helped uncover their cash-for-baby-body parts scheme five years ago. But just because the radical left is suppressing content online and refuses to tell the truth about the radical abortion lobby ... that doesn’t mean they’ve cleaned up their act. **Far from it! ** While I was exposing Planned Parenthood’s crimes, and was found liable in a San Francisco court for $17 million in damages in a historic pro-life case, the federal government — with partial funding of Anthony Fauci’s National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases — **_was supporting research to graft the scalps of unborn babies who were just 17 to 20 weeks old onto lab rats and mice to see if they’d keep growing._** [**We MUST demand that Congress act NOW to Defund Planned Parenthood and end the senseless murder of unborn children and STOP using these innocent lives in the name of "research." Please sign the petition right away!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp3i064kfpqf8gl70d16poqqcgk1m3pslataqmag_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cthm0o32cdh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlggr97og55gvnjoe0uqmm440fbpse41hm4u2uu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cthm0o32cdh2bs) Right now, the radical abortionists are coming after life in new and horrific ways. They’re passing legislation aimed at expanding access to late-term abortion and infanticide, and they’re ramping up the number of pill mills across the nation. On top of it all, they’re working to **DESTROY** threats to their business — like me. Not long ago, they won a hard-fought battle against me in court, which cost Operation Rescue hundreds of thousands of dollars and hundreds of hours of our time. My team and I are on the ground every day exposing the radical abortion lobby and **SHUTTING THEM DOWN** , but now that Planned Parenthood has picked up their pace — and is now focused on opening pill mills over surgical facilities — we must ensure that Congress does their part by taking away all federal funding from these monsters. [**To help save innocent lives and ensure our tax dollars don’t fund Planned Parenthood in ANY manner, I need you to sign this national petition today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvvvc711f530o5mkdudfgevvbe77sb7bpbamgmug_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cthm0o32cdh2bs) Over the last ten years, the number of surgical abortion clinics **decreased by 35 percent**. While this is fantastic — and in part thanks to the work we do at Operation Rescue to expose the abortion industry, shut down dangerous facilities, and put abortionists out of work — what’s very troubling is that Planned Parenthood has recently _shifted strategy._ [**_Medication abortion facilities —_** **_which are dispensaries for abortion-inducing drugs — have become the reliable “cash cow” for the abortion industry. And they’re popping up at an alarming rate!_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztqscrc9nnjgdh38fdsb17bcng50agalklvnm258_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cthm0o32cdh2bs) That is why we must **INCREASE** our efforts this year to ensure that we can keep up with the pace of murder-pill mills AND pressure Congress to take every taxpayer dollar away from Planned Parenthood. [**Please help today by signing this national petition. It will only take a moment of your time and the impact will be huge.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbu7gdpt55okjh551lpa4pbksn2refgiucbs68b8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cthm0o32cdh2bs) [**Sign the Petition**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq7nkf1omkb1plp1e85lk1l2l4at43q9lu3vk3ro_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cthm0o32cdh2bs) Thank you for your support, God bless you, Troy Newman President P.O. Box 782888 • Wichita, KS 67278

name: Team Blumenthal
subject: New Republican Entry in CT Senate Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=B%2B%2BBWalp88eNecHACdbMbOXy7CgyX%2F4X&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
I wanted to give you an update on our campaign, as a lot has changed over the last 48 hours. There are now four Republicans running against Senator Blumenthal including a serious new challenger -- a statehouse insider -- the former Republican Minority Leader.
She was pushed to run by Republican Party leaders and even supported by Fox News darling Laura Ingraham.
Whoever wins the Republican primary, national Republicans have made their intentions clear. They are targeting Dick Blumenthal. Mitch McConnell wants to take back control of the Senate and he thinks his path goes straight through Connecticut.
**We can 't let that happen.**
We need Senator Blumenthal in the United States Senate. A stalwart warrior for the rule of law, voting rights, women's healthcare, infrastructure, and support to small businesses as the challenges of the pandemic continue, he is focused on doing his job and working for the people of Connecticut.
[Please help us stand up to Mitch McConnell and support Dick Blumenthal. Click here to chip in what you can to defend this blue Senate seat and keep Democrats in control of the Senate. We need you to be part of our team.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1138-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: bumping
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
I know you’ve probably been getting a lot of emails over the past few days from campaigns trying to hit their monthly fundraising deadlines (including ours). But now that we're in February, I wanted to bump this particular email to the top of your inbox.

When I sent this message about our road trip around the state last night, I did not expect the incredible response we got. It's clear that people are hungry for a Democrat who will go to every corner of the state and prioritize making the lives of every Wisconsinite better. I am that candidate and I can be that U.S. Senator — but only with your help.

**[That’s why I hope you’ll take a look at my last email highlighting our rural tour across Wisconsin and consider chipping in to support our work. Your contributions keep us on the road meeting voters and talking about our plans to give this Senate seat back to the people of our state. Thank you in advance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41330391/328341034/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220201_recap2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220201_recap2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWRlN2M3MC1iZDgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hr2r-Va7K7OGCVxzMdUuHO50xXha144t3RT6BPLFFg8=)**
_\------ Begin forwarded message ------_
**From:** Sarah Godlewski
**Date:** January 31, 2022
**Subject:** Photos from our rural tour across Wisconsin

Last week, we kicked off a statewide tour across rural Wisconsin, where we met with farmers, small business owners, mental health workers, teachers, and others to discuss my new plan for our rural communities. I have a few pictures to share with you below, but let me briefly start with this:

We are creating an agenda for all Wisconsinites so that we can get this U.S. Senate seat working for everyone again — because the people of our state may not be Ron Johnson’s priority, but they are mine. That’s why I got in this race, and it’s why I’ve been out on the road so much.

If we want to defeat Ron Johnson in November, we’ve got to show up, listen, earn trust, and follow through on our word — particularly in places Democrats don’t always go. We need to build a campaign that can compete everywhere and talk to everyone, which is exactly what we’re doing.

**[Can you chip in to support our efforts ahead of tonight’s monthly fundraising deadline? Your contribution will keep us on the road, traveling all over Wisconsin and getting our message out to voters. With Ron Johnson officially in the race, there’s never been a more important time to give. Click here to pitch in.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41330392/328341035/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220201_recap2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220201_recap2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWRlN2M3MC1iZDgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hr2r-Va7K7OGCVxzMdUuHO50xXha144t3RT6BPLFFg8=)**

Now, here are some of my favorite moments from our rural tour:

Our first stop was Landmark Creamery. It was so great to be with the two Annas for a cheesy lunchtime adventure! These incredible small business owners are working with farmers to build sustainable, family-run dairies that support the local economy — one wedge at a time.

Next, we drove to Coloma Farms, where Andy showed us around. After the tour, Andy and Steve both took the time to discuss the importance of conservation and supporting our farmers, now more than ever. This Waushara County family farm is a great example of how our farmers are putting sustainability into practice.

Then, we stopped in Viroqua, where I met with Mayor Karen Mischel to talk about how climate change and economic security issues are impacting communities like hers. If we want all Wisconsinites to thrive, we have to make investments that matter — in conservation, housing, childcare, and more. That’s what I’m fighting for in this campaign.

We spent the night in Eau Claire and headed off to rural Augusta the next morning. Being from western Wisconsin, I’m certainly no stranger to subzero weather — but holy cow, was it a cold one! The way I see it, if farmers like Matt can wake up early, roll up their sleeves, and get to work, they should expect the same from their U.S. Senator. Even the cold couldn’t stop me from getting fired up about my plan to better support our farmers. That’s the commitment I’ll bring to the U.S. Senate.

Next stop: Merrill, where my good friend Renea was able to join us for a factory tour at the Weinbrenner Shoe Company. Renea is the co-owner of nearby FreMarq Innovations, another Merrill manufacturer we toured just last summer. Here in Wisconsin, manufacturing is an important part of our story, so I was grateful to Dennis for showing us around and talking about the struggles of being a manufacturer in a rural area. Weinbrenner makes some of the best work boots in the world, right here in Wisconsin. (You bet I bought myself a pair!)

After that, we made the drive up north to Ashland and made our way over to Superior for a mental health worker roundtable. Everywhere I go, I hear about struggles with mental health — getting treatment and prevention simply isn't an option for too many, especially in rural communities. It was great to chat with community members about how we can improve mental health services, give schools the resources they need, and support working parents. Shortly after, I also met with educators to talk about the challenges they’re facing in this ongoing pandemic, and most importantly, what I can do to help.

Finally, we ended our road trip by catching the sunset at the lighthouse on beautiful Lake Superior. As Senator, I’ll always work to preserve our Great Lakes and ensure public lands stay in public hands so that future generations can continue to enjoy Wisconsin’s natural resources.

I’m so glad we did this tour. There’s nothing like being on the road and having important conversations about the challenges so many of our communities are facing right now, especially in areas Democrats don’t typically spend a lot of time in. Those conversations have shaped our priorities in this campaign, which is the way this should work! And it’s how we’re going to win.

Having grown up in western Wisconsin, with deep family roots in our rural areas, I know that no matter where folks live in our state, they should have access to jobs, education, health care, and the overall quality of life they want and deserve.

I’m running for U.S. Senate to be the leader our state needs right now — someone who will never stop showing up, listening, and working as hard as possible to get results. That's what I have done as State Treasurer, and it’s what I intend to do as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator.

But flipping any seat from red to blue is a challenge (especially during a midterm election in Wisconsin, and you can take my word for it!). It’s an effort that requires a whole lot of resources. So, while we’re getting our message out across the state, I’m hoping I can count on you to help us keep it going.

[**We have a really good shot at defeating Ron Johnson, but only if enough folks like you support our efforts each step of the way. Will you help us return this Senate seat to the people of Wisconsin by chipping in before tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline? I would greatly appreciate anything you can give.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41330393/328341036/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220201_recap2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220201_recap2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWRlN2M3MC1iZDgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hr2r-Va7K7OGCVxzMdUuHO50xXha144t3RT6BPLFFg8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41330394/328341037/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220201_recap2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220201_recap2_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWRlN2M3MC1iZDgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hr2r-Va7K7OGCVxzMdUuHO50xXha144t3RT6BPLFFg8=)

clean_body: I know you’ve probably been getting a lot of emails over the past few days from campaigns trying to hit their monthly fundraising deadlines (including ours). But now that we're in February, I wanted to bump this particular email to the top of your inbox. When I sent this message about our road trip around the state last night, I did not expect the incredible response we got. It's clear that people are hungry for a Democrat who will go to every corner of the state and prioritize making the lives of every Wisconsinite better. I am that candidate and I can be that U.S. Senator — but only with your help. = \------ Begin forwarded message ------ From: Sarah Godlewski Date: January 31, 2022 Subject: Photos from our rural tour across Wisconsin Last week, we kicked off a statewide tour across rural Wisconsin, where we met with farmers, small business owners, mental health workers, teachers, and others to discuss my new plan for our rural communities. I have a few pictures to share with you below, but let me briefly start with this: We are creating an agenda for all Wisconsinites so that we can get this U.S. Senate seat working for everyone again — because the people of our state may not be Ron Johnson’s priority, but they are mine. That’s why I got in this race, and it’s why I’ve been out on the road so much. If we want to defeat Ron Johnson in November, we’ve got to show up, listen, earn trust, and follow through on our word — particularly in places Democrats don’t always go. We need to build a campaign that can compete everywhere and talk to everyone, which is exactly what we’re doing. = Now, here are some of my favorite moments from our rural tour: Our first stop was Landmark Creamery. It was so great to be with the two Annas for a cheesy lunchtime adventure! These incredible small business owners are working with farmers to build sustainable, family-run dairies that support the local economy — one wedge at a time. Next, we drove to Coloma Farms, where Andy showed us around. After the tour, Andy and Steve both took the time to discuss the importance of conservation and supporting our farmers, now more than ever. This Waushara County family farm is a great example of how our farmers are putting sustainability into practice. Then, we stopped in Viroqua, where I met with Mayor Karen Mischel to talk about how climate change and economic security issues are impacting communities like hers. If we want all Wisconsinites to thrive, we have to make investments that matter — in conservation, housing, childcare, and more. That’s what I’m fighting for in this campaign. We spent the night in Eau Claire and headed off to rural Augusta the next morning. Being from western Wisconsin, I’m certainly no stranger to subzero weather — but holy cow, was it a cold one! The way I see it, if farmers like Matt can wake up early, roll up their sleeves, and get to work, they should expect the same from their U.S. Senator. Even the cold couldn’t stop me from getting fired up about my plan to better support our farmers. That’s the commitment I’ll bring to the U.S. Senate. Next stop: Merrill, where my good friend Renea was able to join us for a factory tour at the Weinbrenner Shoe Company. Renea is the co-owner of nearby FreMarq Innovations, another Merrill manufacturer we toured just last summer. Here in Wisconsin, manufacturing is an important part of our story, so I was grateful to Dennis for showing us around and talking about the struggles of being a manufacturer in a rural area. Weinbrenner makes some of the best work boots in the world, right here in Wisconsin. (You bet I bought myself a pair!) After that, we made the drive up north to Ashland and made our way over to Superior for a mental health worker roundtable. Everywhere I go, I hear about struggles with mental health — getting treatment and prevention simply isn't an option for too many, especially in rural communities. It was great to chat with community members about how we can improve mental health services, give schools the resources they need, and support working parents. Shortly after, I also met with educators to talk about the challenges they’re facing in this ongoing pandemic, and most importantly, what I can do to help. Finally, we ended our road trip by catching the sunset at the lighthouse on beautiful Lake Superior. As Senator, I’ll always work to preserve our Great Lakes and ensure public lands stay in public hands so that future generations can continue to enjoy Wisconsin’s natural resources. I’m so glad we did this tour. There’s nothing like being on the road and having important conversations about the challenges so many of our communities are facing right now, especially in areas Democrats don’t typically spend a lot of time in. Those conversations have shaped our priorities in this campaign, which is the way this should work! And it’s how we’re going to win. Having grown up in western Wisconsin, with deep family roots in our rural areas, I know that no matter where folks live in our state, they should have access to jobs, education, health care, and the overall quality of life they want and deserve. I’m running for U.S. Senate to be the leader our state needs right now — someone who will never stop showing up, listening, and working as hard as possible to get results. That's what I have done as State Treasurer, and it’s what I intend to do as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator. But flipping any seat from red to blue is a challenge (especially during a midterm election in Wisconsin, and you can take my word for it!). It’s an effort that requires a whole lot of resources. So, while we’re getting our message out across the state, I’m hoping I can count on you to help us keep it going. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = I can’t tell you how excited I am about what we’re building here, and I want you to know this: Your generous support directly funds our work. The team and I are already making plans to head back out on the road this week, and we’ll be rolling out even more of our campaign agenda soon — informed by all of the conversations we have along the way. Thanks for coming along on this ride with me. It’s been great to meet so many folks across the state, and I’m excited to hopefully meet some of you in your neck of the woods. Forward! — Sarah Godlewski Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest poll of the race. subject: Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up
body:

Harriet was honored to receive overwhelming support from those in attendance at the State Central Committee meeting on January 22nd.
“Hageman was awarded 59 votes from the secret ballot of party activists who took part in the Wyoming Republican State Central Committee poll. Cheney was awarded 6 votes, state Sen. Anthony Bouchard, R-Cheyenne, was awarded two, and Denton Knapp one.

clean_body: | | | | Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” It has been busy on the campaign trail! Harriet has been connecting with the citizens throughout the state, and continues to be the only candidate on the road talking with voters. Check out the details below! For Wyoming, Team Hageman Wyoming GOP State Central Committee Meeting Harriet was honored to receive overwhelming support from those in attendance at the State Central Committee meeting on January 22nd. “Hageman was awarded 59 votes from the secret ballot of party activists who took part in the Wyoming Republican State Central Committee poll. Cheney was awarded 6 votes, state Sen. Anthony Bouchard, R-Cheyenne, was awarded two, and Denton Knapp one. "I think it's a good sign, Hageman told the Casper Star-Tribune. "It's not an endorsement, but these are the county activists." In The News Harriet has also continued to make appearances on national news: Around Wyoming Wednesday, February 2nd Harriet will be at the Chugwater Community Center at 1:00 pm (weather permitting). Saturday, February 5th Harriet is excited to attend the Conservatives in Crimson Gala for Sweetwater, Unita, and Carbon Counties. | | | |

subject: this is CRUCIAL
body:
Peter, As we get our campaign kicked off, I’m so excited to hit the ground running and lay the groundwork to **win big **this November. But if we’re going to build a winning campaign, we need a winning team of grassroots patriots - and that’s why I’m reaching out to you, Peter. There’s a lot of issues facing hardworking Americans like you, and I want YOUR input on what challenges are most important to you. My team and I put together a survey asking **you** what you think is the most important issue facing our country, and your response is _critical_ to helping us build a winning campaign. name: Laura Neuman
subject: A troubling start to Black History Month
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41330637/328346602/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWM0ZWFlZi1iZjgzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1LWcB8He5_DwVLJIc52Vdu4qyRrr3lYF5zVqSbq5PlE=)

| | Peter, Today is the first day of Black History Month – a month meant to celebrate the contributions and accomplishments of Black Americans. But Historic Black Colleges and Universities in Maryland and across the country have been plagued with bomb threats over the last two days – starting off Black History Month with acts of racist violence. While this month is meant to be celebratory, it’s just as much about recognizing the struggles that Black Americans continue to go through in this country. These bomb threats are just one example. Black Americans – especially Black mothers – have disproportionately worse health outcomes than white Americans. Remnants of racist redlining practices keep Black Americans from some of the same housing opportunities as white Americans. Environmental racism forces many people of color to live in unsafe and unhealthy environments. While I wish this month could simply be about honoring Black Americans, it needs to also be about acknowledging the harsh realities of the Black American experience and coming together to find solutions. As a former county executive and entrepreneur, I’ve worked with my community in Maryland to solve problems and empower folks with the opportunities to reach their goals. And that’s what I plan to do as Governor. And growing up in East Baltimore, I know what it’s like to struggle, to have to advocate for justice, and to feel invisible when you need help. I’ve experienced the very best and very worst of what Maryland has to offer – but none of my experiences were ever that of violence or discrimination because of the color of my skin. I believe every Marylander should have access to opportunity regardless of who they are or where they come from. In solidarity,
Laura
---

Fellow American,

My name is Rod Dorilás and I’m a candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District.

My opponent isn’t too terribly famous or even a household name. But she’s a Democrat who I’m not convinced still believes that the American Dream is alive.

**[All I'm asking of you today is that you please take a 10-30 seconds to watch my introduction video that I recorded several months ago and believe is worth the watch](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0fbfed8b3d8c4f36931dfde18b5ac907&_e=36bBmwg07DW9VUkYMP6wT2lRF43ihpFS6TMuy8yPv728yGGAiCAig_9By_BpWr_WfFHJ8YjAQlEsyXtu48_wfnDtEZkvQfxSBVPGShXTYua4G8-tv-knN0DEcUSA5yBjxkuDIRLeZNOVw4mJ9BfFDSyvHMwfW_g5C2LqKtgPfjjJX7F2aulcUXL9_9DKc6thXpNwDBcxGKWwcZRjzWcb-cGY_oMpsLcuwAtJw8hnByiuLyEgOTD_AOo6bzZMvCHllcU1U6-DMEsm4p4lL0degIXZzEX-7hMUTJ6l35k6B07SjZpKx2zCmN565vM4uKmTtMANPktYwgiuLL5yr9Q9n2bNpdQTbnVLSukDANfLeI3NK-zBN53vWsw8Ue6Y3JBxT9vXzc8IXUb8J2YH1qjBGUtemhqw7MEg1p5UF2yE1wKG-XR1UsJ89idR1NIMEvXaIUGPEWHlcAoihxEQPdxr3T8b9vX9hnAEc1iXPodgLt-j-A_EaHlgr1apqA0uiKTl)**.

As a first generation American, I thank god every day the American Dream is alive and well.

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO >> **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0fbfed8b3d8c4f36931dfde18b5ac907&_e=36bBmwg07DW9VUkYMP6wT2lRF43ihpFS6TMuy8yPv728yGGAiCAig_9By_BpWr_WfFHJ8YjAQlEsyXtu48_wfnDtEZkvQfxSBVPGShXTYua4G8-tv-knN0DEcUSA5yBjxkuDIRLeZNOVw4mJ9BfFDSyvHMwfW_g5C2LqKtgPfjjJX7F2aulcUXL9_9DKc6thXpNwDBcxGKWwcZRjzWcb-cGY_oMpsLcuwAtJw8hnByiuLyEgOTD_AOo6bzZMvCHllcU1U6-DMEsm4p4lL0degIXZzEX-7hMUTJ6l35k6B06PgS7K9AjDVcafD2tiiz6lszdhZ7AgZgSdd5pAbH4RzJ1-Z-Nw4NIptMBkWGH7dE06eZfJaxpcKhe53ferbptAfU4Jef7KF3_iSSkzub02F4oOiRW9EBim08kgj3V17KLZZcw0VZIyrKZ1LvJAPAeM3HPkWHZqp8QQVL4FwFHrvTwRcRoG12FME2VLFYj0Hy4TfuxdwEvCIy7WdcolLhBP)
A few key facts about myself that you may find informative:
* I’m a first generation American, the son of two Haitian immigrants. **My parents immigrated to the United States to pick crops** in order to provide for our family.
* At 17, I enlisted in the Navy and served six years planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles.
* I attended Syracuse University Law School on the G.I. Bill.
* Following graduation, **I worked for the Department of Commerce under President Trump** (the honor of a lifetime!).

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO TODAY >> **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0fbfed8b3d8c4f36931dfde18b5ac907&_e=36bBmwg07DW9VUkYMP6wT2lRF43ihpFS6TMuy8yPv728yGGAiCAig_9By_BpWr_WfFHJ8YjAQlEsyXtu48_wfnDtEZkvQfxSBVPGShXTYua4G8-tv-knN0DEcUSA5yBjxkuDIRLeZNOVw4mJ9BfFDSyvHMwfW_g5C2LqKtgPfjjJX7F2aulcUXL9_9DKc6thXpNwDBcxGKWwcZRjzWcb-cGY_oMpsLcuwAtJw8hnByiuLyEgOTD_AOo6bzZMvCHllcU1U6-DMEsm4p4lL0degIXZzEX-7hMUTJ6l35k6B06NlK_Nuq7p4G7TMLafMyK9bHWnj6UijCJYrrTYVodWWlU26lODtNNk_LNjmB4Xn5N1MWM3GoW_GW_KMvrXJZF0YQICGT1UsE7CHAh4KR-z8KxwdUwRulzO_O-hUELPfuL8Hu2LGQ06lMYYmqQ1TUIkC4DcTNqf6stQPmi5O6pWvWKH9KshMHfL_5vCFqErXQzLtukNJ0LrcqAEnHiCi8aJ)
**With 435 members, the U.S. House is bigger than any one person**. However, my own personal story has taught me that just about anything in America is possible if you work hard enough. I believe that maxim still rings true today, and that’s why I’m asking you to send a few dollars to my campaign if you can.

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

[** TAKE A CHANCE ON ME>>**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0fbfed8b3d8c4f36931dfde18b5ac907&_e=36bBmwg07DW9VUkYMP6wT2lRF43ihpFS6TMuy8yPv728yGGAiCAig_9By_BpWr_WfFHJ8YjAQlEsyXtu48_wfnDtEZkvQfxSBVPGShXTYua4G8-tv-knN0DEcUSA5yBjxkuDIRLeZNOVw4mJ9BfFDSyvHMwfW_g5C2LqKtgPfjjJX7F2aulcUXL9_9DKc6thXpNwDBcxGKWwcZRjzWcb-cGY_oMpsLcuwAtJw8hnByiuLyEgOTD_AOo6bzZMvCHllcU1U6-DMEsm4p4lL0degIXZzEX-7hMUTJ6l35k6B07zotDs8OpclktzmE2HXvRLY3sWSFY8Kq9cWX9VOfE0BwhJP3SJucNbHZ6V4HpG9jcqzic-7hhCbJvuPU8jDiwDVl7YPtavu0cwXVEt83w20DOnmFCDwxRsa8Td2koVKLGAigWkEfefdVEmqPKUPOCgdSt7dsGLql3tZ1QHx6Idwh4apdXTNpc2wfl4y_65ms7BYTfAlbPDndJpk89ncQSx)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=0fbfed8b3d8c4f36931dfde18b5ac907&_e=36bBmwg07DW9VUkYMP6wT2lRF43ihpFS6TMuy8yPv728yGGAiCAig_9By_BpWr_WfFHJ8YjAQlEsyXtu48_wfnDtEZkvQfxSBVPGShXTYua4G8-tv-knN0DEcUSA5yBjxkuDIRLeZNOVw4mJ9BfFDSyvHMwfW_g5C2LqKtgPfjjJX7F2aulcUXL9_9DKc6thXpNwDBcxGKWwcZRjzWcb-cGY_oMpsLcuwAtJw8hnByiuLyEgOTD_AOo6bzZMvCHllcU1U6-DMEsm4p4lL0degIXZzEX-7hMUTJ6l35k6B04vD0926Ykm6Eh2TvRFNlZhYJvFDRG_KSTLCIbhKnHH--PVRFqUBUoZ3BISKNHQ3Ybg5b2C-5vTHiDmM91Ft9ZueszhDCzIKP6EYx5RNhWV0dAkrRAdd2rl5ajIvU9WwZsGydlzoSGVssYuxMd5wFqNvUGzgJihzEueCtzoyYp6KiLbKCSnqPobBXp9ay-mJBCKxQwNEU-9h6nP1GmRkibO)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=0fbfed8b3d8c4f36931dfde18b5ac907&_t=rmXKRVTswNR1VRVeqtrmQ5ApfLxJCyT9PSciEWJy8HnYoypttsMHMtuPG8GPqw2yjMOKEj95_oOytT-woesxdAViSZRv0pQSMtrrneTCfgp9LMhm7BVg81p97C5ddumUpoBPs5vQlACoZb6XMi4OD864UOAJOJD25VS6wJ7d3VM%3D).

subject: We're on the ballot, friend!

body:
This is a huge step for our campaign. | Friend, We’re thrilled to announce that we have officially filed as candidates for the Democratic primary in May! We couldn’t have done it without the help of thousands of Ohioans who took the time to sign our petition for candidacy — and folks from this state and across the country who generously donated to fund our movement. _But there’s a long road ahead before the general election, friend._ We’re counting on our grassroots supporters like you to help build up momentum and keep our movement going strong so we can bring home a win in our primary in just over 3 months. **[Please, donate anything you can right now to help us flip Ohio blue and write the comeback story our state John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

clean_body: This is a huge step for our campaign. | Friend, We’re thrilled to announce that we have officially filed as candidates for the Democratic primary in May! We couldn’t have done it without the help of thousands of Ohioans who took the time to sign our petition for candidacy — and folks from this state and across the country who generously donated to fund our movement. But there’s a long road ahead before the general election, friend. We’re counting on our grassroots supporters like you to help build up momentum and keep our movement going strong so we can bring home a win in our primary in just over 3 months. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you for everything, John & Teresa = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = =_ Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 30 GARFIELD PLACE SUITE 900 CINCINNATI, OH 45202 United States Click here to

| | Good Afternoon! Today, February 1st, marks the beginning of Black History Month, a month focused on those known and unknown names that have contributed to our country. In schools across the country, our kids will hear names familiar to you:
* [Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.(1929-1968)](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/d2NwrqOjt/c?w=UTrjYI2YjIQVCDwqm-jBzBkHltdd2uW2jAx0Y8Fv5w8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhY2twYXN0Lm9yZy9hZnJpY2FuLWFtZXJpY2FuLWhpc3Rvcnkva2luZy1tYXJ0aW4tbHV0aGVyLWpyLTE5MjktMTk2OC8iLCJyIjoiODQ5ODQ4ZmItNzA5Mi00NWE1LTFlZGYtZDZmNmNlZmVmNjJkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)[ ](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/d2NwrqOjt/c?w=UTrjYI2YjIQVCDwqm-jBzBkHltdd2uW2jAx0Y8Fv5w8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhY2twYXN0Lm9yZy9hZnJpY2FuLWFtZXJpY2FuLWhpc3Rvcnkva2luZy1tYXJ0aW4tbHV0aGVyLWpyLTE5MjktMTk2OC8iLCJyIjoiODQ5ODQ4ZmItNzA5Mi00NWE1LTFlZGYtZDZmNmNlZmVmNjJkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0)Recognized as the "face" of the Civil Rights Movement.
