While it may be ugly, painful, dark, or even embarrassing: History is colorblind. The recent controversy around the false narrative of "CRT" aims to paint over the "blemishes" of American history by omitting many of the atrocities Black Americans suffered. Events like the [Tulsa Race Massacre of 1921](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/d2NwrqOjt/c?w=bzf4i0aX_H13Y1b8OsW_dB5PwbEncwzHEUeRRnFcyIU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmVoLmdvdi9hcnRpY2xlLzE5MjEtdHVsc2EtbWFzc2FjcmUiLCJyIjoiODQ5ODQ4ZmItNzA5Mi00NWE1LTFlZGYtZDZmNmNlZmVmNjJkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0), the terror of ["Sundown Towns"](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/d2NwrqOjt/c?w=7FglhX8jnbXkyXn9KDbNVGVTbiv8tJNlj9lSd4iupdc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhY2twYXN0Lm9yZy9hZnJpY2FuLWFtZXJpY2FuLWhpc3Rvcnkvc3VuZG93bi10b3ducyIsInIiOiI4NDk4NDhmYi03MDkyLTQ1YTUtMWVkZi1kNmY2Y2VmZWY2MmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) and the oppression of the [Jim Crow era](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/d2NwrqOjt/c?w=rqP5RYWMlDSL9mzEi22gvK7Q9JWQQjeD4QPlP1_0vio.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmF0dGxlZmllbGRzLm9yZy9sZWFybi9hcnRpY2xlcy9qaW0tY3Jvdy1lcmEiLCJyIjoiODQ5ODQ4ZmItNzA5Mi00NWE1LTFlZGYtZDZmNmNlZmVmNjJkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0) are glazed over or omitted entirely.

| | With the current political climate, I feel a need to acknowledge [John Lewis (1940-2020)](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/d2NwrqOjt/c?w=HJ69LMQYGb7s5T4f-t6FswV03OXTOeSsoditn3e7LR0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmxhY2twYXN0Lm9yZy9hZnJpY2FuLWFtZXJpY2FuLWhpc3RvcnkvbGV3aXMtam9obi1yLTE5NDAvIiwiciI6IjcxODU1MDNiLWVkZTktNDY0Ny0yZGMwLTlkODcyZmFmYWFjYyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9), former Representative of Georgia's 5th Congressional district. His life, his actions, his words inspired so many during the Civil Rights movement. He literally gave his blood, sweat and tears; not just to the Civil Rights movement but also to the service of his fellow Americans for decades. The motivations for his life's work were focused on the fact that if you don't have a vote, you don't have a voice. That's the real reason, I believe, that [H.R.4, "The John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act"](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/d2NwrqOjt/c?w=wUty1XvikEWeLmzl2Q5nKsN9jGauIHKalVf8frSZ5xo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE3dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC80P3E9JTdCXCJzZWFyY2hcIiUzQSU1QlwiaHI0XCIlNUQlN0Qmcz0xJnI9MSIsInIiOiI3MTg1NTAzYi1lZGU5LTQ2NDctMmRjMC05ZDg3MmZhZmFhY2MiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), was named in his honor and must be passed to protect the vote for all. Everyone has heard the idiom "history repeats itself". This cannot be allowed to happen.

body:
| | | **BREAKING: “Trump dangles prospect of pardons for January 6 defendants if elected in 2024”**

_With Donald Trump CONTINUING to attack the work of the January 6th committee, we need to know:_
**Do you support the bipartisan January 6th investigation?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6004?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220201-TrumpAlert-Trump6JANPardons-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220201-TrumpAlert-Trump6JANPardons-ETG-sl1&akid=2821%2E9716520%2E-MfPtM)
---

---

This is serious, team.

The deadly January 6th insurrection was the most significant attack on our government in _centuries_ , but **Donald Trump just suggested he plans to PARDON the perpetrators of these heinous crimes if given the chance.**

Trump's threat could undo ALL of the important work of the January 6th committee, so we need to prove that Americans demand **_accountability_** for the attack on our Capitol -- not another Trumpist coverup.

**We set a goal of gathering 30,000 responses before midnight to our urgent Democratic poll, but right now we’re 9.4% behind -- tell us now to lock in your answer:****
Please respond by midnight:****Do you support the bipartisan January 6th investigation?**
| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6004?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220201-TrumpAlert-Trump6JANPardons-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220201-TrumpAlert-Trump6JANPardons-ETG-sl1&akid=2821%2E9716520%2E-MfPtM)

body:
South Texans deserve better. Here’s how we can unseat him: | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRSv-a9dlKe66gdqzpDT8fFzllWqWWUdCp02aOwpZX6O66aOoWVCJqQvMGUPCaFo9_G17PIMgq9qM6T622nY7BkoILWAEfmZNC0dSIbjwrLoegTTkgeI-lsti2Z_hI9qLUpIDrcxf7BvGJAz8gRK96Adq6cjElJBr7h4s5md21eSY-m-lrZBl1_NxwdgjROC98wLALtz6f-6Tu3ReiFzrqMyPACXrKDxJ5_mZlfKxzfUNZ8ss94gEoW6WBcIdMWb4dn2GqAjM_KbZ5TwgUzTWVZDN-0pT4WIpicdd24cWXqpZ/3j7/SVf2VI_4QC-noT6qhLDP_g/h0/ks2swAd4g1v8C1m4WtiagRZDjFE9KeMIpJ7qeerc4jU) **Peter — Yesterday, Henry Cuellar gave an interview for the first time since his home and campaign office was raided by the FBI.** However, not much of anything happened. When asked about his ties with Azerbaijan and the overseas trips that he arranged himself, all he said was “this is an ongoing investigation and we will be cooperating and show that there was no wrongdoing.” **South Texans deserve answers.** They shouldn’t have to wonder whether their representative is truly looking out for their interests or his own. **Simply put: Texas’ 28th district deserves better, and Henry Cuellar has got to go.** [_**Jessica Cisneros is the best choice for South Texas because she will lead with integrity and put South Texans first. With just a little less than 2 weeks left until early voting starts, will you contribute $5 now to help Jessica unseat Henry Cuellar? We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important.**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC0Sih_dC-mrPmFd2QiG8VX7RZSRV5fJmXEUDDv1UX-fet65ODWg8HaowiXXcHrqypUu3cPTZv7XewUWrzDb89g4RcGXYU_q0u_sFYsQHebYIfzn1ulbDY7mwY3zQ3Jz9sqJ17CJoSfd1MCbi6SKWPDB0FspzGNDrBI-G1qgYqcWGzCKOxgT3V9EEWj71OFNgvScTV3PlyACAnMYEHx2XiWi4KduDEZqiMHlozYWeRvE3B45nm5RPATfqKsWk61ymvNOsNfxL1fhCzs-xJM92MjIWNsZlRwhr67fPypI1UDYmnVj4kfXCj4tL6qYNmkeV3fns0FwTSNPIGoa5H5FFZPvgVU2nVQiwehzNVQNGAGXF1pJmwP1HRFKq04h3uUaj6jcUKdeHl16I0EJ_yBAVXpQ/3j7/SVf2VI_4QC-noT6qhLDP_g/h1/bhZ1K5GH2awA1Xhsp6H3uy_Ro3v70X66ibnYHTuScU0) [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC0Sih_dC-mrPmFd2QiG8VX7RZSRV5fJmXEUDDv1UX-ffJyQZczfSmlmrEmddKSyfmUAi09C9nUELV65Xh32HzwYxZYwO3nnz5qh9vTz8zf_xOwPZJtvd8Hcbpdodx75znpuzZ5POWaTzJjck1aHLv35LIFf9I1UliGKEir6-Cg7pTXZVte9vvzR7D2-mv6_AMmK4cWecZMffZ5MMoHrPHvsUeyKDjjLtP9Kax4tk6plK4XwbWygITLQWPedaD7asZzBgPJJ1ZwJj2T-tiw576VTc0nQAWnJRkWEV5nJ8jeetblbiRezhIeiaYlHx0zIUjjUBhxxrSREOlhB_yYaH3Fk2QQp5hHLSDYpKK2h3JtezZ0iNzYRL3EeYmGSI5wBo5iukmDr5YP9rPx9d9rDZwWw/3j7/SVf2VI_4QC-noT6qhLDP_g/h2/LRbc1tUHsZEU0iKt0B3bOwDUmCCzWOc87EIr68kPBlI) It’s safe to bet that voters in Texas’ 28th District will think twice about casting a ballot for Cuellar after hearing about the investigation. But we can’t bet on winning just because Cuellar is under investigation by the FBI. Why? Because he still has _a lot_ of resources to keep his campaign afloat from his corporate donors. He just released his FEC report and has $2.3 million in campaign cash to spend. And right now, he’s outraising us by hundreds of thousands and says that he’s “determined to win.” **The truth is that 88% of House races were won by the top spending candidate. Unless we see a huge surge, that’ll be Henry Cuellar. So, what do you say, Peter? Can we count on your help?** [_**We might be outraised but we won't be out-organized. If you want to be a part of the movement to unseat Henry Cuellar and bring progressive change to South Texas, please make a $5 contribution to help us close the gap. Remember, early voting starts in just 13 days.**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC0Sih_dC-mrPmFd2QiG8VX7RZSRV5fJmXEUDDv1UX-ffporHRFTaffhRLS2z5tNxwG_CvbQ_jbwLzlBGHDc_tT8LAtGVhHueQkRrBP6mHlW83qD937-EvEKpXtsGPl5ovSQNz-0uzgwZM8ZX3ZVMO81YBRl2Y6cYc4xwMZBl4uCxUr_Z6H83ZP6-cxuLJSlE04UsGxfUBfDg24uf3CP2Vr1MWP8Y0J6s4XMH2CnRuC7bYM_XU1ITqkMl0Cx_XFYwBVLqJcQs3zF1opTp_M3_HA4xYVN03B-qj2CC0UHrobB1zjn5rXgzfYyvvZ3EVkxU5iWiv3JTeDoyGp6WHAE7jvusZSVTm9IYhNIuOhYeYsbwuJQBMZISV9XCl_rn8orgZD98vTuc-MrT5Ymk1QZVEqA/3j7/SVf2VI_4QC-noT6qhLDP_g/h3/esEe1WR_OokgKQJZxo-q73V-B3bnHOpGA57Y-XwerlA) [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQC0Sih_dC-mrPmFd2QiG8VX7RZSRV5fJmXEUDDv1UX-fc_iF17vSa5E6ieZRMrN5lo-LOsyCNOitblc692xRKNyelFjCKWPcoGMRiSzS2bYEUt3S0PAtqImfMf4Z_G9YJ-oG3wUaCfARLXo5pvXVGL-xXaDPv7GD9WnzHZ7IsOh2ZEKOITmqdBCPbjK74T2nHEnIA9ZfREZGfBKzENgUpIUFKx5qvD0C0HcDtmiA8cL-B6bVn4Jo7K0b9WPCiCYtAnVsBlc9W7Oke_9EvL52LADI37dmiNj3O2Ahdxn9Yag7BcqM4gWQVejx7XKQgyqBcpCHmdCGvwxhFsUBM8OSlCDYd9afQ2rnY6ecUXGjTYWyhPAt1Qa1iboluaVBYOZGPOe7_0kCZeXRtC6CmuO-1dcA/3j7/SVf2VI_4QC-noT6qhLDP_g/h4/tSDQA_qCaEqiMI89y4t7oFgHxFtUPJCpeq6XEQR3smY) Thanks for all you do to make this campaign resilient. — Team Cisneros

clean_body: South Texans deserve better. Here’s how we can unseat him: | | | Peter — Yesterday, Henry Cuellar gave an interview for the first time since his home and campaign office was raided by the FBI. However, not much of anything happened. When asked about his ties with Azerbaijan and the overseas trips that he arranged himself, all he said was “this is an ongoing investigation and we will be cooperating and show that there was no wrongdoing.” South Texans deserve answers. They shouldn’t have to wonder whether their representative is truly looking out for their interests or his own. Simply put: Texas’ 28th district deserves better, and Henry Cuellar has got to go. It’s safe to bet that voters in Texas’ 28th District will think twice about casting a ballot for Cuellar after hearing about the investigation. But we can’t bet on winning just because Cuellar is under investigation by the FBI. Why? Because he still has a lot of resources to keep his campaign afloat from his corporate donors. He just released his FEC report and has $2.3 million in campaign cash to spend. And right now, he’s outraising us by hundreds of thousands and says that he’s “determined to win.” The truth is that 88% of House races were won by the top spending candidate. Unless we see a huge surge, that’ll be Henry Cuellar. So, what do you say, Peter? Can we count on your help? Thanks for all you do to make this campaign resilient. — Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Braddock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Watch our campaign’s first digital spot in 2022.
#
**Derek, we’re giving folks in****Cresco an exclusive look at our first official video spot of 2022.****[Be among the first to watch “Braddock” right now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42815?refcode=ema20220201-4423&t=1&akid=4423%2E434096%2Ea0ecnq)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42815?refcode=ema20220201-4423&t=2&akid=4423%2E434096%2Ea0ecnq)
_My name is Lisa Freeman. I'm a social worker. I've been a social worker for over 40 years. I started my career in Braddock, Pennsylvania, working alongside, at that time, Mr. John Fetterman._
_Braddock [in the early 2000s] was almost like an apocalyptic town before John became mayor. The steel mills had been closed for a long time. There were no jobs there. There was no affordable housing. There was no tax base._
_So when I first met John, before he was mayor, the unsolicited truth was that I thought this man was crazy. He was running a program that was funded by the Urban League of Allegheny County._
_I went to his office and it was very minimal. A desk, and this big seven foot guy sitting behind the desk. And he talked real streets. He talked real plain. And I knew instantly that John cared for these young men, and that he was sincerely involved in their lives and sincerely the change that they needed at that time._
_John is a no-nonsense kind of person. He doesn't spare any unnecessary words. What he says is what he means. There is no pretension with John. If you see him today, he's gonna be the same way tomorrow._
_[John] was a one man workforce for the city of Braddock. In essence, he was on call for 24 hours, seven days a week. When a fire broke out, you would see John on the fire truck or behind it. When there was a shooting, John was on that call. When there was a car accident. John was at that accident. You could see him directing traffic._
_John brought out the best in people in Braddock. He gave people hope, when there shouldn't have been any hope. You can see tangible growth coming in [to Braddock]. You can see small businesses coming in. You can see people being invested in. People who want to own homes? There's resources for them._
_There’s pride there. There's always been pride, and the pride is even better now for people who live in Braddock._
**[Watch “Braddock,” our campaign’s first video spot of 2022.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42815?refcode=ema20220201-4423&t=3&akid=4423%2E434096%2Ea0ecnq) No one overlooked. No one taken for granted. That’s the only way to win PA.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42815?refcode=ema20220201-4423&t=4&akid=4423%2E434096%2Ea0ecnq)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220201-4423-footer&t=5&refcode2=4423_434096_a0ecnq&akid=4423%2E434096%2Ea0ecnq)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=4423%2E434096%2Ea0ecnq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=4423%2E434096%2Ea0ecnq)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Paul Gazelka
subject: Will you become a delegate for me at your local caucus?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Provided by
body:
I would be grateful for your support [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=b16eb703e5594039901d549b2633ad18&_e=3_eNp8LL05GWKXWO5sSZiGNxRTsr2rIwgOncDNzoyjjoqVFoqys5kj9hq2mfUrE1HaeIQl2eIj236VW7oqZ0St6EiTwiLgGdtptfaPqCSzXB1NX4opkOdvKKMQVgwVIKyh7UF6RBFUGn0VOe7mbsp1WPeFBNVF4jFNtXr5eq5agbTZjUiEbOnGWnE3MJtra4ivikd7aqCna4BTYu9WMm6BiBahXVT2swFaokMJR_dfCcXGiNEHhAWt6uMGUsKACFDI8QcWnKFPkmFHmtBwrFoWE46ORjIOGG8O5GMggx7D1ohGRBPyBVTBcPSGPjQy8WQIy-G2HXFAUyQdrMhuqpf7o8LBC651Ke5g-9VZH4MBg%3D) My friend,
We’re taking an important next step to unseating Governor Tim Walz tomorrow. Before you head to **[your Caucus location](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=3fcb452ec5b84111b419c69f3fa50201&_m=b16eb703e5594039901d549b2633ad18&_e=3_eNp8LL05GWKXWO5sSZiNTvtlX97GfOb9EVmvcV5ySA8IZgfzh3i659MyL4t-SAmQdi8xO_x3SeRH8-oWHBSNW9MEML21iEXkI59OtCwqf7ZIEmOnG2JqnIwM15fZwst2T7yUJP-hJjTLaq2b_HxZ4PN6fPTEmp2eLCxBjz-m4Kzb3OIBYv0TYQ0rZoUyREof1bJLt5-MHXeQtREu34hY77GT-WP07vTJX39ntvk4xqFOeMoJjD6XFuZif5vuqTZ3vk2rwaezmrNEEb15ipTw%3D%3D)** , I want to make sure you know where I stand on a few of the issues: ✅ Public safety is of utmost importance. We must support an increase in resources and training in order to protect our home. It's time for us to get tough on crime and clean up our streets.
✅ We must cut the social security tax, lower taxes, and protect small businesses. ✅ Minnesota parents must be in the know when it comes to their kids’ education. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tina=20Ramirez?=
subject: The 1776 Pledge
body:
Will you take the pledge? |

https://secure.anedot.com/c6c43134-3af7-4a87-a177-ff87ffbf53d7/1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20220121_1776pledge_1776-club
Friend,

I am putting my foot down and drawing the line for our children's education; that is why I signed the ‘1776 Pledge.'

The 1776 Pledge was founded in response to Critical Race Theory. As Biden, Virginia's Democrat's and the Teachers Unions force Critical Race Theory on our children, I wanted to FIGHT BACK against it.

By taking the Pledge, here’s how we fight back:
* Restore honest, patriotic education that cultivates in our children a profound love for our country.
* Promote a curriculum that teaches that all children are created equal, have equal moral value under God, our Constitution, and the law, and are members of a national community united by our founding principles.
* Prohibit any curriculum that pits students against one another on the basis of race or sex.
* Prevent schools from politicizing education by prohibiting any curriculum that requires students to protest and lobby during or after school.

And now I want YOU to take the pledge, Friend.

Please make a contribution of $17.76 by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to show your support of the 1776 Pledge. (https://secure.anedot.com/c6c43134-3af7-4a87-a177-ff87ffbf53d7/1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20220121_1776pledge_1776-club)

🇺🇸 CONTRIBUTE $17.76 🇺🇸 (https://secure.anedot.com/c6c43134-3af7-4a87-a177-ff87ffbf53d7/1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20220121_1776pledge_1776-club)

CONTRIBUTE $25 (https://secure.anedot.com/c6c43134-3af7-4a87-a177-ff87ffbf53d7/1776-pledge?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20220121_1776pledge_1776-club)

CONTRIBUTE $50 (https://secure.anedot.com/c6c43134-3af7-4a87-a177-ff87ffbf53d7/1776-pledge?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20220121_1776pledge_1776-club)

CONTRIBUTE $100 (https://secure.anedot.com/c6c43134-3af7-4a87-a177-ff87ffbf53d7/1776-pledge?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20220121_1776pledge_1776-club)

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT (https://secure.anedot.com/c6c43134-3af7-4a87-a177-ff87ffbf53d7/1776-pledge?amount=1776&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20220121_1776pledge_1776-club)

This pledge has been signed by over 150 candidates and government officials, including Governor Krisit Noem and Gov. Glen Youngkin.

Our children should be taught how to think, not what to think, and they certainly should not be taught to judge one another on the basis of skin color or any other external feature.

So please, step up and make a contribution of $17.76 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to show your support and where you stand. (https://secure.anedot.com/c6c43134-3af7-4a87-a177-ff87ffbf53d7/1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20220121_1776pledge_1776-club)

Thank you,

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/how-much-are-you-paying-for-gas?utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210803_tinaramirez_gas-prices
Tina Ramirez
Republican Candidate
VA’s 12th State Senate District
Defending American Values

🇺🇸 CONTRIBUTE $17.76 🇺🇸 (https://secure.anedot.com/c6c43134-3af7-4a87-a177-ff87ffbf53d7/1776-pledge?amount=17.76&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=20220121_1776pledge_1776-club)

subject: My parents picked crops to give me an American Dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? Peter,

My name is Rod Dorilás and I’m a candidate for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District.

My opponent isn’t too terribly famous or even a household name. But she’s a Democrat who I’m not convinced still believes that the American Dream is alive.

**[All I'm asking of you today is that you please take a 10-30 seconds to watch my introduction video that I recorded several months ago and believe is worth the watch](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=08c2b786957c4fa3aaab180a2817fc25&_e=F_852G2S-jJ6G0zJWSfRRQBJpMo_uaYi7hQ_uC107NXLVI6mk_5zVqzmcFHhWKIts2Xx_ZY8y2ol82kpbM75fR10vFvrn-7ZbpZbgDRRDZlse8Un7qs5R975ptzaPznQRVfCfdHVaT9ptv7PGBf_NDClN1cmGe7-TMpeZpmol2420ZHvtt9w5OHLSGCefejGY63VNaBUnrI1hiE-sBIH51oHnPEY0766ZASdiHNN8NDEmfzQNyygDTnbcQrjFmQcxQFK2n-YtHjzy7yt0_CNhn_8ObeNVfIIx-vZTf_lvzZSlCexklM2c_F-A-EP7oT_boumbThaA_eKb3znyxZ56gu6m3W8mFsvDoVxsMWDrQJsCST_wtngU7yBxMc2S7KvW8VVXEIN1JyzNigX-lsq26MXHSoGtcxTON5lOZeuWJb83QgDFZTNRtZ5UQ3QPS9fdvQVyNRm6Hn9G0Wn2ujnmoQU7WuW8W0X_WbsxmgJNdJWhuQapSNSwbRlgvdNRVWY)**.

As a first generation American, I thank god every day the American Dream is alive and well.

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=08c2b786957c4fa3aaab180a2817fc25&_e=F_852G2S-jJ6G0zJWSfRRQBJpMo_uaYi7hQ_uC107NXLVI6mk_5zVqzmcFHhWKIts2Xx_ZY8y2ol82kpbM75fR10vFvrn-7ZbpZbgDRRDZlse8Un7qs5R975ptzaPznQRVfCfdHVaT9ptv7PGBf_NDClN1cmGe7-TMpeZpmol2420ZHvtt9w5OHLSGCefejGY63VNaBUnrI1hiE-sBIH51oHnPEY0766ZASdiHNN8NDEmfzQNyygDTnbcQrjFmQcxQFK2n-YtHjzy7yt0_CNhn_8ObeNVfIIx-vZTf_lvzaiMbzyRcUurQ_iqRIojOkdV3IYLVM87ftyF5Y7IxtR73wfFSkzyy1uNdYXya09yogWuHSutV13aDNCglW0SQVXYTg7iOgtFEGnDe69yGOuQ1FL_FSrcSYMxVsDPjLHyfLrooPFvgY44oPyWc1m2CDE9Ur2X8YGAAHPexw8FADVno_PpPuHalS4LEq-JqmyXdcDEU9zk0FBVLiul9e0bVUv)
A few key facts about myself that you may find informative:
* I’m a first generation American, the son of two Haitian immigrants. **My parents immigrated to the United States to pick crops** in order to provide for our family.
* At 17, I enlisted in the Navy and served six years planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles.
* I attended Syracuse University Law School on the G.I. Bill.
* Following graduation, **I worked for the Department of Commerce under President Trump** (the honor of a lifetime!).

[**WATCH MY LAUNCH VIDEO TODAY >> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=08c2b786957c4fa3aaab180a2817fc25&_e=F_852G2S-jJ6G0zJWSfRRQBJpMo_uaYi7hQ_uC107NXLVI6mk_5zVqzmcFHhWKIts2Xx_ZY8y2ol82kpbM75fR10vFvrn-7ZbpZbgDRRDZlse8Un7qs5R975ptzaPznQRVfCfdHVaT9ptv7PGBf_NDClN1cmGe7-TMpeZpmol2420ZHvtt9w5OHLSGCefejGY63VNaBUnrI1hiE-sBIH51oHnPEY0766ZASdiHNN8NDEmfzQNyygDTnbcQrjFmQcxQFK2n-YtHjzy7yt0_CNhn_8ObeNVfIIx-vZTf_lvzbgqdgl8nP4BOesRRDlKy51403A0NdFRxZcBXeO06gCdYuIfUG6x9xMhmyCLrfHi2DiSGyDgerrLp-fAN_MmLVwqISozuKJSvN0mjJAOdh9-ycc1z1GrR_0QiAB6EJFhhj2M848QIoIFwhMva0eT9KBYxQ8piaiXFPoEX-96x-PbMKly_ZXSiznpXtCRyOOdGzc3Nz1iGJpqtH7ImJNrUgd)
**With 435 members, the U.S. House is bigger than any one person**. However, my own personal story has taught me that just about anything in America is possible if you work hard enough. I believe that maxim still rings true today, and that’s why I’m asking you to send a few dollars to my campaign if you can.

For Country,

Rod Dorilás

[** TAKE A CHANCE ON ME>>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=08c2b786957c4fa3aaab180a2817fc25&_e=F_852G2S-jJ6G0zJWSfRRQBJpMo_uaYi7hQ_uC107NXLVI6mk_5zVqzmcFHhWKIts2Xx_ZY8y2ol82kpbM75fR10vFvrn-7ZbpZbgDRRDZlse8Un7qs5R975ptzaPznQRVfCfdHVaT9ptv7PGBf_NDClN1cmGe7-TMpeZpmol2420ZHvtt9w5OHLSGCefejGY63VNaBUnrI1hiE-sBIH51oHnPEY0766ZASdiHNN8NDEmfzQNyygDTnbcQrjFmQcxQFK2n-YtHjzy7yt0_CNhn_8ObeNVfIIx-vZTf_lvzaWO8zRGkXtKvqLlUwyrHKOshRaBNGueSHb4lVfe6DoFMgNME1KgRDZZTbOPns_7m4fMavQSB8D-JXssuoyyHlcRKwuppwF8LmXt6SbAiJNun9zeSqagyw7su8ZmU8hzIPveUn8Od9GcvP8dZggJaegwG75FXE5sXy2IxERSITMYfxjLhPnZ4hvzPFGNMq46OHCZU_oYADbwyghBMkk0Cqr)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=08c2b786957c4fa3aaab180a2817fc25&_e=F_852G2S-jJ6G0zJWSfRRQBJpMo_uaYi7hQ_uC107NXLVI6mk_5zVqzmcFHhWKIts2Xx_ZY8y2ol82kpbM75fR10vFvrn-7ZbpZbgDRRDZlse8Un7qs5R975ptzaPznQRVfCfdHVaT9ptv7PGBf_NDClN1cmGe7-TMpeZpmol2420ZHvtt9w5OHLSGCefejGY63VNaBUnrI1hiE-sBIH51oHnPEY0766ZASdiHNN8NDEmfzQNyygDTnbcQrjFmQcxQFK2n-YtHjzy7yt0_CNhn_8ObeNVfIIx-vZTf_lvzZ38enzykmaS-8rNTYf0LXznxIHMFLa7ig7vJiMu52GoBZLWKSCITXfO7JyO1wBzbBnpQJb_oBAQ5GsZRR4yiXukMusrNmQeWAKg41sY2n46rfkHwxnXciqdl0jrcn_Pu6ivgdCryaOT_l70G1BPNWUik9KHGbeMUJVHTeYP4JtvZse6ZGUiKu1Rf4ndDIyu_961Q2fxH7xftlmAmPRR8zb)
---

| Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
---

This message was sent to your email address ending in @gmail.com because it was listed as the best way to contact you.

However, if this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any more of our emails...

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=08c2b786957c4fa3aaab180a2817fc25&_t=pjyZqi8rMpyirL06Fkw7W-J5kqKzwYlx8xI67XMz7RbQ6COMFcyDAxwnHBXIAJ5ILhoQQQoKn5nBsjytqK3vaBVMDkzOXq_nCwSHvJF0p0VEUmSHZ09ZNFQ4NCkVcmtQSO3cNFppGWDC9HnO9pHo2-RHcgFDYproWE5SWcqjfgM%3D).

name: Arizona Democrats
subject: Honoring Black History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | These trailblazers made a difference | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDA_0cYERoA58Z1RJw84n34EDMQJKrKVxl1BL2e9dwGdM3hiRLzScDcEH9R3MypU19pCNnqJ00ZRN306dBLaRTgMDMlD-N_PtemPsup3cSErlaoWZ2LuXP7QYL8soITtLeqEEQD9VTRY_qTAwBY0mnJv0NEEnlmTtHCU8mCjZgpMLFlFvIBM9kmQcTEAVFEVpLK1ziEQ2C-7pdNDv5JbR0VkuQwI0yLrpcC5bt-7y7iWVTWPyDhF81ZUbdYW5xea9j5kaJLGAtncPyyjqIDCK3glLexsVOBGJ6dGLJT4aWIFFP5nwETfb1kT_HeBIXwl5sU5HjS6hoQWzjSsrtE7ll5jBiMmWQnySw2QguwE5Bb_lKw6fIggMo9KavSyxVpqwSm7Pvz1M9qlpnMp7mms6ROQ/3j7/GkI7Q85YRbCTJbnjrq00GA/h0/ITOlSr3MOCUsVSvm3rSFRoXhAjcHF7FEVQdImxhnowE)
---
| Team, in honor of **Black History Month** starting today, we wanted to share the stories of three Black Arizonians who made a difference in their communities.

We believe it’s important to highlight our leaders both past and present. History is still being made, and we promise to highlight our present leaders in the future.

But for today, here are the stories of three Black leaders who blazed a trail in the AZ legislature.

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh_OzWuyr9Xf7I__8G3STU5YbnAlTQ11gO98yYlSU4jwaK18SzYyVJtFkFlpdo658b4XhIY6f3yADqamOsyYsTMQHqN5si1PTSvOMHOe-60pJXE07yxb3h6JR5fM1X8KoXYzAZ9IT0qINDqIfpnjQjFde1PWYh_aR-Eik7evBh2yO8bpnNq1zKOk70QQLWXPFttXCiRO4x9oUXoG2kD6I0DD/3j7/GkI7Q85YRbCTJbnjrq00GA/h1/776qGlZB3PsVl60hEya39WZxwX1Jk4W5CljHY75CShk) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-what-breyers-retirement-means-for-az&email_referrer=email_1427226&email_subject=honoring-black-history)
**Hayzel Burton Daniels** – Hayzel was the first black lawyer to ever pass the bar in Arizona and the second-ever black lawyer in the state. He was also one of the first black legislators in Arizona, joining Carl Sims at the same time in 1950.

As one of Arizona’s first black legislators in the state, Hayzel challenged desegregation in the schools and was influential in securing legislation and subsequent court decisions to end school segregation. After becoming Arizona’s first black Assistant Attorney General, the Mayor of Phoenix appointed Hayzel to the position of City Magistrate. He took the bench in 1965 until he retired.

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh9icxzB_PEaIldLrpJWa1h-PnMcynnz4UhXSSnu5nLfKyuQXiHPlvYcfDBbj5mQITJcztmRbNPw-iM1OqEKVQaMHkM8bk_gCc46_jM-L6uPlJjiF4-r5cH_mIuKDhaW32i5bQi0kzd2fXJgryBml4Eq-0jrQsdS3TpReDvuzo6SStAyaBm-elVe2kGfT4w1x-XzLEUD7lZX0HJofBD8guXy/3j7/GkI7Q85YRbCTJbnjrq00GA/h2/PCwD70FyQbiOpFQ-_o0enaE6eYVtLT6RXOowaJOKnds) [](?link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-what-breyers-retirement-means-for-az&email_referrer=email_1427226&email_subject=honoring-black-history)
**Carl Sims** – Carl moved to Phoenix, Arizona in 1927. Sims became very active in Phoenix’s small African American community before and immediately following World War II, and he proved himself to be an adept Democratic agent for progressive political and social change in Arizona.

In 1950, he and attorney Hayzel B. Daniels were the first African-Americans elected to the Arizona legislature. Sims would serve six terms in Arizona’s House of Representatives. As a lawmaker, he called for the improvement and expansion of Arizona’s highways, school taxation equalization, and school integration.

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh9GzvJlfdj33QikRbrjSZbcPFplzjXNkbozALMcAT2msJ0-jiFBh4SbThk6TmYp384Cu5lURs5C8l0r0TkbFNg2F89cT2UcGsiOYd-Z83BZokZ8DxxF4fMonS_P23ETRzUiq33fGAwJDXYOZuiaZ3f0grBxHNuQfAUUZ7njZmrueLRhUNrPLbki-WX5jN-PLpqNe2C2cMlS-vGZbX534jg6/3j7/GkI7Q85YRbCTJbnjrq00GA/h3/pBIGty2_q4WBZF77e3pKrbQjxNrSQrZpKZ5IcjybHpk) [](?link_id=6&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-what-breyers-retirement-means-for-az&email_referrer=email_1427226&email_subject=honoring-black-history)
**Ethel Maynard** – Ethel was the first black woman elected to the AZ legislature in 1966, 16 years after Carl Sims and Hayzel Burton Daniels blazed a trail. Throughout her time in the legislature, Maynard was an advocate for civil rights, welfare reform, and women's rights, as well as bettering the Arizona school system.

At the time of her death in 1980, Ethel was still the only black woman elected to the state legislature.

Arizona Democrats are grateful for the trailblazers that came before us and those who continue to move our state forward and make history.

Sincerely,

Arizona Democrats

| The Arizona Democratic Party is working around the clock to ensure Democratic candidates are elected up and down the ballot — candidates who will fight for what YOU value most, like affordable healthcare for every Arizonan, economic stability and job opportunities for working families, and representation for the most marginalized among us. **Help us continue to build a party that is fighting for all Arizonans. Become a monthly donor.**

****[Donate Monthly](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ0qyBGknsbOzbZZbBvGH6ylDVms6f45QO75VOw-CM7mgvjK_fsy058PYwtcMsCesLebl0HDyLeycTEYLfr3HaZFRPsDcSVNZFErHkisQBpF86zh3bM6urHH4t2npkc0yb7CKKc6AGgEEHQz9bQRFb21ZAD2aRTi8M_TVUumAgAPpmsSlc08STRJ9AIntpDD9N9kFmWWAkOiexntk-TMvIwJjyn-4nW0b0Q3bwr1L32irJ_JfPva8Y_RjaMmlZncmvzGYqfHxFHUx0hSFSxen_SRMLkfhXCw64p0Pa1jAg8IwqqS0zSCNXKieUFkLUY2UAJUgvFjMeRTPuReGU0ADATAoTpJczHar3EJOACUyFPYLPdWcA5B3etcSs36L-xkDcOx82UMYkmYG1SKsuaA_t32NvxqUs46_EK9j5QBgQFYGiMAQ8oUqmkQcXb-25_6k/3j7/GkI7Q85YRbCTJbnjrq00GA/h4/5XiF1GdvKvnVx-MblHctpBwtKSrcqSABoiG89AmMGDE)****

clean_body: As one of the toughest, most vocal champions for working families in Congress, we’re thrilled that Rep. Porter has joined Team Caraveo. | = Big news, Peter: Rep. Katie Porter just endorsed Dr. Caraveo’s campaign for Congress! = As one of the toughest, most vocal champions for working families in Congress, we’re thrilled that Rep. Porter has joined Team Caraveo. Here’s what she had to say: "I know that Dr. Yadira Caraveo is the best candidate to represent Colorado’s new 8th Congressional District. As a pediatrician, a former union representative, and a two-term state legislator, Dr. Caraveo is a trusted leader and a true reformer. In Congress, Dr. Caraveo will be a strong fighter for families and a critical voice to protect the future of our democracy." Dr. Caraveo and Rep. Porter both understand that the status quo isn’t working for too many families in this country. Imagine what they can do—together—in Congress to fight back against entrenched special interests and corporate greed, and restore the American Dream for working families. With control of the House of Representatives likely coming down to Colorado’s 8th District, we have to do everything we can to elect Dr. Caraveo so that she can go to Washington and fight for families alongside Rep. name: Peter Welch
subject: Thank you for your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We accomplished a lot last month and we couldn't have done it without you. Thank you for being on this team.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=95%2E61531%2Epu5als)
Hello,
I wanted to write a short letter of thanks after a successful January.
January was a big month for us. Over 700 grassroots supporters publicly endorsed our campaign — including Vermonters from 114 towns and all 14 counties! Eight of my colleagues in the House, who are on the frontlines defending our democracy, also endorsed our campaign, along with End Citizens United // Let America Vote. We held our virtual organizing kickoff with Sen. Bernie Sanders and were joined by over 200 Vermonters ready to be part of this team. This is all possible because of the support of folks like you — so thank you for showing up for us, for Vermont, and for democracy.
Since launching our campaign in November, we pledged to fight for what was right — and that’s exactly what we’ve been doing since.
Keeping this seat — and the Senate — in Democratic hands is crucial if we’re going to provide affordable childcare for working families, enact a Green New Deal, and lower prescription drug prices.
It’s all at stake this election, but I know together, we’ll fight for what’s right, and we’ll win. Thanks for being here.
Thanks again,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22feb?refcode=em_20220201_t_p_ty&refcode2=95_61531_pu5als&akid=95%2E61531%2Epu5als)

| | Peter, I've got GREAT news.

**The Party Brass in D.C. have named THIS DISTRICT in the top ten flip seats they're targeting to flip from Blue to Red in 2022**!

Read on, and I'll explain exactly why this seat -- as long as a conservative wins the nomination -- _WILL be a red U.S. House seat when the next Congress is sworn in_.
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=d47565a7c3&e=af4b86f5c6)
1\. Virginia's historic 2nd district helped elect Donald Trump by a WIDE margin in 2022.

2\. This district is also home to the James River and Chesapeake Bay, where some of the first Americans founded this great nation.

3\. Sadly, because of the poor decisions made by Party brass, Democrats have held this district since 2018.

4\. This district, which Trump won by DOUBLE DIGITS in 2016, is now EVEN REDDER after redistricting finished in Richmond.

_**The Democrat control of Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia's 2nd district stops NOW**_.

[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=487f6d7058&e=af4b86f5c6)

America is our **_home_** and we cannot let it be torn apart by people who **_hate_** us.

I’m running for Congress so I can lead a fight against the Democrats so we can make America what it is supposed to be.

_The land of the free is not free if the Democrats continue to bow down to the Chinese and globalists._
[_Chip in $50 today!
Chip in $150 today!
Chip in $250 today!
Chip in $500 today!
Chip in $1000 today!_](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=a5bf0e5651&e=af4b86f5c6)
Support my campaign so we can finally stand up and make our public schools pro-America, make our sports leagues pro-America and strengthen our military’s leadership.

[**_We need to take a stand now or else America, as we know it, is gone_**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=3171db78b8&e=af4b86f5c6)!

Thank you for your support,
**Jarome Bell
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=1e1f8f8d09&e=af4b86f5c6)

Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate

P.S.**: It's time to FLIP THIS HOUSE seat from Blue to RED.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: AOC endorses Greg Casar in Texas’ 35th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Texas families deserve a progressive who will show up and fight for them — and that’s exactly what Greg Casar will do.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220201-2762-header&t=1&akid=2762%2E2526796%2Ehqix-9)
**Alexandria just endorsed Greg Casar running in TX-35!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220201?refcode=em20220201-2762-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2762_2526796_hqix-9&akid=2762%2E2526796%2Ehqix-9)
With roots as a labor organizer, Greg is running to deliver a bold agenda for the people — from Medicare for All to good jobs and climate justice.
Texas families deserve a progressive who will show up and fight for them — and that’s exactly what Greg will do. Greg has a strong record of fighting for working families, and Alexandria knows he will help us deliver on reproductive rights and a functional power grid for Texas.
We have a real opportunity to expand progressive leadership in Congress by electing Greg this year. **But right now, his campaign is facing Republican-style fear-mongering tactics attacking Greg for supporting the unhoused community in Austin and San Antonio. So it’s up to us to ensure he gets the huge surge of grassroots contributions he needs now to fight back.**
[Will you join Alexandria in supporting Greg Casar by splitting a $3 contribution right now between our movement and his campaign? If enough grassroots donors step up today, we will win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220201?refcode=em20220201-2762-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2762_2526796_hqix-9&akid=2762%2E2526796%2Ehqix-9)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220201?refcode=em20220201-2762-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2762_2526796_hqix-9&akid=2762%2E2526796%2Ehqix-9)**
With less than two weeks left before early voting starts, your contribution today will make a tremendous impact in ensuring Greg gets the surge of grassroots power he needs to achieve a victory in his March 1 primary.
Thank you for stepping up today,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220201?refcode=em20220201-2762-P_FND_ANO_END&t=23&refcode2=2762_2526796_hqix-9&akid=2762%2E2526796%2Ehqix-9)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220201-2762-P_FND_ANO_END&t=24&akid=2762%2E2526796%2Ehqix-9)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2762%2E2526796%2Ehqix-9) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2762%2E2526796%2Ehqix-9) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2762%2E2526796%2Ehqix-9)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

| Dear Friends,

This is who I'm running against:
---
| [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=77da7b5416&e=4712f71bea)
---
| Back in 2018, Donald Trump liked Ronny Jackson so much that he nominated Ronny to lead the Department of Veterans Affairs.

Then the trouble started. Credible reports started swirling that Ronny passed out opiods to his colleagues.

**[Think about that: Opiods. ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=c15d671a7e&e=4712f71bea)**

Ronny also drank on the job and harassed his female colleagues late at night in their hotel rooms.

(There was even [an internal Pentagon investigation](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=75d036c4bf&e=4712f71bea) that confirmed it.)

Ronny withdrew his nomination to lead the VA and ran for Congress instead.
---
|
---
| [Let's kick Ronny out of Congress](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=1758891e4b&e=4712f71bea "Let's kick Ronny out of Congress")
---
| Ronny Jackson does not have the character necessary to serve in Congress.

I do.

My values are Texas values: Hard work, family, fairness, and faith.
**[Can you chip in $5 to help me tell the voters of this district who Ronny Jackson really is?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=2eb6826190&e=4712f71bea)**
Thanks,
Kathleen.

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: They’re trying to erase history, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

They’re trying to erase history,
Peter.

This Black History Month, we’re seeing a disturbing trend across the
country. Increasing numbers of schools and universities are banning books
that teach the history of the civil rights movement, Jim Crow, and
slavery. Since last year, 14 states have applied these book bans
statewide. 17 more states are considering similar book bans this year.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16185?refcode=em20220201-1528&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1528%2E346206%2EekB4J8 ][IMG]

It’s further proof of an alarming trend in our country — led by
politicians like Rand Paul — to use racist dog whistles to stoke fear and
division.

It’s why Rand Paul spread the lie that the 2020 election was stolen after
a record number of black Georgians voted. It’s why Rand Paul
single-handedly blocked the Emmett Till Anti-Lynching Act, which would
have finally made lynching a federal crime. It’s why the Senate still
can’t pass the John Lewis Voting Rights bill.

Let’s be clear, these events are all connected, and they all have the same
end goal: to maintain white supremacy.

But we know the truth,
Peter. We know that our nation
is built by and stronger because of, the contributions of Black Americans.
We also know that we as a nation cannot heal from our history if we do not
learn from it.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16185?refcode=em20220201-1528&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1528%2E346206%2EekB4J8 ]If you agree, will you chip in $5 or anything you can
right now to support our people-powered movement?

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220201-1528-footer&t=1003&refcode2=1528_346206_ekB4J8&akid=1528%2E346206%2EekB4J8

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker They’re trying to erase history, Peter. This Black History Month, we’re seeing a disturbing trend across the country. Increasing numbers of schools and universities are banning books that teach the history of the civil rights movement, Jim Crow, and slavery. Since last year, 14 states have applied these book bans statewide. 17 more states are considering similar book bans this year. [ ][IMG] It’s further proof of an alarming trend in our country — led by politicians like Rand Paul — to use racist dog whistles to stoke fear and division. It’s why Rand Paul spread the lie that the 2020 election was stolen after a record number of black Georgians voted. It’s why Rand Paul single-handedly blocked the Emmett Till Anti-Lynching Act, which would have finally made lynching a federal crime. It’s why the Senate still can’t pass the John Lewis Voting Rights bill. Let’s be clear, these events are all connected, and they all have the same end goal: to maintain white supremacy. But we know the truth, Peter. We know that our nation is built by and stronger because of, the contributions of Black Americans. We also know that we as a nation cannot heal from our history if we do not learn from it. [ ]If you agree, will you chip in $5 or anything you can right now to support our people-powered movement? Together, Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

subject: Help us get Dr. Ameena on the ballot!
body:
We need your help to collect 1500 petition signatures before the March 7th deadline! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e0132f83699e/help-us-get-dr-ameena-on-the-ballot?e=5fba611a2c)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
# Help us get Dr. Ameena on the ballot!
We are now three weeks into petition season! We've talked to thousands of voters about this critical election and why Dr. Ameena is running. And we appreciate everyone who has come out to help make this a success.

Through the snow, slush, and rain, we need to keep gathering signatures. Any progressive candidate running in Chicago risks getting their petitions challenged. Dr. Ameena is running on a platform that includes investing in universal healthcare, stable housing, education, and criminal justice reform. She believes that only by addressing the inequality in our community can we address the violence that concerns all of us. That is a message that not everyone wants to hear.

And so we need your help! To get on the ballot, we need to get nearly 1500 signatures. We are currently over 1/3 of the way there. Can you help us make it the rest of the way?

While we need volunteers, we also have some paid canvassing shifts available Saturdays and Sundays. Shifts are available:
* Saturdays from 10am to 2pm
* Saturdays from Noon to 4pm
* Sundays from 10am to 2pm

Email hello@drameena.org for more info.

Thank you!
Jessica Olson
Campaign Organizer

clean_body: We need your help to collect 1500 petition signatures before the March 7th deadline! | | | | | | | | Help us get Dr. Ameena on the ballot! We are now three weeks into petition season! We've talked to thousands of voters about this critical election and why Dr. Ameena is running. And we appreciate everyone who has come out to help make this a success. Through the snow, slush, and rain, we need to keep gathering signatures. Any progressive candidate running in Chicago risks getting their petitions challenged. Dr. Ameena is running on a platform that includes investing in universal healthcare, stable housing, education, and criminal justice reform. She believes that only by addressing the inequality in our community can we address the violence that concerns all of us. That is a message that not everyone wants to hear. And so we need your help! To get on the ballot, we need to get nearly 1500 signatures. We are currently over 1/3 of the way there. Can you help us make it the rest of the way? While we need volunteers, we also have some paid canvassing shifts available Saturdays and Sundays. Shifts are available: Saturdays from 10am to 2pm Saturdays from Noon to 4pm Sundays from 10am to 2pm Email hello@drameena.org for more info. Thank you! Jessica Olson Campaign Organizer | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:hello@drameena.org | | Copyright © 2022 Ameena 4 Congress, All rights reserved.

subject: 7 PM. Bring your family and friends.

body:
We need all hands on deck | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8b6a0b2d9446/7-pm-bring-your-family-and-friends?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

We are nearly an hour away from caucuses! Please, [find your location](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=eda2079bfa&e=33b11688c1) and show up at 7 PM. Vote in the straw poll and say "I want to be a Jensen Delegate!" Do not let the half-truths and the smears discourage you from going.

Like it says within Esther 4:14, you have been called "for such a time as this." We need your voice, no matter how much they want to silence it.

When you help us get to the governor's mansion in November, we will [protect life](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=2527a418e1&e=33b11688c1), expand our [2nd Amendment Rights](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=131fce9b01&e=33b11688c1), support our police and [return safety to our streets](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=6815fe31af&e=33b11688c1), make dollars fund our KIDS instead of broken institutions, erase political indoctrination from the classroom, and return Minnesota to a place where freedom is valued - [ESPECIALLY health freedom](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=58b5861879&e=33b11688c1) and medical privacy. **Step 1 starts tonight.**

They threatened my medical license 5 times for holding to my views. I didn't blink despite those threats and I will fiercely advocate for Minnesotan like I do my patients.

If you don't show up, people will pick your candidate for you and we will surely lose.

Our campaign is the one to beat Tim Walz! [Bring your friends and neighbors](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=a9e053ec1b&e=33b11688c1) \- and we'll see you at 7 PM sharp!

-Dr. Scott Jensen
#HEALMINNESOTA
